9.translation: Lil dawk li jemmnu u jagĂ„Â§mlu gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba Alla wiegĂ„Â§ed maĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â§las kbir (fil-Genna)

10.translation: U dawk li ma jemmnux u jgiddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na, dawk huma nies l-Infern

11.translation: Intom li temmnu, ftakru fil-grazzja ta' Alla fuqkom meta xi nies (Lhud) kienu qatgĂ„Â§uha li jmiddu idejhom fuqkom, izda ( 4//a) zamm(ilhom) idejhom minn fuqkom. U ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla (billi tagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb u twarrbu l- Ă„Â§azen)i Ă„Â¦a jĂ„Â§allu f'idejn Alla (u jittamaw fih) dawk li jemmnul

12.translation: Alla daĂ„Â§al f'rabta ma' Wlied Israel, u AĂ„Â§na bgĂ„Â§atna minnhom tnax-il mexxej (wieĂ„Â§ed minn kull tribir), U Alla qal: 'Jiena tassew magĂ„Â§kom (biex inĂ„Â§ariskom ngĂ„Â§inkom. NaĂ„Â§ilfilkom) li jekk tagĂ„Â§mlu t-talb u tagĂ„Â§tu l- karita, temmnu fil-MibgĂ„Â§utin tiegĂ„Â§i, tagĂ„Â§tuhom gieĂ„Â§ u tgĂ„Â§inuhom, u ssellfu; lil Alla self tajjeb, tabilĂ„Â§aqq li naĂ„Â§frilkom l-gĂ„Â§emejjel Ă„Â§ziena tagĂ„Â§kom u ndaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§alkom f'Gonna bix-xmajjar (ta' ilma, Ă„Â§alib, inbid. u gĂ„Â§asel) jigru taĂ„Â§thom. Izda min minnkom, wara din. (ir-rabta, jibqa') ma jemminx, ikun Ă„Â§areg mit-triq it-tajba

13.translation: Izda minĂ„Â§abba li kisru r-rabta tagĂ„Â§hom, AĂ„Â§na sĂ„Â§etniehom (billi caĂ„Â§Ă„Â§adniehom mill-Ă„Â§niena tagĂ„Â§na) u webbisnielhom qlubhom (hekk li ma jilqgĂ„Â§ux fihom il- twemmin. U arahom). jgĂ„Â§awgu. l-kliem: (tat-Tord u jaqilgĂ„Â§uh) minn postu, u nsew parti minn dak li kienu mfakkra fih (fit-Tora). U m'intix se tieqaf (MuĂ„Â§ammad) issib il-Ă„Â§jiena (u l-qerq) fosthom, gĂ„Â§ajr gĂ„Â§al ftit minnhom (li daĂ„Â§lu fl-Islam). Izda (minkejja dan, tikkastigahomx, anzi) aĂ„Â§frilhom u agĂ„Â§dirhom. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq iĂ„Â§obb lil dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

14.translation: U ma' dawk li jgĂ„Â§idu: 'AĂ„Â§na Nsara' dĂ„Â§alna (koll) f'rabta, izda nsew parti minn dak li kienu mfakkra fih (l- Evangelju). GĂ„Â§alhekk qanqalna bejniethom l-ostilita u l- mibegĂ„Â§da sa Jum il-Qawmien. (Dakinhar) Alla se jgĂ„Â§arrafhom b'dak li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

15.translation: Ja Nies il-Ktieb, giekom il-MibgĂ„Â§ut tagĂ„Â§na biex jurikom Ă„Â§afna minn dak li kontu taĂ„Â§bu mill-Ktieb (dwar it-twemmin fih bĂ„Â§ala Profeta ta' Alla), gĂ„Â§alkemm qabez Ă„Â§afna (u ma qagĂ„Â§adx isemmi dak kollu li Ă„Â§bejtu mill- Kotba tagĂ„Â§kom). U. giekom Dawl minn Alla (il-Qoran imqaddes), u Ktieb mill-aktar car

16.translation: Bih Alla jmexxi lejn it-toroq tas-sliem lil-dawk li jĂ„Â§abirku biex jogĂ„Â§gbu lilu, u bir-rieda tiegĂ„Â§u joĂ„Â§roghom mid-dlamijiet lejn id-dawl u jmexxihom lejn triq dritta (/i hi l-Islam)

17.translation: CaĂ„Â§du t-twemmin dawk li jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq huwa l-Messija bin Marija.' .GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Min seta' jzomm lil Alla, kieku ried jeqred lill-Messija bin Marija, lil ommu, u lil kulmin jinsab fuq l-artf' Ta' Alla s-saltna tas-smewwiet u l-art, u dak li hemm bejniethom. Huwa joĂ„Â§loq li jrid, u Alla fuq kollox SetgĂ„Â§an

18.translation: (Il-Lhud u l-Insara jgĂ„Â§idu: ''AĂ„Â§na Wlied Alla, u l- maĂ„Â§bubin tiegĂ„Â§u'' GĂ„Â§idfilhom: MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Mela gĂ„Â§aliex jikkastigakom ta' dnubietkom 7 Let Intom biss I bnedmin minn dawk li Ă„Â§alaq. Huwa jaĂ„Â§fer lil min irid, u.) jikkastiga lil-min irid. U ta' Alla hija s-saltna tas- smewwiet u l-art, u dak li hemm bejniethom, u lejh it- J tmiem (ta' kulĂ„Â§add)

19.translation: Ja. Nies. il-Ktieb, (giekom il-MibgĂ„Â§ut tagĂ„Â§na J (MuĂ„Â§ammad) biex jurikom' bic-car (it-tagĂ„Â§lim ta' l- Islam) wara zmien (li kienu ilhom ma jidhru) il- MibgĂ„Â§utin (fostkom minn zmien Gesil), biex ma tgĂ„Â§idux: ''Ma giena (Ă„Â§add) bi bxara tajba; u lanqas min iwissi.' Issa giekom tassew xi Ă„Â§add bi bxara tajba u bi twissija. Alla fuq kollox SetgĂ„Â§an

20.translation: (Ftakar, MuĂ„Â§ammad) meta Mosc qal lil niesu: 'Ja niesi, ftakru fil-grazzja ta' Alla fuqkom meta bagĂ„Â§at minn fostkom Profeti, u gĂ„Â§amel minnkom slaten u takom dak li ma ta lil Ă„Â§add mill-Ă„Â§olqien

21.translation: Ja niesi, idĂ„Â§lu fl-art imqaddsa li Alla kiteb gĂ„Â§alikom, u la ddurux lura (maĂ„Â§rubin) gĂ„Â§aliex inkella tingĂ„Â§elbu (ui tkunu) tellifin

22.translation: Qalu: ''Ja Mosc, fiha (din l-art) hemm nies ta' saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§a kbira, u m'aĂ„Â§niex se nidĂ„Â§lu fiha qabel ma joĂ„Â§orgu minnha (mingĂ„Â§ajr glied). Jekk joĂ„Â§orgu minnha, aĂ„Â§na nidĂ„Â§lu

23.translation: Zewgt irgiel minn dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u (minn A/la), u li Alla kien wera l-grazzja tiegĂ„Â§u magĂ„Â§hom, qala: 'IdĂ„Â§lu gĂ„Â§alihom mill-bieb (ew/ieni tal-belt). Jekk tidĂ„Â§lu minnu, intom tabilĂ„Â§aqq ir-rebbiĂ„Â§in. U Ă„Â§allu f'idejn Alla, jekk tassew temmnu

24.translation: Qalu: ''Ja Mosc, qatt m'aĂ„Â§na se nidĂ„Â§lu fiha (dik l-art) kemm idumu fiha. Mela mur inti u Sidek, u tqabdul AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq hawnhekk se noqogĂ„Â§du

25.translation: Qal (Mose): 'Sidi, ma gĂ„Â§andix setgĂ„Â§a Ă„Â§lief fuqi nnifsi u fuq Ă„Â§ija ( 4ron). GĂ„Â§alhekk ofroq bejnna u bejn in-nies il- Ă„Â§ziena (bil-Ă„Â§aqq tiegĂ„Â§ek)

26.translation: (Alla) qal: 'Hija. (l-art imqaddsa) micĂ„Â§uda. gĂ„Â§alihom gĂ„Â§al erbgĂ„Â§in sena (/i matulhom) iterrqu mitlufin fuq l-art, La titnikkitx minĂ„Â§abba (dawn) in-nies il-Ă„Â§ziena

27.translation: U semmagĂ„Â§lhom (MuĂ„Â§ammad, lil-Lhud u lil-kulmin hu bĂ„Â§alhom), bil-Ă„Â§aqq, il-grajja taz-zewg ulied ta' Adam (Abel u Kajin) meta otfrew sagrificcju, u minn wieĂ„Â§ed minnhom (minn Abel) intlaqa', u mill-ieĂ„Â§or (Kajin) ma ntlaqax. (Kajin) qal: 'Zgur li-noqtloki' (Izda Abel) qal: SAlla. jilqa' biss. (sagrificcji) minn. dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minnu

28.translation: Jekk tmidd idek fuqi biex toqtolni, m'iniex se mmidd idi fuqek biex noqtlok. Jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq nibza' minn Alla, Sid il-Ă„Â§olqien

29.translation: Jiena rrid li inti titgĂ„Â§abba bil-Ă„Â§tija tiegĂ„Â§i u bil-Ă„Â§tija tiegĂ„Â§ek, u b'hekk tkun minn nies in-Nar. Dak huwa l-Ă„Â§las tal-Ă„Â§ziena

30.translation: Bil-qtil ta' Ă„Â§uh (Adel) webblitu ruĂ„Â§u (il-Ă„Â§azina), u qatlu u sar mit-tellifin

31.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad Alla bagĂ„Â§at cawla tĂ„Â§affer l-art biex jurih kif jaĂ„Â§bi l-gisem gĂ„Â§eri ta' Ă„Â§uh. Huwa qal: ''Ă„Â¦azin gĂ„Â§alijal Ma stajtx inkun bĂ„Â§al din ic-cawla u naĂ„Â§bi l-gisem gĂ„Â§eri ta' Ă„Â§ija 77 ImbagĂ„Â§ad sar min-nedmin

32.translation: MinĂ„Â§abba f'hekk ktibna (l-amar tagĂ„Â§na) lil Ulied Israel li min joqtol bniedem, jekk mhux bi tpattija gĂ„Â§all-qtil ta' xi Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or, jew minĂ„Â§abba. ingustizzja fuq l-art, ikun bĂ„Â§allikieku qatel il-bnedmin kollha. U min jeĂ„Â§les il-Ă„Â§ajja (ta' xi Ă„Â§add), ikun bĂ„Â§allikieku Ă„Â§elisha lill-bnedmin kollha. Il-MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§na gewhom (lil-Lhud) bis-sinjali c-cari, imbagĂ„Â§ad minkejja dan. Ă„Â§afna minnhom gĂ„Â§amlu Ă„Â§azen kbir fuq l-art

33.translation: Ma hemmx Ă„Â§las gĂ„Â§al dawk li jitqatlu kontra Alla u l- MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, u jĂ„Â§abirku (biex igibu) il-korruzzjoni fuq l-art, Ă„Â§lief li jinqatlu, jew li jissallbu, jew li jinqatgĂ„Â§u idejhom u riglejhom id ta' naĂ„Â§a u rigel ta' naĂ„Â§a oĂ„Â§ra jew li jitkeccew mill-art (fejn twieldu). Dak ikun l-gĂ„Â§ajb tagĂ„Â§hom f'(din) id-dinja, u fl-OĂ„Â§ra jkollhom kastig mill- kbar

34.translation: Ă„Â§lief dawk li (jilĂ„Â§qu) jindmu qabel ma tkunu tistgĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§alihom (u tikkastigawhom). GĂ„Â§aliex kunu afu li Alla huwa Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

35.translation: Intom li temmnu, ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, fittxu t-triq gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§andu u Ă„Â§abirku gĂ„Â§alih, biex forsi tirbĂ„Â§u

36.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li ma jemmnux, li kieku kellhom kulma jinsab fuq l-art u (zid) miegĂ„Â§u daqsu ( 2/koll), biex bih jinfdew mill-kastig ta' Jum il-Qawmien, (dan) ma jintlaqax minnhom, u tagĂ„Â§hom ikun kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

37.translation: (Dakinhar ikunu) iridu joĂ„Â§orgu min-Nar (ta' l-Infern), izda ma humiex Ă„Â§ergin minnu. TagĂ„Â§hom huwa kastig li jibqa' gĂ„Â§al dejjem

38.translation: U lill-Ă„Â§alliel u lill-Ă„Â§alliela aqtgĂ„Â§ulhom idejhom bi Ă„Â§las ta' dak li huma t-tnejn gĂ„Â§amlu, u bĂ„Â§ala kastig b'tagĂ„Â§lima minn Alla. Alla huwa Qawwi u GĂ„Â§aref

39.translation: Izda min jindem, wara l-Ă„Â§azen tiegĂ„Â§u, u jsewwi l- imgiba tiegĂ„Â§u, tabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla jdur lejh bil-maĂ„Â§fra, Alla. tassew Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

40.translation: Mela ma tafx li Alla gĂ„Â§andu s-saltna tas-smewwiet u l- art, jikkastiga lil min irid u jaĂ„Â§fer lil min irid Alla fuq kollox SetgĂ„Â§an

41.translation: Ja MibgĂ„Â§ut (MuĂ„Â§ammad), ara li ma jnikktukx dawk li jimpikaw u jĂ„Â§abirku (bi kliemhom u gĂ„Â§emilhom) fic- caĂ„Â§da tat-twemmin: dawk li jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Nemmnuf' b'fommhom (biss), izda qlubhom ma jemmnux. U (titnikkitx) minĂ„Â§abba l-Lhud li jĂ„Â§obbu jisimgĂ„Â§u l-gideb, (u li huma) semmiegĂ„Â§a gĂ„Â§al nies oĂ„Â§ra li ma gewkx (biex jisimgĂ„Â§uk, gĂ„Â§aliex tkabbru). Huma jgĂ„Â§awgu l-kliem (tar- Tora u jaqilgĂ„Â§uh) minn postu, u jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Jekk tingĂ„Â§ataw dan (il-gudizzju li jaqbel lilna), Ă„Â§uduh, izda jekk ma jingĂ„Â§atalkomx, moĂ„Â§Ă„Â§kom hemmi' Lil min Alla jrid igarrab (b'nuqqas ta' nwemmin, jew billi joĂ„Â§orgu mit-triq it-tajba), inti ma tista' tagĂ„Â§mel xejn gĂ„Â§alih kontra Alla. Dawk huma (in-nies il-Ă„Â§ziena) li Alla ma jridx isaffi qlubhom. F'(din) id-dinja gĂ„Â§andhom gĂ„Â§ajb, u fl-OĂ„Â§ra gĂ„Â§andhom kastig mill-kbar

42.translation: SemmiegĂ„Â§a tal-gideb u wikkiela ta' kulma hu illegalit Jekk jigu. gĂ„Â§andek. (MuĂ„Â§ammad, bil-kwistjonijiet tagĂ„Â§hom, jekk trid), agĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq minnhom jew (inkella) warrab minnhom. Jekk twarrab minnhom, ma humiex se jagĂ„Â§mlulek Ă„Â§sara (gĂ„Â§aliex Alla miegĂ„Â§ek), izda jekk tagĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq, agĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq minnhom b'gustizzja. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq iĂ„Â§obb lill-gusti

43.translation: U kif iqabbduk tagĂ„Â§mel: Ă„Â§aqq minnhom, meta gĂ„Â§andhom it-Tora li fiha l-amar ta' Alla (u li gĂ„Â§andha tkun bizzejjed. gĂ„Â§alihom) 1 ImbagĂ„Â§ad minkejja dan, (tarahom). jagĂ„Â§tu. daharhom. (lil. dak li: tkun. qtajt gĂ„Â§alihom, u ma jagĂ„Â§tux widen). Dawk ma jemmnux (tassew)

44.translation: AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq nizzilna r-Tord (lil. Mosc) li fiha tmexxija tajba u dawl. Biha l-Profeti li ntelqu gĂ„Â§ar-rieda ta' Alla jagĂ„Â§mlu Ă„Â§aqq mil-Lhud, u (hekk gĂ„Â§amlu) ir- rabbini u l-gĂ„Â§orrief (Lhud) skond dak li tqabbdu: li jzommu sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ mal-Ktieb ta' Alla u jkunu xhieda tiegĂ„Â§u (u jaraw li ma jsir ebda tibdil fih). GĂ„Â§alhekk (intom. l- gĂ„Â§orrief tal-Lhud) la tibzgĂ„Â§ux min-nies. (u tkellmu bla biza' magĂ„Â§hom dwar MuĂ„Â§ammad), izda ibzgĂ„Â§u minni, u tbigĂ„Â§ux ir-Rivelazzjoni tiegĂ„Â§i bi prezz irĂ„Â§is. (tat-tixĂ„Â§im, biex. taĂ„Â§bu taqsimiet mill-Ktieb. tagĂ„Â§kom). U min: ma jagĂ„Â§milx Ă„Â§aqq skond dak li nizzel Alla, dawk huma li ma jemmnux

45.translation: Fiha (il-Tora) AĂ„Â§na ktibna gĂ„Â§alihom li l-Ă„Â§ajja (rirpatta) bil-Ă„Â§ajja, l-gĂ„Â§ajn bl-gĂ„Â§ajn; l-imnieĂ„Â§er bl-imnieĂ„Â§er, il- widna bil-widna, is-sinna bis-sinna, u l-grieĂ„Â§i (jirĂ„Â§allsu) bi tpattija. Izda min, b'karita, ma'jpattihiex, jinĂ„Â§afrulu dnubietu. Dawk li ma jagĂ„Â§mlux Ă„Â§aqq skond dak li-nizzel Alla, dawk huma l-Ă„Â§ziena

46.translation: Fil-passi tagĂ„Â§hom (tal-Profeti) bgĂ„Â§atna lil-Gesir bin Marija, iseddaq it-Tord li kienet (tnizzlet) qablu. U tajnieh l-Evangelju li fih tmexxija tajba u dawl, u jseddaq it-Tora li kienet (tnizzler) qablu, u tmexxija tajba u twissija lil dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla

47.translation: (Ă„Â¦alli jagĂ„Â§mlu Ă„Â§aqq, Nies. l-Evangelju, skond fiz- tagĂ„Â§lim) li Alla nizzel fih, u min ma jagĂ„Â§milx Ă„Â§aqq skond dak li nizzel Alla, dawk huma l-Ă„Â§ziena

48.translation: U nizzilnielek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) il-Ktieb bis-sewwa, iseddaq il-Ktieb li frnizzel) qablu, u jĂ„Â§arsu u jsaltan fuqu. Mela agĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq minnhom skond dak li nizzel Alla u la timxix wara x-xewqat tagĂ„Â§hom, flok (ma timxi wara) is- sewwa li giek. Lil kull wieĂ„Â§ed minnkom. (il-gnus) gĂ„Â§amilna ligi u triq cara. Li kieku ried. Alla kien jagĂ„Â§milkom nazzjon wieĂ„Â§ed (b'religjon waĂ„Â§da), izda (ma gĂ„Â§amilx hekk) biex igarrabkom b'dak li takom (biex jara min joqgĂ„Â§od gĂ„Â§alih u min jeĂ„Â§odha kontrih). Mela impikaw. fl-gĂ„Â§emejjel it-tajba. Lejn. Alla l-wasla. lura tagĂ„Â§kom ilkoll, u (imbagĂ„Â§ad) jgĂ„Â§arrafkom b'dak li ma kontux taqblu fuqu

49.translation: U agĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq minnhom (MuĂ„Â§ammad). skond dak li nizzel Alla. La timxix fuq ix-xewqat tagĂ„Â§hom, u ara li ma jfixklukx f'xi Ă„Â§aga minn dak li Alla nizzillek. U jekk jagĂ„Â§tuk) daharhom (u ma jagĂ„Â§tux widen), kun af li Alla jrid jolqothom (bil-kastig riegĂ„Â§u) minĂ„Â§abba xi dnubiet tagĂ„Â§hom. U tabilĂ„Â§aqq li Ă„Â§afna min-nies huma mogĂ„Â§tija gĂ„Â§all-Ă„Â§azen

50.translation: Jaqaw ifittxu l-Ă„Â§aqq ta' zmien l-injuranza (ta' qabel l- Islam) U min jagĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq aĂ„Â§jar minn Alla, gĂ„Â§al gens li huwa sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ fit-twemmin

51.translation: Intom. li temmnu, la teĂ„Â§dux il-Lhud u l-Insara b'alleati (kontra l-Misilmin); huma Ă„Â§bieb u alleati ta' xulxin (u mhux tagĂ„Â§kom). U min: minnkom jeĂ„Â§odhom b'alleati, isir minnhom. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq ma jurix it-triq it-tajba lin-nies il- Ă„Â§ziena

52.translation: U tara lil dawk li fi qlubhom (gĂ„Â§andhom il-) marda (tal- wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) jgĂ„Â§agglu lejhom u jgĂ„Â§idu: ''(AĂ„Â§na nagĂ„Â§mluha magĂ„Â§hom gĂ„Â§aliex) nibzgĂ„Â§u li xortina ddur (kontrina; u l- Lhud jegĂ„Â§lbu l-Misilmin).' Jista' jkun li Alla jgibrlek, MuĂ„Â§ammad) ir-rebĂ„Â§a (fuq Mekka), jew (ikun hemm) xi amar mingĂ„Â§andu ((i jgibilhom il-qerda lill-gĂ„Â§edewwa ta' l-Islam), u (ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) jindmu minn dak li kienu jostru fihom infushom

53.translation: U dawkeli jemmnu jgĂ„Â§idu (dwar dawk ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or): ''Jaqaw dawn huma dawk li Ă„Â§alfu b'Alla, bl-aqwa Ă„Â§alf, li huma kienu tassew magĂ„Â§kom'' L-gĂ„Â§emejjel tagĂ„Â§hom sfaw fix-xejn, u saru tellifin (f'din id-dinja u fl-OĂ„Â§ra)

54.translation: Intom: li temmnu, min: minnkom jerga' lura mid-din tiegĂ„Â§u, Alla: se jgib. (flokhom). gens. (li Huwa jkun) iĂ„Â§obbhom, u huma jĂ„Â§obbuh, ikunu umli ma' dawk li jemmnu u qliel ma' dawk li ma jemmnux, iĂ„Â§abirku gĂ„Â§al Alla, u ma jibzgĂ„Â§ux mil-lewm ta' min ilum. Dik hija t-tjieba ta' Alla, Huwa jagĂ„Â§tiha lil min irid. Alla jesa' kollox, u jaf kollox

55.translation: Il-Ă„Â§abib u l-alleat tagĂ„Â§kom ma huwa Ă„Â§add Ă„Â§lief Alla, il- MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u (MuĂ„Â§ammad), dawk li jemmnu, li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-talb u jagĂ„Â§tu l-karita, u jmilu (kollhom qima lejn Alla)

56.translation: U min izomm ma' Alla, mal-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u u (ina ') dawk li jemmnu, tabilĂ„Â§aqq (isiru jafir li din) hija. l-gemgĂ„Â§a. ta' Alla; huma r-rebbiĂ„Â§ini

57.translation: Intom li temmnu, la teĂ„Â§dux lil-dawk li jieĂ„Â§du d-din tagĂ„Â§kom bic-cajt u l-logĂ„Â§ob, minn fost dawk (il-Lhud u l- Insara) li ngĂ„Â§ataw il-Ktieb qabilkom, u dawk li ma jemmnux, bi Ă„Â§bieb u alleati. U ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, jekk (tassew) temmnu

58.translation: Meta ssejĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§at-talb, (arahom): jeĂ„Â§duh bic-cajt u l- logĂ„Â§ob. Dak minĂ„Â§abba li huma gens mingĂ„Â§ajr gĂ„Â§aqal (u ma jafux is-siwi kbir tat-talb)

59.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom. MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Ja' Nies il-Ktieb, jaqaw qegĂ„Â§din biss teĂ„Â§duha kontrina gĂ„Â§aliex nemmnu f'Alla, f'dak li: tnizzlilna, u f'dak li tnizzel qabel, u gĂ„Â§aliex Ă„Â§afna minnkom mogĂ„Â§tija gĂ„Â§all-Ă„Â§azen

60.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): (Jaqaw ftriduni) ngĂ„Â§arrafkom bi Ă„Â§las, mingĂ„Â§and Alla, agĂ„Â§ar minn dan (li tixtiequ lilna)) (Dan il- Ă„Â§las huwa gĂ„Â§al) dak li Alla seĂ„Â§tu (gĂ„Â§aliex caĂ„Â§Ă„Â§du mill- Ă„Â§niena tiegĂ„Â§u) u gĂ„Â§adab gĂ„Â§alih, u (gĂ„Â§al dawk li) gĂ„Â§amel: J minnhom xadini u Ă„Â§niezer, u (gĂ„Â§az) min qiem lix-Xitan u J lill-allat (foloz). Dawk jinsabu f'imkien wisq agĂ„Â§ar, u f'aktar telfien (u 'l bogĂ„Â§od) mit-triq id-dritta

61.translation: Meta jigu gĂ„Â§andkom, jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Nemmnu,' izda jkunu daĂ„Â§lu bic-caĂ„Â§da tat-twemmin u Ă„Â§argu biha. Izda Alla jaf sewwa b'dak li kienu jaĂ„Â§bu

62.translation: U tara Ă„Â§afna minnhom jimpikaw bejniethom (b; kliemhom u b'gĂ„Â§emilhom) fil-Ă„Â§tija u fl-aggressjoni, u fl-ikel ta' qligĂ„Â§ projbit (gĂ„Â§alihom bil-ligi divina). Tassew ta' gĂ„Â§ajb dak li qegĂ„Â§din jagĂ„Â§mlu

63.translation: GĂ„Â§aliex. ir-rabbini u l-gĂ„Â§orrief (tagĂ„Â§hom) ma jwaqqfuhomx mill-kliem Ă„Â§azin tagĂ„Â§hom u mill-ikel ta' qligĂ„Â§ projbit (gĂ„Â§alihom) 2 Tassew ta' gĂ„Â§ajb dak li qegĂ„Â§din jagĂ„Â§mlu (ir-rabbini u l-gĂ„Â§orrief li jibqgĂ„Â§u siekta dwar il- Ă„Â§azen)

64.translation: Il-Lhud qalu: ''Id Alla marbuta (bix-xeĂ„Â§Ă„Â§a).' (Ă„Â¦alli jkunu) idejhom marbutin, u (Ă„Â§alli) jinsteĂ„Â§tu (u jiccaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§du mill- Ă„Â§niena ta' Alla), ta' dak li qalul Lel (Alla) idejh it-tnejn miftuĂ„Â§in. beraĂ„Â§; Huwa jonfoq (mill-gid tiegĂ„Â§u) kif irid. Tassew li dak li tnizzel lilek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) minn Sidek (il- Qoran) se jzid Ă„Â§afna minnhom fil-Ă„Â§azen u fic-caĂ„Â§da tat- twemmin (gĂ„Â§aliex ma jemmnux fih): U bejniethom (il-Lhud) qlajna l-ostilita u l-mibegĂ„Â§da sa Jum il-Qawmien. Kull darba li jkebbsu n-nar gĂ„Â§all-gwerra (kontra MuĂ„Â§ammad u kontra l-Misilmin), Alla jitfih. Huma (dejjem) iĂ„Â§abirku fuq l-art biex igibu l-korruzzjoni. Alla ma jĂ„Â§obbx lill-korrotti

65.translation: Li kieku Nies il-Ktieb emmnu u bezgĂ„Â§u (minn Alla u zammu lura mill-Ă„Â§azen), konna nĂ„Â§assrulhom Ă„Â§tijiethom u ndaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§luhom f'Gonna ta' hena

66.translation: Li kieku zammu sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ mat-Tora, ma' l-Evangelju u ma' dak li tnizzlilhom minn Sidhom, kienu jieklu minn fuqhom. u minn taĂ„Â§t riglejhom (daqshekk kbar kienu jkunu l-barkiet tas-sema u ta' l-art li kienu. jgawdu). Fosthom hemm' nies li qabdu t-triq it-tajba, izda dak li Ă„Â§afna minnhom jagĂ„Â§mlu huwa Ă„Â§azin

67.translation: Ja MibgĂ„Â§ut (MuĂ„Â§ammad), xandar dak li tnizzel lilek minn Sidek, u jekk ma tagĂ„Â§milx (hekk, u ma xxandarx kulma ngĂ„Â§atalek), ma tkunx xandart il-messagg tiegĂ„Â§u. Alla jĂ„Â§arsek min-nies (li jridu jagĂ„Â§mlulek id-deni jew joqtluk). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla ma jurix it-triq lil-dawk li ma. jemmnux

68.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Ja Nies il-Ktieb, ma gĂ„Â§andkom xejn (bĂ„Â§ala gwida fuq -xiex izzommu), sa ma zzommu sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ mat-Tora, ma' l-Evangelju u ma' dak li tnizzel lilkom minn Sidkom (il-Qoran).' Dak li tnizzel lilek minn Sidek (il-Qoran) tassew izid lil Ă„Â§afna minnhom fil- Ă„Â§azen u fic-caĂ„Â§da tat-twemmin, izda la. titnikkitx (MuĂ„Â§ammad) gĂ„Â§an-nies li ma jemmnux

69.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li jemmnu (il-Misilmin), il-Lhud, is- Sabijin, u l-Insara, min jemmen f'Alla u fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum, u jagĂ„Â§mel gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba, (dawk) ebda. biza' ma. jkun hemm fuqhom (fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum), u lanqas ma jitnikktu (minĂ„Â§abba dak li Ă„Â§allew warajhom fid-dinja)

70.translation: AĂ„Â§na dĂ„Â§alna f'rabta ma' Wlied Israel u bgĂ„Â§atna gĂ„Â§andhom MibgĂ„Â§utin. Kull darba li giehom xi MibgĂ„Â§ut b'dak li ma jixtiqux, giddbu lil uĂ„Â§ud minnhom, u qatlu lil oĂ„Â§rajn

71.translation: U Ă„Â§asbu li ma jkunx hemm tigrib (gĂ„Â§alihom tal-Ă„Â§azen li gĂ„Â§amlu); u gĂ„Â§alhekk gĂ„Â§amew u ttarrxu (u ma setgĂ„Â§ux isibu. triq. is-sewwa). ImbagĂ„Â§ad Alla dar lejhom bil- maĂ„Â§fra: (imma) imbagĂ„Â§ad Ă„Â§afna minnhom gĂ„Â§amew u ttarrxu (gĂ„Â§al darba oĂ„Â§ra). Izda Alla jara sew dak li jagĂ„Â§mlu

72.translation: M'emmnux dawk li jgĂ„Â§idu: 'TabilĂ„Â§aqq Alla huwa l- Messija bin Marija.' Il-Messija (innifsu) qal: 'Ja Wlied Israel, agĂ„Â§tu qima lil Alla Sidi u Sidkoml' TabilĂ„Â§aqq li min ixierek lil- Alla (ma' allat oĂ„Â§ra), Alla jcaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§du mill- Genna, u il-kenn tiegĂ„Â§u jkun in-Nar. Il-Ă„Â§ziena ma gĂ„Â§andhomx min jgĂ„Â§inhom

73.translation: M'emmnux dawk li jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Alla. tabilĂ„Â§aqq huwa t- tielet minn tlieta.' Izda ma hemmx alla (ieĂ„Â§or) Ă„Â§lief Alla WieĂ„Â§ed. U jekk m'intomx se jieqfu minn dak li qegĂ„Â§din jgĂ„Â§idu, dawk fosthom li caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin se jmisshom kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

74.translation: GĂ„Â§aliex ma jdurux bl-indiema lejn Alla u jitolbuh maĂ„Â§fra 7 Alla huwa Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

75.translation: Il-Messija bin Marija ma kienx gĂ„Â§ajr MibgĂ„Â§ut, u qablu gĂ„Â§addew il-MibgĂ„Â§utin (l-oĂ„Â§ra). Ommu kienet mara tal- Ă„Â§aqq u s-sewwa. Huma t-tnejn kienu jieklu l-ikel (bĂ„Â§al Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or). Ara kif nuruhom. bic-car (lill-Insara) is- sinjali (tagĂ„Â§na, biex jemmnu), imbagĂ„Â§ad ara kif jitbiegĂ„Â§du mis-sewwa

76.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom: MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Jaqaw, minflok. lil Alla, tqimu dak li la gĂ„Â§andu s-setgĂ„Â§a jkunilkom ta' deni u lanqas ta' siwiV' Izda Alla huwa li jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

77.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom: ukoll MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Ja' Nies. il-Ktieb, tesagerawx fir-religjon tagĂ„Â§kom (hekk (i tisĂ„Â§qu fuq dak) li ma huwiex is-sewwa, u la timxux wara x-xewqat ta' nies li fl-imgĂ„Â§oddi tĂ„Â§awdu, Ă„Â§awdu lil Ă„Â§afna (oĂ„Â§rajn), u tilffu triq is-sewwa

78.translation: Dawk minn Ulied Israel li m'emmnux, insteĂ„Â§tu minn David u minn Gest bin Marija gĂ„Â§aliex m'obdewx (/i/ Alla) u kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§azen

79.translation: Huma ma kinux izommu lil xulxin mill-Ă„Â§azen li gĂ„Â§amlu. Tassew ta' gĂ„Â§ajb dak li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

80.translation: Tara Ă„Â§afna minnhom (il-Lhud) jissieĂ„Â§bu ma' dawk li ma jemmnux. Tassew ta' gĂ„Â§ajb dak (l-gĂ„Â§emil) li huma nfushom ressqu quddiemhom (biex jitĂ„Â§allsu. tiegĂ„Â§u fil- Ă„Â¦ajja l-OĂ„Â§ra, u) Alla gĂ„Â§adab gĂ„Â§alihom, u huma jibqgĂ„Â§u fil-kastig gĂ„Â§al dejjem

81.translation: Li kieku (il-Lhud) emmnu f'Alla, fil-Profeta, u f'dak li tnizzel lilu, ma kinux-jissieĂ„Â§bu magĂ„Â§hom, izda Ă„Â§afna minnhom huma Ă„Â§ziena

82.translation: Tassew issib (MuĂ„Â§ammad) li fost in-nies, l-eĂ„Â§rex gĂ„Â§edewwa ta' dawk li jemmnu huma l-Lhud u dawk li xierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla), u tassew issib (ukoll) li l- eqreb, fosthom, fl-imĂ„Â§abba lejn dawk li jemmnu huma dawk li jgĂ„Â§idu: SAĂ„Â§na Nsara'' Dan gĂ„Â§aliex hemm minnhom qassisin u tĂ„Â§ieb, u huma ma jitkabbrux

83.translation: U meta jisimgĂ„Â§u dak li tnizzel lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut (il-Qoran), tara gĂ„Â§ajnejhom ifuru bid-dmugĂ„Â§ minĂ„Â§abba s-sewwa li) gĂ„Â§arfu. (fih), u jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Sidna, aĂ„Â§na nemmnut. Iktibna max-xhieda (li huma l-Misilmin)

84.translation: U kif ma nemmnux f'Alla, u f'dak li giena mis-sewwa, (meta) aĂ„Â§na nittamaw li Sidna jdaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§alna man-nies it- tajba

85.translation: GĂ„Â§alhekk Alla tahom il-Ă„Â§las ta' dak li qalu: Gonna bix- xmajjar jigru taĂ„Â§thom, u fihom jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem. Dak huwa l-Ă„Â§las gĂ„Â§al dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

86.translation: Izda dawk li ma jemmnux u jgiddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na, dawk huma nies in-Nar iĂ„Â§eggeg

87.translation: Intom litemmnu, tipprojbixxux it-tajjeb li Alla gĂ„Â§amel jiswa gĂ„Â§alikom, izda taqbzux il-limitil Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq ma jĂ„Â§obbx lil dawk li jaqbzu l-limiti

88.translation: U kulu milli takom Alla gĂ„Â§all-gĂ„Â§ajxien, dak li jiswa u tajjeb; izda ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla li intom temmnu fih

89.translation: Alla ma jeĂ„Â§ux gĂ„Â§alikom tan-nuqqas ta' Ă„Â§sieb fil-Ă„Â§alfiet tagĂ„Â§kom, izda jieĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§alikom ta' dawk il-Ă„Â§alfiet li intom tagĂ„Â§mlu bl-akbar serjeta. Tpattija ta' dan huwa. li titimgĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§axar foqra b'daqs kemm (is-soltu) titimgĂ„Â§u lil nieskom, jew tlibbsuhom, jew (inkella) li teĂ„Â§ilsu Isir. U min ma jsibx (kif jagĂ„Â§mel dan), gĂ„Â§andu jsum tlett ijiem: Din hija tpattija gĂ„Â§all-Ă„Â§alfiet li Ă„Â§liftu. U zommu sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ mal- Ă„Â§alfiet tagĂ„Â§kom. Hekk Alla jurikom. bic-car. is-sinjali tiegĂ„Â§u biex forsi tizzu Ă„Â§ajr. f l

90.translation: Intom li temmnu (kwir aftr li) l-inbid, il-logĂ„Â§ob ta' l- azzard, l-idoli u l-vlegeg (tat-tbassir) ma humiex gĂ„Â§ajr) tingis minn gĂ„Â§emil ix-Xitan. Mela warrbu minnu biex forsi tkunu rebbiĂ„Â§in

91.translation: Ix-Xitan ma jridx gĂ„Â§ajr li jagĂ„Â§milkom gĂ„Â§edewwa ta' xulxin u jgib il-mibegĂ„Â§da fostkom (billi jinqeda) bl-inbid u bil-logĂ„Â§ob ta' l-azzard, u jzommkom mit-tifkira ta' Alla u mit-talb. Mela (issa li tafu: dan), intom se tieqfu (minn dawn il-vizzji)

92.translation: Opdu lil-Alla u obdu lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut, u ogogĂ„Â§du attenti (mill-Ă„Â§azen). Jekk tagĂ„Â§tu daharkom (u ma tagĂ„Â§rux widen), kunu afu li d-dmir tal-MibgĂ„Â§ut tagĂ„Â§na huwa biss li jxandar bic-car (tagĂ„Â§lim l-Islam)

93.translation: Fuq dawk li jemmnu u jagĂ„Â§mlu gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba ma hemm (ebda) Ă„Â§tija ta' dak li kielu (fl-imgĂ„Â§oddi, qabel il- projbizzjoni ta' l-inbid), jekk jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, jemmnu u jagĂ„Â§mlu gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba, imbagĂ„Â§ad (gĂ„Â§a/ darba oĂ„Â§ra) jitĂ„Â§arsu mill-Ă„Â§azen u jemmnu, imbagĂ„Â§ad jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla u jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb. Alla jĂ„Â§obb lil dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t- tajjeb

94.translation: Intom li temmnu, tabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla jgarrabkom bil- kacca li tigi f'idejkom u fil-lanez tagĂ„Â§kom; biex Alla jkun jaf min jibza' minnu, (Huwa li jinsab) fis-satra. Min, wara dan, jikser il-ligi, ikollu kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

95.translation: Intom li temmnu, la toqtlux kacca meta intom tinsabu fil-'iĂ„Â§ram (jigifieri mĂ„Â§ejjija biex tagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§agg jew l- gĂ„Â§omra): Min minnkom joqtolhom fdawn l-annimali) apposta, it-tpattija (gĂ„Â§a/ dan), skond il-Ă„Â§aqq li jagĂ„Â§mlu tnejn min-nies gusti fostkom, (tkun) b'annimal imrobbi (gĂ„Â§andkom), daqs dak li nqatel, li jingieb bĂ„Â§ala offerta fil-KagĂ„Â§ba, jew (inkella ssir) tpattija (billi) titimgĂ„Â§u xi fqar, jew xi jsarraf dan f'sawm, b'hekk iduq il-kruha ta' gĂ„Â§emilu. Alla Ă„Â§afer dak li gĂ„Â§adda (qabel ma nizel dan il- vers), izda min jerga' (jidneb), Alla jpattihielu. Alla huwa Qawwi u jaf kif ipattiha

96.translation: Jiswa gĂ„Â§alikom sajd il-baĂ„Â§ar u l-ikel tiegĂ„Â§u (anki meta tkunu fil-'iĂ„Â§ram), biex ikun tgawdija gĂ„Â§alikom u gĂ„Â§al min ikun imsiefer, izda ma tiswiex gĂ„Â§alikom il-kacca fuq l-art meta intom tinsabu fil-'iĂ„Â§ram, U ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla li gĂ„Â§ad tingabru gĂ„Â§andu (i tidhru quddiemu)

97.translation: Alla gĂ„Â§amel il-KagĂ„Â§ba, id-dar imqaddsa, imwaqqfa gĂ„Â§all-gid tan-nies, (kif ukoll) ix-xahar imqaddes, il- bhejjem: tas-sagrificcju u l-bhejjem. immarkati. gĂ„Â§as- sagrificcju. Dak biex tkunu tafu li Alla jaf b'dak li hemm fis-smewwiet u fl-art, u li Alla jaf b'kollox

98.translation: Kunu afu li Alla Qalil fil-kastig, u li Alla Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

99.translation: Dmir il-MibgĂ„Â§ut huwa biss li jxandar (it-tagĂ„Â§lim ta' l- Islam). AMla jaf b'dak li turu u b'dak li taĂ„Â§bu

100.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'iIl-Ă„Â§azin u t-tajjeb ma humiex indaqs, anki jekk il-kotra tal-Ă„Â§azen tista' tgĂ„Â§aggbek. Mela ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, ja nies ta' dehen, biex forsi tkunu rebbiĂ„Â§inf' g

101.translation: Intom li temmnu, la tistaqsux (lil MuĂ„Â§ammad) fuq Ă„Â§wejjeg li, kieku jintwerewlkom, idejqukom. Izda jekk tistaqsu fuqhom meta jitnizzel (lilkom) il-Qoran, (dawn) jintwerewlkom. Alla Ă„Â§afer dan. Alla huwa Kollu Ă„Â¦niena u ta' sabar mal-midinbin

102.translation: Qabilkom nies (oĂ„Â§ra) staqsew gĂ„Â§al dawn (il-Ă„Â§wejjeg), imbagĂ„Â§ad (wara li ngĂ„Â§atawlhom), saru ma jemmnux fihom

103.translation: Alla ma gĂ„Â§amilx digrieti dwar il-gemla b'widintha maqsuma (i ma jiswiex tintrikeb), jew gemla li tiggerra (u li Ă„Â§add ma jista' jinqeda biha). inkella sagrificcji lill- idoli gĂ„Â§al twelid doppju fil-bhejjem, jew igmla fĂ„Â§ula (li ma jsirx uzu minnhom).'' izda kienu dawk li m'emmnux li qalgĂ„Â§u l-gideb dwar Alla, u Ă„Â§afna minnhom ma gĂ„Â§andhomx gĂ„Â§aqal

104.translation: (Meta jintqalilhom: ''Ejjew lejn dak li Alla nizzel u lejn il-MibgĂ„Â§ut,' huma jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Bizzejjed gĂ„Â§alina dak fir- twemmin) li sibna lil missirijietna fihl 7 (JgĂ„Â§idu hekk) anki jekk missirijiethom. ma kienu jafu xejn, u lanqas kienu fit-triq it-tajba

105.translation: Intom li temmnu, jeĂ„Â§tieg (tĂ„Â§arsu) lilkom infuskom. Jekk. taqbdu t-triq it-tajba, min Ă„Â§areg minnha ma jagĂ„Â§mlilkomx Ă„Â§sara. Lejn Alla terggĂ„Â§u lura Ikoll, u jĂ„Â§abbrilkom dak li kontu tagĂ„Â§mlu

106.translation: Intom li temmnu, meta l-mewt toqrob lejn xi Ă„Â§add minnkom, (Zommu) xhieda bejnietkom meta jsir it- testment: zewg (Misilmin) gusti minn fostkom, jew tnejn oĂ„Â§ra barranin (li ma humiex Misilmin) jekk tkunu qegĂ„Â§din itterrqu fl-art u tintlaqtu bid-dizgrazzja tal-mewt. Jekk tkunu (intom il-werrieta) bejn Ă„Â§altejn. (dwar is- serjeta tagĂ„Â§hom), zommuhom it-tnejn wara t-talb (ta' l- gĂ„Â§asar) u (araw li) jaĂ„Â§ilfu b'Alla (dan li gej): 'Ma nbigĂ„Â§ux il-Ă„Â§alfa tagĂ„Â§na b'xi prezz, lanqas kieku kien gĂ„Â§al xi qarib (tagĂ„Â§na), u lanqas ma naĂ„Â§bu x-xhieda ta' Alla. gĂ„Â§aliex inkella nkunu midinbin

107.translation: Izda jekk jinstab li huma t-tnejn jistĂ„Â§oqqu (is-suspett li gĂ„Â§amlu) dnub. (gĂ„Â§aliex Ă„Â§alfir falz), mela tnejn oĂ„Â§ra joqogĂ„Â§du minflokhom, minn dawk li jistĂ„Â§oqqu (il-wirt), u jaĂ„Â§ilfu b'Alla (hekk): '(NaĂ„Â§ilfu) li x-xhieda tagĂ„Â§na hija aktar vera mix-xhieda tagĂ„Â§hom it-tnejn, u li ma ksirniex il-ligi (gĂ„Â§aliex ma Ă„Â§lifniex falz), gĂ„Â§aliex inkella tassew inkunu mill-Ă„Â§zienaf

108.translation: B'hekk aktarx li jagĂ„Â§tu x-xhieda tagĂ„Â§hom kif jixraq, jew (inkella) jibzgĂ„Â§u li, wara l-Ă„Â§alf tagĂ„Â§hom. jittieĂ„Â§ed il- Ă„Â§alf (ta' Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or). Izda ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla u isimgĂ„Â§u (minnu). Alla ma jurix it-triq it-tajba lin-nies il-Ă„Â§ziena

109.translation: Dakinhar li Alla jigma' l-MibgĂ„Â§utin (fiegĂ„Â§u) u jistaqsi(hom): 'Xi twegib Ă„Â§adtu (minn nieskom)i 7 Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Ma gĂ„Â§andniex gĂ„Â§arfien (fuq dan Ă„Â§lief li Inti taf Ă„Â§afna aktar minna). Huwa Inti li taf kollox fuq (kull) ma' I huwa mistur

110.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad Alla jgĂ„Â§id: 'Ja Gest bin Marija, ftakar fil- grazzja tiegĂ„Â§i fuqek u fuq ommok: meta saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§aĂ„Â§tek b'ruĂ„Â§ il-qodos (l-anglu Gabrijel, hekk li) kellimt lin-nies (meta kont gĂ„Â§adek) fil-benniena u meta kbirt, u meta gĂ„Â§allimtek il-kitba u l-gĂ„Â§erf, it-Zora u l-Evangelju; meta inti Ă„Â§laqt mit-tajn bĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§amla ta' tajra, bir-rieda tiegĂ„Â§i, u nfaĂ„Â§t fiha u saret tajra, bir-rieda tiegĂ„Â§i, u (meta inti) fejjaqt lill- agĂ„Â§ma mit-twelid u lill-imgiddem, (ukoll) bir-rieda tiegĂ„Â§i, u meta qajjimt lill-mejtin, bir-rieda tiegĂ„Â§i, u meta zammejt lil Ulied Israel ('il bogĂ„Â§od) minnek (biex ma joqtlukx). meta. gibtilhom. is-sinjali: c-cari, u dawk minnhom li m'emmnux qalu: 'TabilĂ„Â§aqq dan ma huwiex gĂ„Â§ajr seĂ„Â§er fid-dieher

111.translation: U meta (Jiena) nebbaĂ„Â§t lid-dixxipli: 'Emmnu fija u fil- MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§i (Gesir),' huma qalu: 'Emminna, u inti ixhed li aĂ„Â§na Misilmin

112.translation: Meta d-dixxipli qalu: ''Ja Gesii bin Marija, Sidek jista' jnizzel fuqna mejda (imĂ„Â§ejjija sew bl-ikel) mis-sema 7' Huwa qal: ''IbzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, jekk intom temmnu

113.translation: Qalu: 'Irridu nieklu minnha, u qlubna jsibu s-serĂ„Â§an, inkunu nafu li inti kellimtna bis-sewwa, u nkunu xhieda gĂ„Â§aliha (il-mejda)

114.translation: Gesii bin Marija qal: 'Alla Sidna, nizzel fuqna mejda mis-sema li tkun gĂ„Â§alina festa, gĂ„Â§all-ewwel wieĂ„Â§ed minna u gĂ„Â§all-aĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar wieĂ„Â§ed minna (li gĂ„Â§ad jigi warajna), u sinjal minnek. GĂ„Â§ajjixna, gĂ„Â§aliex Inti l-AĂ„Â§jar li tagĂ„Â§ti l- gĂ„Â§ajxien

115.translation: Alla qal: ''Jiena nnizzilha fuqkom, izda min minnkom imbagĂ„Â§ad ma jemminx, Jiena nikkastigah b'kastig li ma nikkastiga lil Ă„Â§add bih fil-Ă„Â§olqien (kollu)

116.translation: U meta Alla qal: 'Ja Gesii bin Marija, jaqaw inti gĂ„Â§edt lin-nies: 'Ă„Â¦udu lili u lil ommi bĂ„Â§ala zewg allat, minflok lil Alla 9' Huwa qal: ''SebĂ„Â§ lilekl Ma jkun (qarr) li ngĂ„Â§id dak li ma gĂ„Â§andix jedd. Jekk kont ngĂ„Â§id hekk, kont tkun tafu dan. Inti taf x'hemm fija nnifsi, izda jiena ma nafx x'hemm fik innifsek. Inti tabilĂ„Â§aqq taf kollox fuq kulma huwa mistur

117.translation: Jiena ma gĂ„Â§edtilhomx gĂ„Â§ajr dak li amartli, (jigifieri): 'Qimu lil Alla Sidi u Sidkom, u kont xhud tagĂ„Â§hom sakemm domt fosthom: U meta Ă„Â§adtni lura (gĂ„Â§andek), kont Inti li Ă„Â§aristhom (u gĂ„Â§assist fuqhom). Inti ta' kollox ix-Xhud

118.translation: Jekk tikkastigahom, huma tabilĂ„Â§aqq il-qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§ek, u jekk taĂ„Â§frilhom, Inti tabilĂ„Â§aqq il-Qawwi u l-GĂ„Â§aref

119.translation: Alla qal: 'Dan Jum meta s-sewwa tal-gusti jkunilhom ta' fejda. TagĂ„Â§hom huma Gonna bix-xmajjar jigru taĂ„Â§thom, u jgĂ„Â§ammru fihom gĂ„Â§al dejjem. L-gĂ„Â§axqa ta' Alla fuqhom, u huma jitgĂ„Â§axxqu bih. Dik hija r-rebĂ„Â§a l- kbiraf

120.translation: Ta' Alla s-saltna tas-smewwiet u l-art, u kulma fihom, u Huwa fuq kollox SetgĂ„Â§an

1.translation: TifĂ„Â§ir lil Alla li Ă„Â§alaq is-smewwiet u l-art u gĂ„Â§amel id- dlamijiet u d-dawl. ImbagĂ„Â§ad dawk li ma jemmnux jagĂ„Â§mlu (allat oĂ„Â§ra u jqisuhom) daqs (Alla) Sidhom

2.translation: Huwa li Ă„Â§alaqkom minn tajn, imbagĂ„Â§ad qata' li jkun hemm zmien (gĂ„Â§a Ă„Â§ajjitkom), u gĂ„Â§andu zmien fiss (gĂ„Â§al meta tqumu mill-imwiet). ImbagĂ„Â§ad intom (minkejja S- sinjali kollha li gewkom), tinsabu bejn Ă„Â§alltejn (dwar il- qawmien mill-imwiet)

3.translation: Huwa Alla fis-smewwiet u fl-art: jaf dak li tostru u dak li turu, u jaf dak (it-tajjeb jew il-Ă„Â§azin) li tiksbu

4.translation: Ma jigihomx sinjal wieĂ„Â§ed mis-sinjali ta' Sidhom lima jagĂ„Â§tuhx daharhom

5.translation: Huma giddbu s-sewwa meta giehom, u se tigihom l- aĂ„Â§bar ta' dak li kienu jiddieĂ„Â§ku bih

6.translation: Jaqaw ma rawx kemm-il nisel qridna qabilhom (gĂ„Â§alicx giddbu lill-MibgĂ„Â§urin tagĂ„Â§na); konna saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§aĂ„Â§niehom sew (b'kull gid) fl-art, hekk li lanqas lilkom (ja nies ta' Mekka) ma saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§aĂ„Â§na (daqshom). U fuqhom ftaĂ„Â§na s- sema b'xita kotrana, : 1 gĂ„Â§amilna x-xmajjar jigru taĂ„Â§thom. Izda qridniehom minĂ„Â§abba dnubiethom, u warajhom Ă„Â§rigna nisel ieĂ„Â§or

7.translation: Li kieku nizzilnielek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) ktieb (miktub) fuq parcmina, u (setgĂ„Â§u) imissuh b'idejhom: (u ma jiddubitawx aktarj, dawk li caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin. kienu jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Dan ma huwiex gĂ„Â§ajr seĂ„Â§er fid-diehert)

8.translation: Huma qalu: ''GĂ„Â§aliex ma tnizzilx fuqu xi anglu/' Li kieku nizzilna (fuq MuĂ„Â§ammad) xi anglu, il-kwistjoni kienet tkun maqtugĂ„Â§a, u mbagĂ„Â§ad ma kinux jingĂ„Â§ataw nifs biex jindmu (gĂ„Â§aliex konna neqirduhom)

9.translation: Likieku (/ill-MibgĂ„Â§ut tagĂ„Â§na) gĂ„Â§amilnieh anglu, (xorta waĂ„Â§da) konna nagĂ„Â§mluh (f'surer) ragel (gĂ„Â§aliex ma jistgĂ„Â§ux jaraw anglu kif tassew hu), u konna nĂ„Â§awduhom f'dak li huma (diga) imĂ„Â§awda

10.translation: MibgĂ„Â§utin (oĂ„Â§rajn) qablek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) twaqqgĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§ac-cajt, izda dawk li ddieĂ„Â§ku bihom (sfaw) imdawra (minn. kull naĂ„Â§a) b'dak (il-kastig) li kienu jwaqqgĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§ac-cajt

11.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad lil dawk li qegĂ„Â§din jiddieĂ„Â§ku bik): 'Terrqu fl-art, imbagĂ„Â§ad araw kif kien it-tmiem (tal- biza') ta' dawk li giddbu (u caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin)

12.translation: GĂ„Â§id: 'Ta' min huwa kulma jinsab fis-smewwiet u fl- artf' GĂ„Â§id: 'Ta' Allal Huwa kiteb. gĂ„Â§alih innifsu l- Ă„Â§niena. Huwa tassew jigmagĂ„Â§kom gĂ„Â§al Jum il-Qawmien, li dwaru ma hemm ebda dubju. Dawk li tilfu rwieĂ„Â§hom, huma li ma jemmnux

13.translation: TiegĂ„Â§u kulma jinsab. fil-lejl u n-nhar, u Huwa jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

14.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): Jaqaw gĂ„Â§andi nieĂ„Â§u (lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) biex iĂ„Â§arisni gĂ„Â§ajr lil Alla, Ă„Â¦allieq is- smewwiet u l-art, meta Huwa li jitma', u ma huwiex mitmugĂ„Â§i' GĂ„Â§id: 'IngĂ„Â§atajt l-amar li nkun l-ewwel (wieĂ„Â§ed minn gensi) li nintelaq f'idejn Alla (bĂ„Â§ala Mislem), u (MuĂ„Â§ammad) ara ma tkunx minn dawk li jxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Allajf)

15.translation: GĂ„Â§id: 'Li kieku m'obdejtx lil Sidi, kont nibza' mill- kastig ta' Jum mill-kbar

16.translation: Dakinhar min jinĂ„Â§eles minnu (il-kastig), (Alla) ikun Ă„Â§enn gĂ„Â§alih, u dik tkun ir-rebĂ„Â§a fid-dieher

17.translation: Jekk Alla jmissek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) b'xi deni (bĂ„Â§al faqar jew mard), Ă„Â§add ma jwarrbu (minn fuqek) Ă„Â§liefu, u jekk imissek b'xi gid, (kun af li) Huwa fuq kollox SetgĂ„Â§an

18.translation: Huwa wkoll is-Sultan li jaĂ„Â§kem fuq il-qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§u, u Huwa l-GĂ„Â§aref u jaf sewwa (b'kollox)

19.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''X'inhu l-akbar bĂ„Â§ala xhieda (li jiena tassew il-MibgĂ„Â§ut ta' Alla) GĂ„Â§id: 'Alla (innifsu) jixhed bejni u bejnkom (li jiena l-Profeta tiegĂ„Â§u). Dan il-Qoran tnebbaĂ„Â§ lili biex inwissikom bih. (ilkom, nies Mekka) u lil min jasal (fost il-gnus, minn issa sa l-aĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar taz-zminijiet). Jaqaw tassew tixhdu li ma' Alla hemm allat oĂ„Â§ra 7' GĂ„Â§id: Ă˘â€šÂ¬Ma nixhidxi' GĂ„Â§id: ''Ma huwiex gĂ„Â§ajr Alla WieĂ„Â§ed, u jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq ma gĂ„Â§andix x'naqsam ma' dak li intom ixxierku (ma' Alla)f

20.translation: Dawk li tajniehom il-Ktieb (il-Lhud u l-Insara) jafuh (lil MuĂ„Â§ammad) bĂ„Â§alma jafu lil uliedhom. Dawk li tilfu lilhom infushom (gĂ„Â§aliex m emmnux lil MuĂ„Â§ammad) ma jemmnux

21.translation: Min huwa eĂ„Â§zen minn min jaqla' l-gideb dwar Alla, jew li jgiddeb is-sinjali tiegĂ„Â§u. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-Ă„Â§ziena ma jkunux rebbiĂ„Â§in

22.translation: Fil-Jum li nigbruhom ilkoll, se ngĂ„Â§idu lil dawk li xierku: Fejn. huma. l-ixirka tagĂ„Â§kom (li xeriktuhom. miegĂ„Â§i), li kontu tgĂ„Â§idu (li gĂ„Â§andkom)

23.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad ma jkollhomx skuza (i gidba oĂ„Â§ra) Ă„Â§lief li jgĂ„Â§idu (b'Ă„Â§alfa falza): 'NaĂ„Â§ilfu fuq Alla Sidna li aĂ„Â§na ma konniex minn dawk li jxierkul

24.translation: Ara (MuĂ„Â§ammad) kif gidbu kontra tagĂ„Â§hom infushom, izda (issa) telquhom dawk (l-allat foloz) li kienu jivvintaw (u sfaw waĂ„Â§idhom, mingĂ„Â§ajr gĂ„Â§ajnuna)

25.translation: Hemm minnhom li jisimgĂ„Â§uk, izda AĂ„Â§na qegĂ„Â§edna velijiet fuq qlubhom biex ma jifhmuhx. (kliemek), u tarraxnielhom: widnejhom. U jekk jaraw kull. sinjal (mingĂ„Â§andna), huma ma jemmnux fih (gĂ„Â§aliex webbsu rashom. wisq). SaĂ„Â§ansitra meta jiguk. biex. iĂ„Â§aqquha miegĂ„Â§ek, dawk li ma jemmnux jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Dawn ma humiex gĂ„Â§ajr l-istejjer ta' nies il-qedemi

26.translation: Huma jzommu (lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) minnu (il-Qoran), u lilhom infushom. (ukoll) izommu minnu, Huma (b'hekk) ma jeqirdux gĂ„Â§ajr lilhom infushom, izda ma jintebĂ„Â§ux

27.translation: Likieku kellek tara (MuĂ„Â§ammad), meta jitwaqqfu fuq in- Nar u jgĂ„Â§idu: '(JaĂ„Â§asra) mhux li konna nintbagĂ„Â§tu lura tfid-dinjajt (Zgur li) ma ngiddbux (aktar) is-sinjali ta' Sidna, u nkunu minn dawk li jemmnut

28.translation: Le, (kollu gĂ„Â§alxejnjt (Dakinhar ta' Jum' il-Gudizzju) jidhrilhom dak (kollu) li qabel kienu jaĂ„Â§bu. Izda li kieku jintbagĂ„Â§tu lura (fid-dinja, xorta waĂ„Â§da) jerggĂ„Â§u lura gĂ„Â§al dak li tqabbdu jzommu 'l bogĂ„Â§od minnu, gĂ„Â§aliex huma tabilĂ„Â§aqq giddibin

29.translation: Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Ma hawnx Ă„Â§lief Ă„Â§ajjitna fid-dinja, u m'aĂ„Â§niex se nitqajmu (mill-mewt)

30.translation: Li kellek tara meta jitwaqqfu (imwerwrin) quddiem Sidhoml Huwa jgĂ„Â§id: 'Jaqaw dan ma huwiex tassew) Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Mela, (dan) naĂ„Â§ilfuh fuq Sidnat' Huwa jgĂ„Â§id: ''Mela duqu l-kastig, talli m'emmintuxf

31.translation: Tellifin huma dawk li giddbu l-laqgĂ„Â§a ma' Alla (f'Jum il-Gudizzju). ImbagĂ„Â§ad meta s-siegĂ„Â§a (ta' din il-laqgĂ„Â§a) tigi fuqhom gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda, huma jgĂ„Â§idu: 'JaĂ„Â§asra gĂ„Â§alina, (mitlufin aĂ„Â§na), gĂ„Â§aliex ma tajniex kasha (din is- siegĂ„Â§a tal-biza'ji' Huma jgorru t-toqol tagĂ„Â§hom fuq daharhom. Tassew Ă„Â§azin dak li jgorrul)

32.translation: Il-Ă„Â§ajja ta' (din) id-dinja ma hijiex gĂ„Â§ajr logĂ„Â§ob u mogĂ„Â§dija ta' zmien. Id-Dar (fil-Ă„Â§ajja) l-OĂ„Â§ra aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§al dawk li gĂ„Â§andhom il-biza' ta' Alla. Mela ma gĂ„Â§andkomx gĂ„Â§aqal (biex tifhmu)

33.translation: Nafu tajjeb li dak li qegĂ„Â§din jgĂ„Â§idu jnikktek (MuĂ„Â§ammad). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li huma mhux lilek qegĂ„Â§din igiddbu, izda l-Ă„Â§ziena jicĂ„Â§du s-sinjali ta' Alla

34.translation: MibgĂ„Â§utin. (oĂ„Â§ra) qablek tgiddbu: huma stabru, meta tgiddbu u twegggĂ„Â§u, sa ma giethom l-gĂ„Â§ajnuna tagĂ„Â§na. Xejn ma jista' jbiddel Kliem Alla. Waslitlek tassew aĂ„Â§bar il-MibgĂ„Â§utin (li gew qablek)

35.translation: Jekk huwa kbir (it-toqol) gĂ„Â§alik minĂ„Â§abba li-ma jridux jafu (bl-Islam). jekk tista' tfittex mogĂ„Â§dija taĂ„Â§t l-art, jew sellum fis-sema, u ggibilhom xi sinjal (xorta waĂ„Â§da ma jkun jiswa xejn biex iccaqlaghom). Li kieku jrid, Alla jigborhom fit-triq it-tajba. Mela la tkunux mill-injurantil

36.translation: Dawk biss. li jisimgĂ„Â§u ( 4 jfittxu s-sewwa) jistgĂ„Â§u jwiegbu. Il-mejtin Alla jqajjimhom, imbagĂ„Â§ad lejh jitregggĂ„Â§u lura

37.translation: U jgĂ„Â§idu: ''GĂ„Â§aliex ma tnizzillux (til MuĂ„Â§ammad) sinjal minn: Sidu (u konna: nemmnuhjI' GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): '' TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla gĂ„Â§andu s-setgĂ„Â§a jnizzel sinjal, izda Ă„Â§afna minnhom ma jafux

38.translation: Ma hemmx Ă„Â§liqa fl-art u lanqas tajra li ttir bi gwenĂ„Â§ajha li ma humiex gnus bĂ„Â§alkom. Ma qabzilna xejn mill-Ktieb, u mbagĂ„Â§ad lejn Sidhom jingabru

39.translation: Dawk li giddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na huma torox u mbikkma (u jinsabu) fid-dlamijiet. Alla jtellef it-triq lil min irid, u lil min irid iqiegĂ„Â§du fit-triq id-dritta

40.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'X'taĂ„Â§sbu, li kieku jigikom il-kastig ta' Alla, jew. tigikom is-siegĂ„Â§a (ta' Jum il- Gudizzju: taĂ„Â§sbu (li) issejĂ„Â§u lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or (gĂ„Â§all- gĂ„Â§ajnuna), gĂ„Â§ajr lil Alla, jekk tassew qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu s- sewwa

41.translation: Le, (zgur li ma tagĂ„Â§mlux hekk, anzi) lilu (biss) issejĂ„Â§u, u jekk irid, jeĂ„Â§lisfkom) minn dak li (minĂ„Â§abba fih) issejĂ„Â§ulu. U (imbagĂ„Â§ad) tinsew dawk (l-allat fiergĂ„Â§a) li xxierku (miegĂ„Â§u)

42.translation: AĂ„Â§na bgĂ„Â§atna (MibgĂ„Â§utin) lil-gnus (oĂ„Â§ra) qablek, u (lil dawn il-gnus) Ă„Â§adniehom bit-taĂ„Â§bit u l-Ă„Â§sara, biex forsi jitolbu b'umilta

43.translation: Mhux li talbu b'umilta meta giehom it-taĂ„Â§bit tagĂ„Â§na, izda qlubhom ibbiesu, u x-Xitan zejnilhom dak li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

44.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad meta nsew dak li kienu mwissijin bih, ftaĂ„Â§na fuqhom il-bwieb (tal-gid) ta' kull Ă„Â§aga, sa ma (fl-aqwa) tal-ferĂ„Â§ tagĂ„Â§hom b'dak li kienu ngĂ„Â§ataw (mingĂ„Â§andna) Ă„Â§adniehom gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda, hekk li (issa) huma qatgĂ„Â§u qalbhom gĂ„Â§al kollox

45.translation: B'hekk inqata' (u gie fix-xejn) dak li baqa' minn gens il-Ă„Â§ziena. TifĂ„Â§ir lil Alla Sid il-Ă„Â§olqient

46.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad lil nies Mekka): 'X'taĂ„Â§sbu, li kieku Alla jeĂ„Â§dilkom is-smigĂ„Â§. tagĂ„Â§kom u dawl gĂ„Â§ajnejkom, u jqiegĂ„Â§ed sigill fuq qlubkom, liema alla, gĂ„Â§ajr Alla, iroddhomlkom lura 7' Ara kif infissru(/hom) is-sinjali (tagĂ„Â§na), imbagĂ„Â§ad (ma jagĂ„Â§tux kas u) jitilqu 'l hemm

47.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): ''X'taĂ„Â§sbu, li kieku jigikom il-kastig ta' Alla gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda jew fid-dieher; min jinqered, Ă„Â§lief in- nies il-Ă„Â§zienat

48.translation: AĂ„Â§na ma nibagĂ„Â§tux lill-MibgĂ„Â§utin jekk mhux biex jagĂ„Â§tu l-bxara u biex iwissu. Mela min jemmen u jibdel Ă„Â§ajtu gĂ„Â§at-tajjeb, (dawk) ma hemm ebda biza' fuqhom u lanqas jitnikktu

49.translation: U dawk li jgiddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na (gĂ„Â§ad) imisshom il- kastig tal-Ă„Â§azen li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

50.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfiihom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''M'iniex. ngĂ„Â§idilkom li gĂ„Â§andi. l-Ă„Â§azniet. tat-tezori ta' Alla, la naf il-Ă„Â§wejjeg mistura, u lanqas ngĂ„Â§idilkom li jiena anglu. Jiena nimxi biss fuq dak li tnebbaĂ„Â§ lili' GĂ„Â§id(i/hom): 'Jaqaw l- agĂ„Â§ma u min jara huma ndaqs 7 Mela ma tixtarrux (dan il-kliem)

51.translation: Wissi bih (dan il-Qoran) lil dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u li jingabru Iejn Sidhom: ma gĂ„Â§andhomx Ă„Â§liefu min iĂ„Â§arishom jew jidĂ„Â§ol gĂ„Â§alihom, biex forsi jkollhom il-biza' ta' Alla

52.translation: U la tkeccix (lill-imsejknin' minn Ă„Â§dejk). li jsejĂ„Â§u. lil Sidhom filgĂ„Â§odu u filgĂ„Â§axija, u jfittxu lil Wiccu. Inti ma' gĂ„Â§andek x'taqsam xejn mal-kont tagĂ„Â§hom ((i jridu jagĂ„Â§tu lil Alla, u m'intix responsabbli gĂ„Â§alihom), u. huma ma gĂ„Â§andhom x'jaqsmu xejn mal-kont tiegĂ„Â§ek ((i rrid tagĂ„Â§ti lil Alla). Jekk tkeccihom, tkun mill-Ă„Â§ziena

53.translation: B'hekk ingarrbu(hom lill-foqra 1v lill-gĂ„Â§onja) b'xulxin, hekk li (il-kbarat) jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Jaqaw dawn (il-far u l- imsejknin huma n-nies) fostna li Alla wera t-tjieba tiegĂ„Â§u magĂ„Â§hom (u wriehom it-triq ta' l-Islam) 77 Mela mhux Alla jaf l-aktar b'dawk li jizzu Ă„Â§ajr

54.translation: U meta jiguk dawk li jemmnu fis-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na, gĂ„Â§id(ilhom): 'Sliem. gĂ„Â§alikoml Sidkom kiteb. gĂ„Â§alih innifsu l-Ă„Â§niena, (hekk li) min minnkom jagĂ„Â§mel xi deni bla ma jaf, imbagĂ„Â§ad wara jindem u jibdel Ă„Â§ajtu gĂ„Â§at- tajjeb, Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

55.translation: Hekk infissru bir-reqqa r-Rivelazzjoni, biex tidher bic- car triq il-Ă„Â§atjin

56.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Jiena mwissi biex ma nqimx lil dawk li intom issejĂ„Â§u minflok Alla'' GĂ„Â§idfi/hom ukoll): Ma nimxix wara xewqatkom (gĂ„Â§aliex inkella) inkun Ă„Â§rigt mit-triq, u ma nkunx minn dawk li jinsabu fit- triq it-tajba. ' A

57.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom): 'Jiena (noqgĂ„Â§od) fuq dak li ntwera bic- car minn Sidi, izda intom (is-sewwa) giddibtuh. Jiena ma gĂ„Â§andix dak (il-kastig) li intom mgĂ„Â§agglin gĂ„Â§alih. Id- decizjoni hija ta' Alla biss. Huwa jĂ„Â§abbar il-Ă„Â§aqq, u Huwa l-AĂ„Â§jar fost dawk li jiddeciedu

58.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): ''Li kieku gĂ„Â§andi dak (il-kastig) li intom mgĂ„Â§agglin gĂ„Â§alih, il-kwistjoni kienet tkun maqtugĂ„Â§a bejni u bejnkom. Izda Alla jaf l-aktar bil-Ă„Â§ziena

59.translation: GĂ„Â§andu jinsabu l-imfietaĂ„Â§ tal-Ă„Â§wejjeg mistura, u Ă„Â§add Ă„Â§liefu ma jaf bihom. Huwa jaf b'dak li hemm fl-art u fil- baĂ„Â§ar, u ma taqax werqa li ma jafx biha, lanqas zerriegĂ„Â§a fid-dlamijiet ta' l-art, u ebda Ă„Â§aga ratba (/i gĂ„Â§adha tĂ„Â§addar) jew iebsa (li dbielet), li ma hijiex (imnizzla). fi Ktieb car

60.translation: Huwa li jeĂ„Â§dilkom. irwieĂ„Â§kom billejl, u jaf b'dak. li gĂ„Â§amiltu binhar, imbagĂ„Â§ad iqajjimkom fih (fl-istess jum) biex jingieb fi tmiemu z-zmien fiss. ImbagĂ„Â§ad gĂ„Â§andu terggĂ„Â§u lura, u mbagĂ„Â§ad jgĂ„Â§arrafkom b'dak li kontu tagĂ„Â§mlu

61.translation: Huwa Dak li Ă„Â§add ma jista' gĂ„Â§alih, (Zi jaĂ„Â§kem) fuq il- qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§u. Huwa jibagĂ„Â§tilkom fangii) li jzommu kont (ta' kulma tagĂ„Â§mlu), biex meta l-mewt tigi gĂ„Â§and xi Ă„Â§add minnkom, il-MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§na (l-angli) jeĂ„Â§dulu ruĂ„Â§u, u huma ma jonqsu qatt (minn dmirhom lejn Alla u lejn il- bnedmin)

62.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad (il-qaddejja) jintraddu lura gĂ„Â§and Alla, il-Mulej tagĂ„Â§hom, is-Sewwa. TiegĂ„Â§u biss id-decizjoni, u Huwa l- eĂ„Â§fef fost dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu l-kontijiet

63.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Min jeĂ„Â§liskom mid-dlamijiet ta' l-art u l-baĂ„Â§ar 7 Intom issejĂ„Â§ulu (lil Sidkom) b'umilta u fis-satra (i tgĂ„Â§idu hekk): 'Jekk jeĂ„Â§lisna minn dan fis- saram), tassew inkunu minn dawk li jizzu Ă„Â§ajr

64.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): ''Alla jeĂ„Â§liskom minnu, u minn kull diqa. ImbagĂ„Â§ad intom ixxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Allajf)

65.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom): 'Huwa gĂ„Â§andu s-setgĂ„Â§a jibagĂ„Â§tilkom kastig minn fuqkom (bĂ„Â§all-beraq, l-gĂ„Â§argĂ„Â§ar, l-irwiefen, jew il- lava mill-vulkani), jew minn taĂ„Â§t riglejkom (OĂ„Â§at-thezziziet ta' l-art), jew li jĂ„Â§awwadkom u tinqasmu f'gemgĂ„Â§at, u jdewwaq uĂ„Â§ud minnkom il-Ă„Â§ruxija ta' l-oĂ„Â§rajn.' Ara kif infissru(lhom) is-sinjali (tagĂ„Â§na) biex forsi jifhmu

66.translation: Izda niesek (il-Qurajxin) caĂ„Â§duh (il-Qoran), minkejja li huwa s-sewwa. GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Jiena ma gĂ„Â§andix setgĂ„Â§a fuqkom (biex immexxikom fit-triq id- dritta)

67.translation: Kull aĂ„Â§bar (li tigi mingĂ„Â§and Alla) gĂ„Â§andha zmienha, u se tkunu tafu (ma ddumux, x'kastig imisskom)l

68.translation: U meta tara lil-dawk li jitkellmu fieragĂ„Â§ dwar is-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na, warrab. minnhom, sa ma jaqbdu kliem ieĂ„Â§or. Li kellu x-Xitan (xi darba) inessik, meta terga' tiftakar, la toqgĂ„Â§odx man-nies il-Ă„Â§ziena

69.translation: Dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla ma gĂ„Â§andhomx x'jaqsmu mal-kont tagĂ„Â§hom (tal-Ă„Â§ziena, li jridu jagĂ„Â§tu lil-Alla), izda (gĂ„Â§andhom biss) ifakkruhom), biex forsi jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla

70.translation: U itlaq (MuĂ„Â§ammad) lil dawk li jieĂ„Â§du r-religjon tagĂ„Â§hom bil-logĂ„Â§ob u b'mogĂ„Â§dija ta' zmien, u lil dawk li l-Ă„Â§ajja (f'din) id-dinja qarrqet bihom (hekk li Ă„Â§asbu li ma hemmx Ă„Â§ajja oĂ„Â§ra). U fakkar bih, (b'dan il-Ktieb, lill- bnedmin) li r-ruĂ„Â§ tinqered minĂ„Â§abba dak li tkun kisbet (b'gĂ„Â§emilha), u ma. jkollha lil Ă„Â§add, gĂ„Â§ajr lil-Alla, li jĂ„Â§arisha jew li jidĂ„Â§ol gĂ„Â§aliha. Li kellha (din ir-ruĂ„Â§) tagĂ„Â§ti kull fidwa (biex tinfeda), ma titteĂ„Â§idx minnha. Dawk huma li jsibu l-qerda tagĂ„Â§hom minĂ„Â§abba dak li kisbu (b'gĂ„Â§emilhom). Ix-xorb tagĂ„Â§hom ikun ilma jismot u kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§, gĂ„Â§aliex kienu jicĂ„Â§du lil Alla

71.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): (Jaqaw se nsejĂ„Â§u lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or, flok lil Alla; lil dak (l-idolu tal-gebel) li la (jista') ikunilna ta' fejda u lanqas: (jista') ikunilna ta' Ă„Â§sara, u nerggĂ„Â§u lura gĂ„Â§alli konna qabel (pagani) wara li Alla wriena t-triq, ( 2 nkunu) bĂ„Â§al dak li x-xjaten gennuh (u blieh hekk li jterraq) fl-art mitluf' Huwa gĂ„Â§andu sĂ„Â§abu jsejĂ„Â§ulu lejn it-tmexxija t-tajba (u jgĂ„Â§idulu): 'Ejja gĂ„Â§andna.'' GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Ma hemmx. tmexxija tajba gĂ„Â§ajr dik ta' Alla, u aĂ„Â§na Ă„Â§adna l-amar li gĂ„Â§andna nintelqu f'idejn Alla Sid il-Ă„Â§olqien

72.translation: u (intqal lilna) agĂ„Â§mlu t-talb, u ibzgĂ„Â§u minnu (A/la) gĂ„Â§aliex Huwa Dak li gĂ„Â§andu gĂ„Â§ad tingabru

73.translation: Huwalli Ă„Â§alaq is-smewwiet u l-art bis-sewwa, u fil-jum li jgĂ„Â§id: 'Kunf' (kollox) ikun. Kliemu huwa s-sewwa, TiegĂ„Â§u s-saltna dakinhar li tindaqq it-trumbetta (u jqumu l-mejtin gĂ„Â§all-Gudizzju). Huwa jaf il-mistur u dak li jidher. Huwa l-GĂ„Â§aref u jaf sewwa (b'kollox)

74.translation: (Ftakar MuĂ„Â§ammad) meta Abraham qal lil missieru Azar: 'Jaqaw int tieĂ„Â§u l-idoli bĂ„Â§ala allat Jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq qed nara li inti u niesek tinsabu f'telfien mill-aktar car

75.translation: Hekk ukoll urejna lil Abraham is-saltna tas-smewwiet u l-art biex ikun minn dawk li jemmnu bis-sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§

76.translation: U meta l-lejl gĂ„Â§atta fuqu, ra kewkba u qal: 'Dan sidil' Izda meta (il-kewkba) gĂ„Â§ebet (wara x-xefaq), huwa qal: Ă˘â€šÂ¬Ma nĂ„Â§obbx dawk li jgĂ„Â§ibu

77.translation: U meta ra l-qamar tiela' qal: ''Dan sidif' Izda meta (il- qamar); gĂ„Â§eb (wara x-xefaq), huwa qal: ''Jekk Sidi ma huwiex se jmexxini, tassew se nkun minn dawk li tilfu t- triq

78.translation: U meta ra x-xemx tielgĂ„Â§a qal: 'Dan sidi, dan akbar (mill-kwiekeb u l-qamar)i' Izda meta (ix-xemx) nizlet qal: 'Ja niesi, jiena ma gĂ„Â§andix x'naqsam mal-qima li qegĂ„Â§din tagĂ„Â§tu lill-allat foloz

79.translation: GĂ„Â§aliex jiena dawwart wicci, kollni twemmin safi, lejn Dak li Ă„Â§alaq is-smewwiet u l-art, u m'iniex minn dawk li jxierku allat foloz ma' Alla

80.translation: Niesu Ă„Â§aqquha miegĂ„Â§u u qal(i/hom): ''Qed tĂ„Â§aqquha miegĂ„Â§i fuq Alla meta Huwa (innifsu) urieni t-triq 2 Jiena ma nibzax minn dawk (l-allat foloz) illi xxierku miegĂ„Â§u, Ă„Â§lief jekk Sidi jkun irid li xi Ă„Â§aga (isseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§). Sidi jesa' l- gĂ„Â§arfien ta' kollox; Mela kif ma tiftakrux (f'dawn ir- twissijiet)

81.translation: U kif nibza' minn dak li xxierku (ma' Alla) filwaqt li intom ma tibzgĂ„Â§ux ixxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra) ma' Alla, mingĂ„Â§ajr ma nizzlilkom il-permess li tagĂ„Â§mlu dan Mela liema miz-zewg gemgĂ„Â§at (tagĂ„Â§kom il-pagani u tagĂ„Â§na l- Misilmin) jistĂ„Â§oqqilha l-akbar Ă„Â§arsien u sliem. (minn Alla), jekk (tassew) tafu

82.translation: (Hija l-gemgĂ„Â§a ta' dawk) li jemmnu u li ma jĂ„Â§awdux it- twemmin tagĂ„Â§hom bil-Ă„Â§azen; tagĂ„Â§hom huwa l-Ă„Â§arsien u. s-sliem (vzinn Alla), u jinsabu fit-triq it-tajba

83.translation: Din kienet il-prova li tajna lil Abraham kontra niesu, AĂ„Â§na ngĂ„Â§ollu fi gradi (ta' gĂ„Â§erf u gieĂ„Â§) lil-min irridu, TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidek GĂ„Â§aref u jaf b'kollox

84.translation: (Lil Abraham) tajnieh lil Izakk u lil-Gakobb, u Ikoll urejniehom it-triq it-tajba. Qabel, konna wrejna t-triq lil Noc, u minn nislu (nisel Abraham) hemm David, Salamun, Gob, Guzeppi, Mosc u Aron; hekk inĂ„Â§allsu lil dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

85.translation: u Zakkarija, Gwanni, Gest u Elija, kollha mill-gusti

86.translation: uiIsmagĂ„Â§el, Elizew, Gona, u Lot: kollha ppreferejniehom mill-Ă„Â§olqien (ta' zmienhom)

87.translation: u (mexxejna wkoll oĂ„Â§rajn) minn fost missirijiethom, minn. nisilhom, u minn Ă„Â§uthom, u gĂ„Â§azilniehom u qabbadniehom triq dritta

88.translation: Dik hija t-tmexxija t-tajba ta' Alla; biha jmexxi lil-min irid mill-qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§u. Li kieku xierku (allar foloz ma' Alla), ma kien jiswielhom xejn dak li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

89.translation: Dawk kienu li tajniehom il-Ktieb, l-gĂ„Â§erf u l-profezija. Jekk dawn (li huma mnissla minnhom) ma jemmnux fihom (il-messaggi), AĂ„Â§na tassew ngĂ„Â§adduhom lil gens (ieĂ„Â§or, dak tal-Misilmin) li ma huwiex se jicĂ„Â§adhom

90.translation: Dawk huma li Alla mexxa fit-triq it-tajba, u inti (MuĂ„Â§ammad) imxi fi triqithom. GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): M'iniex nitlobkom Ă„Â§las ta' dan (/i qiegĂ„Â§ed inxandar). Dan (il- Qoran) ma huwiex Ă„Â§lief tifkira (v twissija) lill-Ă„Â§olqien

91.translation: Ma jagĂ„Â§tux gieĂ„Â§ lil-Alla kif jixraqlu meta (il-Lhud) jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Alla ma nizzel xejn (ut ebda rivelazzjoni) fuq il- bniedem. ' GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): ''Min nizzel il-Ktieb li gab Mosc dawl u tmexxija tajba lill-bnedmin 7: GĂ„Â§amiltuh (f'gĂ„Â§amla) ta' karti biex turuhom, filwaqt li taĂ„Â§bu Ă„Â§afna (minnhom, l-aktar it-taqsimiet li jsemmu l-profezija ta' MuĂ„Â§ammad). (B'dan il-Qoran) intom kontu mgĂ„Â§allma dak li la intom u lanqas missirijietkom ma kontu tafu. GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): 'Alla (nizzel dan il-Ktieb)f' imbagĂ„Â§ad Ă„Â§allihom jagĂ„Â§tuha gĂ„Â§al-logĂ„Â§ob

92.translation: U dan huwa Ktieb li nizzilnieh, imbierek, u jseddaq dak li (nizel) qablu; biex twissi (MuĂ„Â§ammad) lil Omm il-Bliet (Mekka) u lil dawk ta' madwarha. U dawk li jemmnu fl- OĂ„Â§ra (fil-Ă„Â¦ajja l-OĂ„Â§ra), jemmnu fih u jĂ„Â§arsu t-talb tagĂ„Â§hom

93.translation: U min hu agĂ„Â§ar minn dak li qala' l-gideb dwar Alla, jew li qal: 'Kont imnebbaĂ„Â§,' meta xejn ma tnebbaĂ„Â§ lilu, jew (agĂ„Â§ar) minn dak li qal: ''Se nnizzel bĂ„Â§al dak li nizzel Allaf' Li kellek tara l-Ă„Â§ziena fl-agunija tal-mewt, filwaqt li l-angli jmiddu idejhom (u jgĂ„Â§idu): 'OĂ„Â§orgu rwieĂ„Â§kom (minn gisimkom) Illum titĂ„Â§allsu bil-kastig ta' tkasbir talli ma kontux tgĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa dwar Alla, u fil- kburija tagĂ„Â§kom kontu ticĂ„Â§du (u rmaqdru) is-sinjali tiegĂ„Â§u

94.translation: U issa gejtu gĂ„Â§andna, kull wieĂ„Â§ed gĂ„Â§al rasu, bĂ„Â§alma Ă„Â§laqniekom l-ewwel darba, u Ă„Â§allejtu dak (kollu) li tajniekom wara daharkom. M'aĂ„Â§niex naraw magĂ„Â§kom lil dawk (l-allat) li jidĂ„Â§lu gĂ„Â§alikom, li kontu tgĂ„Â§idu li kienu sĂ„Â§ab magĂ„Â§kom. Issa (ir-rabta) bejnietkom inqatgĂ„Â§et, u telaqkom dak li kontu tallegaw

95.translation: Alla. tabilĂ„Â§aqq jaqsam iz-zerriegĂ„Â§a (tal-qamĂ„Â§ fil- Ă„Â§amrija) u l-gĂ„Â§adam (tat-tamar biex minnu. tinbet ix- xitla). Huwa joĂ„Â§rog il-Ă„Â§aj mill-mejjet, u joĂ„Â§rog il-mejjet mill-Ă„Â§aj. Dak huwa Alla' Mela kif titqarrqu

96.translation: Huwalli jifred is-sebĂ„Â§ (mil-lejl), u jagĂ„Â§mel il-lejl Ă„Â§emda (gĂ„Â§all-mistrieĂ„Â§), u x-xemx u l-qamar gĂ„Â§all-gĂ„Â§add (tal- jiem). Dak huwa l-qjies ta' (Alla) il-Qawwi, li jaf kollox

97.translation: Huwa li gĂ„Â§amlilkom il-kwiekeb biex timxu magĂ„Â§hom fid- dlamijiet ta' l-art u tal-baĂ„Â§ar. AĂ„Â§na fissirna bir-reqqa s-sinjali (tagĂ„Â§na) lil nies li jafu

98.translation: Kien Huwa li Ă„Â§arigkom minn ruĂ„Â§ waĂ„Â§da (Adam, u takom) fejn toqogĂ„Â§du u tistrieĂ„Â§u. AĂ„Â§na fissimma bir-reqqa s-sinjali (tagĂ„Â§na) lil nies li jifhmu

99.translation: Huwa wkoll dak li jnizzel ilma mis-sema. Bih Ă„Â§rigna kull gĂ„Â§amla ta' Ă„Â§dura: minnu Ă„Â§rigna l-Ă„Â§xejjex li jnibbtu zerriegĂ„Â§a magĂ„Â§quda, u. mis-sigar tal-palm, mill-friegĂ„Â§i tagĂ„Â§ha, jiddendlu l-gĂ„Â§enieqed tat-tamar, u (Ă„Â§rigna wkoll) Gonna ta' gĂ„Â§eneb, zebbug u rummien, jixxiebhu (fid- dehra tal-weraq tagĂ„Â§hom), izda ma humiex bĂ„Â§al xulxin (fit-togĂ„Â§ma). Ă„Â¦arsu lejn il-frott tagĂ„Â§hom: (minn meta jiftaĂ„Â§ iz-zahar sa) meta joĂ„Â§rog il-frott (u jkun gĂ„Â§adu nej), u meta jsir sew (u joĂ„Â§la, u jsir tajjeb: gĂ„Â§all-ikel). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li f'dan (kollu) hemm: sinjali gĂ„Â§al nies. li jemmnu

100.translation: Izda (il-Ă„Â§ziena) ixierku lil Alla mal-ginn,' gĂ„Â§alkemm Huwa Ă„Â§alaqhom, u qalgĂ„Â§uha li gĂ„Â§andu (ulied), subien u bniet, mingĂ„Â§ajr ma jafu. SebĂ„Â§ lilul Huwa wisq ogĂ„Â§la minn dak (il-kliem fieragĂ„Â§) li jgĂ„Â§idu (dwarujl)

101.translation: Huwa li Ă„Â§alaq gĂ„Â§all-ewwel darba s-smewwiet u l-art; ( 4ila) kif ikollu iben meta ma kellux sieĂ„Â§ba U Ă„Â§alaq kollox, u Huwa jaf b'kollox

102.translation: Dak huwa Alla Sidkom. Ma hemmx alla ieĂ„Â§or Ă„Â§liefu, il-Ă„Â¦allieq ta' kollox. Mela qimuhl Huwa jieĂ„Â§u Ă„Â§sieb kollox

103.translation: Il-Ă„Â§ars ma jilĂ„Â§qux, izda Huwa jilĂ„Â§aq il-Ă„Â§ars, u Huwa jinfed f'kollox, u jaf sew b'kollox

104.translation: Tassew gewkom provi minn Sidkom' (/i jgĂ„Â§inukom tiftĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§ajnejkom). Mela min jara, ikun gĂ„Â§al(l-gid) tiegĂ„Â§u nnifsu, u min jagĂ„Â§ma, (ikun) gĂ„Â§all-Ă„Â§sara tiegĂ„Â§u (innifsu), Jiena (bĂ„Â§ala l-Profeta MuĂ„Â§ammad) m'iniex gĂ„Â§assies fuqkom

105.translation: Hekk infissru s-sinjali (tagĂ„Â§na) biex jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Inti (MuĂ„Â§ammad) studjajt ' u biex dan nuruh bic-car lil nies li jafu

106.translation: Imxi (MuĂ„Â§ammad) fuq dak (il-Qoran) li tnebbaĂ„Â§lek minn Sidek; ma hemmx alla ieĂ„Â§or Ă„Â§liefu. U warrab minn dawk li jxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla)

107.translation: Li kieku Alla ried,. ma kinux ixierku. AĂ„Â§na ma gĂ„Â§amilniekx (MuĂ„Â§ammad) gĂ„Â§assies fuqhom, u ma gĂ„Â§andekx setgĂ„Â§a fuqhom

108.translation: U latgĂ„Â§ajrux lil dawk (l-allar) li (dawk li ma jemmmix) isejĂ„Â§u minflok lil Alla, biex ma jgĂ„Â§ajrux lil-Alla, b'ingustizzja u bla ma jafu. Hekk zejjinna, gĂ„Â§al kull gens, l-gĂ„Â§emil tiegĂ„Â§u. ImbagĂ„Â§ad gĂ„Â§and Sidhom imorru lura, u jĂ„Â§abbrilhom dak li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

109.translation: Huma (nies Mekka) Ă„Â§alfu b'Alla, bl-aqwa Ă„Â§alf tagĂ„Â§hom, li jekk jigihom sinjal, huma tassew jemmnu fih. GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Is-sinjali huma f'idejn Alla biss. Izda xi jgegĂ„Â§elkom tkunu tafu li, (anki) jekk (is- sinjali) tassew jigufhom), huma (xorta waĂ„Â§da jibqgĂ„Â§u) majemmnuxi

110.translation: AĂ„Â§na nqallbu (u nĂ„Â§awdulhom) qlubhom u dawl gĂ„Â§ajnejhom (hekk li jitbiegĂ„Â§du mit-twemmin), bĂ„Â§al meta m'emmnux f'dan (il-Qoran) ma' l-ewwel darba, u nĂ„Â§alluhom mitlufin bĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§omja fil-Ă„Â§tija kbira tagĂ„Â§hom

111.translation: Li kieku nizzilnielhom l-angli, kellmuhom il-mejtin, u gbarna kollox quddiemhom, (xorta waĂ„Â§da) ma. kinux jemmnu, Ă„Â§lief jekk Alla jrid. Izda Ă„Â§afna minnhom ma jafux (dan)

112.translation: Hekk ukoll gĂ„Â§amilna gĂ„Â§adu (kiefer) gĂ„Â§al kull Profeta (biex igarrbu): xjaten minn fost il-bnedmin u l-ginn, li jnebbĂ„Â§u lil xulxin. bil-qerq, kliem sabiĂ„Â§ (izda kollu Ă„Â§azen). Li Kieku Sidek ried, ma kinux jagĂ„Â§mluh (dan). Mela itlaqhom gĂ„Â§all-qlajja' tagĂ„Â§hom

113.translation: Ă„Â¦alli qlub dawk li ma jemmnux fil-Ă„Â¦ajja l-OĂ„Â§ra jmilu lejh (dan il-qerq) u jitgĂ„Â§axxqu bih, biex jibqgĂ„Â§u jiksbu (l- gĂ„Â§emejjel tal-Ă„Â§azen) li qegĂ„Â§din jiksbu

114.translation: Jaqaw gĂ„Â§andi nfittex imĂ„Â§allef (ieĂ„Â§or) gĂ„Â§ajr Alla, meta Huwa. li nizzlilkom il-Ktieb. (il-Qoran), imfisser bir- reqqa. U dawk (il-Lhud u l-Insara li qabel) tajniehom il- Ktieb jafu li huwa mnizzel minn Sidek bis-sewwa. Mela la tkunux minn ta' bejn Ă„Â§alltejn

115.translation: Kelmet Sidek laĂ„Â§qet il-milja tagĂ„Â§ha fis-sewwa u l-Ă„Â§aqq. Xejn u Ă„Â§add ma jista' jbiddel il-kelmiet tiegĂ„Â§u. Huwa jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

116.translation: U jekk toqgĂ„Â§od gĂ„Â§all-kotra (tal-bnedmin li ma jemmmux) li jinsabu fuq l-art, (tara li) itellfuk it-triq ta' Alla, Huma ma jimxux gĂ„Â§ajr fuq l-istĂ„Â§ajjil (tagĂ„Â§hom), u ma jaqilgĂ„Â§ux Ă„Â§lief gideb

117.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidek jaf sewwa b'min Ă„Â§areg minn triqtu; u Ă„Â§add daqsu ma jaf b'dawk li huma fit-triq it-tajba

118.translation: Mela kulu dak li fuqu ssemma Isem Alla, jekk temmnu fir-Rivelazzjoni tiegĂ„Â§u

119.translation: U gĂ„Â§aliex ma gĂ„Â§andkomx tieklu minn dak (il-laĂ„Â§am) li fuqu ssemma Isem Alla, meta huwa fissrilkom bir-reqqa dak li ma jiswiex gĂ„Â§alikom, Ă„Â§lief dak li kontu mgiegĂ„Â§la (tieklu) minĂ„Â§abba l-Ă„Â§tiega. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Ă„Â§afna jtellfu t-triq (lil. Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) minĂ„Â§abba x-xewqat fiergĂ„Â§a tagĂ„Â§hom, mingĂ„Â§ajr gĂ„Â§arfien. Tassew li Sidek l-aktar li jaf bil- midinbin li jaqbzu l-limiti

120.translation: Warrbu mill-Ă„Â§tija li tidher u (rzinn dik) li ma tidhirx. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§tija se jitĂ„Â§allsu ta' dak li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

121.translation: U la tiklux dak (il-/aĂ„Â§am) li fuqu ma ssemmiex Isem Alla (u li kien imĂ„Â§ejji gĂ„Â§all-idoli), gĂ„Â§aliex dan (l-gĂ„Â§emil) huwa tassew Ă„Â§azen; TabilĂ„Â§aqq li x-xjaten inebbĂ„Â§u: lil Ă„Â§biebhom biex iĂ„Â§aqquha magĂ„Â§kom. U jekk toqogĂ„Â§du gĂ„Â§alihom (il-pagani), tkunu minn dawk li jxierku

122.translation: Jaqaw min kien mejjet u tajnieh il-Ă„Â§ajja, u gĂ„Â§amilnielu dawl biex jimxi bih fost in-nies, huwa bĂ„Â§al min jinsab fid-dlamijiet, li ma huwiex Ă„Â§iereg minnhom 2 Hekk izzejjen lil dawk ta' bla twemmin dak (il-Ă„Â§azen) li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu (u dehrilhom sabiĂ„Â§)

123.translation: Hekk ukoll qegĂ„Â§edna f'kull belt l-agĂ„Â§ar kriminali tagĂ„Â§ha, biex inassu (ir jagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§azen) fiha, izda ma jnassux gĂ„Â§ajr kontra tagĂ„Â§hom' infushom, mingĂ„Â§ajr ma jintebĂ„Â§u

124.translation: Meta (/ill-pagani) jigihom sinjal (li juri s-sewwa ta' MuĂ„Â§ammad, tismagĂ„Â§hom) jgĂ„Â§idu: 'M'aĂ„Â§niex se nemmnu qabel ma ningĂ„Â§ataw (il-mirakli) bĂ„Â§al dawk li ngĂ„Â§ataw il- MibgĂ„Â§utin ta' Alla.' Alla jaf aktar (minnhom) fejn (u ma' min) iĂ„Â§alli: l-messagg tiegĂ„Â§u. Tkasbir. quddiem Alla. u kastig qalil se jolqtu lil-dawk li gĂ„Â§amlu l-Ă„Â§azen, talli kienu jnassu

125.translation: U lil-min. Alla jrid imexxi. fit-triq it-tajba, (arah) jiftaĂ„Â§(iu) sidru gĂ„Â§all-Islam, u lil-min irid itellfu t-triq, jagĂ„Â§millu sidru: dejjaq u magĂ„Â§luq bĂ„Â§allikieku. tiela' s- sema. Hekk Alla jixĂ„Â§et is-saĂ„Â§ta (f'din id-dinja ur l-kastig fl-OĂ„Â§ra) fuq dawk li ma jemmnux

126.translation: Din hija triq Sidek, dritta. AĂ„Â§na fissirna r-Rivelazzjoni (tagĂ„Â§na) bir-reqqa lil nies li jiftakru

127.translation: TagĂ„Â§hom hija Dar is-Sliem, gĂ„Â§and Sidhom, u Huwa jĂ„Â§arishom minĂ„Â§abba (it-tajjeb) li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

128.translation: Dakinhar li ( 41/a) jigborhom ilkoll (bnedmin u ginn, se jgĂ„Â§id): Intom. il-gemgĂ„Â§a. tal-ginn, Ă„Â§adtu Ă„Â§afna mill- bnedmin (gĂ„Â§az magĂ„Â§kom u fixkiluhom kemm flaĂ„Â§tu):' U tibiebhom' minn fost il-bnedmin. jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Sidna, aĂ„Â§na konna ta' fejda gĂ„Â§al xulxin, u (issa) ilĂ„Â§aqna z-zmien li rfajt gĂ„Â§alina'' Huwa jgĂ„Â§id: 'In-Nar ikun l-gĂ„Â§amara tagĂ„Â§kom, u fih tgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem, Ă„Â§lief dak li Alla jrid (li jkun iz-zmien li-ddumu fih).' TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidek GĂ„Â§aref u jaf kollox

129.translation: Hekk indawru wĂ„Â§ud mill-Ă„Â§ziena. kontra xulxin (b'kastig), minĂ„Â§abba dak (il-Ă„Â§azen) li kienu. jiksbu (b'gĂ„Â§emilhom)

130.translation: Cintom il-gemgĂ„Â§a tal-ginn u tal-bnedmin, jaqaw. ma gewkomx MibgĂ„Â§utin minn fostkom: li qalulkom bis- sinjali tiegĂ„Â§i, u wissewkom dwar il-laqgĂ„Â§a ta' dan il-Jum tagĂ„Â§komi' Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Nixhdu kontra tagĂ„Â§na nfusna (Ii aĂ„Â§na Ă„Â§atjin)i' Il-Ă„Â§ajja (f'din) id-dinja qarrqet bihom u huma jixhdu kontra tagĂ„Â§hom infushom li huma ma kinux jemmnu

131.translation: Dan minĂ„Â§abba li Sidek (ja MuĂ„Â§ammad) ma kienx jeqred il-bliet. (u. nieshom). b'mod ingust, filwaqt li nieshom ma jafux (bil-messagg ta' AIla)

132.translation: GĂ„Â§al kulĂ„Â§add hemm gradi (ta' tjieba u Ă„Â§azen), skond dak (l-gĂ„Â§emil) li gĂ„Â§amlu, u Sidek ma jaqbizlu xejn minn dak li jagĂ„Â§mlu

133.translation: U Sidek huwa l-GĂ„Â§ani, Kollu Ă„Â¦niena. Li kieku jrid, jeqridkom u jaĂ„Â§tar minflokkom dak li jrid, bĂ„Â§alma (kien Hu li) sawwarkom miz-zerriegĂ„Â§a ta' gens ieĂ„Â§or

134.translation: Dakli kien imwiegĂ„Â§ed lilkom tabilĂ„Â§aqq se jasal, u ma tistgĂ„Â§ux taĂ„Â§arbu (mir-rieda ta' Alla)

135.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Ja niesi, agĂ„Â§mlu kif tridu. (NgĂ„Â§id gĂ„Â§alija) jiena nagĂ„Â§mel (dak li qabbadni Alla), u se tkunu tafu min, fl-aĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar, se jkollu l-Ă„Â§las it-tajjeb tad-Dar (l- OĂ„Â§ra). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-Ă„Â§ziena ma jkunux rebbiĂ„Â§in

136.translation: U refgĂ„Â§u sehem gĂ„Â§al Alla mill-ucuĂ„Â§ tar-raba' u mill- frat li Huwa Ă„Â§alaq, u qalu: ''Dan gĂ„Â§al Alla;' kif qalu huma ''u dan gĂ„Â§al sĂ„Â§abna (l-allat u l-idoli tagĂ„Â§na): Izda dak (is-sehem) li kien gĂ„Â§al sĂ„Â§abhom ma jasalx gĂ„Â§and Alla, u dak fis-sehem) li kien gĂ„Â§al Alla jasal gĂ„Â§and sĂ„Â§abhom. Tassew Ă„Â§azin il-gudizzju li jagĂ„Â§mlu

137.translation: Hekk ukoll sĂ„Â§abhom (l-idoli li xierku ma' Alla), lil Ă„Â§afna minn dawk li jxierku (a/lar ma' Alla) zejnuflhom) il-qtil ta' wliedhom biex (b'hekk) jeqirduhom, u jĂ„Â§awdulhom id-din tagĂ„Â§hom. Li kieku Alla ried, ma kinux jagĂ„Â§mluh: (dan). Mela itlaqhom gĂ„Â§all-qlajja' tagĂ„Â§hom

138.translation: Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Dawn frat u wcuĂ„Â§ tar-raba' projbiti. Ma jikolhomx Ă„Â§lief min irridu aĂ„Â§naf' Hekk jallegaw. U hemm. frat (oĂ„Â§ra) li daharhom huwa projbit, u frat li fuqhom ma jsemmux Isem Alla (ireta joqtluhom), u dan (kolhi) huwa gideb fuqu. Huwa se jĂ„Â§allashom tal-gideb li kienu jaqilgĂ„Â§u

139.translation: Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Dak li jinsab f'guf dawn il-frat huwa gĂ„Â§all-irgiel tagĂ„Â§na biss, u ma jiswiex gĂ„Â§an-nisa tagĂ„Â§na, u jekk ikun (imwieled) mejjet, huma (irgiel u nisa) ikunu gĂ„Â§ab fih. Huwa se jĂ„Â§allashom ta' dak li qalgĂ„Â§u (bi kliemhom dwar Alla). Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq GĂ„Â§aref u jaf kollox

140.translation: Telliefa huma dawk li qatlu lil uliedhom, bil-bluha, mingĂ„Â§ajr gĂ„Â§arfien, u gĂ„Â§amlu ma jiswiex l-ikel li Alla tahom (gĂ„Â§all-gĂ„Â§ajxien), u b'gideb fuq Alla. Huma tilfu t- triq u ma kinux jinsabu fit-triq it-tajba

141.translation: Huwa li jagĂ„Â§mel Gonna (bid-dwieli merfugĂ„Â§a) fuq kannizzati, u (oĂ„Â§rajn) mingĂ„Â§ajrhom, is-sigar tal-palm, iz- zara' b'Ă„Â§afna gĂ„Â§amliet ta' ikel, iz-zebbug u r-rummien, jixxiebhu (fid-deĂ„Â§ra. tagĂ„Â§hom), u ma jixxibhux (fil- togĂ„Â§ma). Kulu mill-frott tagĂ„Â§hom meta jagĂ„Â§mlu l-frott, u agĂ„Â§tu (lill-fqar u l-imsejknin) kemm Ă„Â§aqqhom, dakinhar tal-Ă„Â§sad tagĂ„Â§hom; u la taĂ„Â§luxt Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq ma jĂ„Â§obbx lill-Ă„Â§aljin

142.translation: Fost il-frat hemm (bhejjem) gĂ„Â§at-tagĂ„Â§bija u (oĂ„Â§rajn) gĂ„Â§all-ikel. Kulu minn dak li Alla takom gĂ„Â§all-gĂ„Â§ajxien, u la timxux fil-passi tax-Xitan. Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq gĂ„Â§adu fid- dieher tagĂ„Â§kom

143.translation: (Huwa gĂ„Â§amel gĂ„Â§alikom) tmint izwieg (jiswew gĂ„Â§all- ikel): zewg nagĂ„Â§giet (muntun u nagĂ„Â§ga) u zewg mogĂ„Â§ziet (bodbod u mogĂ„Â§za). GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Liema gĂ„Â§amel ma jiswewx, iz-zewgt irgiel jew iz-zewg nisa (minn dawn il-bhejjem), jew inkella dak li kien hemm fi gwief iz- zewg nisa 7 GĂ„Â§iduli bl-gĂ„Â§erf (tagĂ„Â§kom), jekk qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa

144.translation: U zewgt igmla (il-gemel u l-gemla) u zewg baqriet (il- gendus u l-baqra). GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Liema gĂ„Â§amel ma jiswewx, iz-zewgt irgiel jew iz-zewg nisa (nin dawn il-bhejjem), jew inkella dak li kien hemm fi gwief iz- zewg nisa 2 Jaqaw kontu xhieda meta Alla wissiekom dwar dan (il-kliem ta' projbizzjoni li qegĂ„Â§din tallegaw) 7' Min hu agĂ„Â§ar minn dak li jaqla' l-gideb dwar Alla, biex itellef it-triq lin-nies, mingĂ„Â§ajr gĂ„Â§arfien 7 TabilĂ„Â§aqq. li Alla ma jmexxix fit-triq it-tajba lin-nies il-Ă„Â§ziena

145.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''E'dak. li tnebbaĂ„Â§ lili ma nsib xejn (mil-laĂ„Â§am). li ma. jiswiex gĂ„Â§al min jiekol, biex jieklu, Ă„Â§lief jekk (dan l-ikel) ikun (laĂ„Â§am ta' annimal) mejjet, jew demm imxerred, jew laĂ„Â§am il-Ă„Â§anzir, gĂ„Â§aliex huwa mnigges, jew dak li, b'Ă„Â§azen, issemma fuqu isem ieĂ„Â§or minflok ta' Alla.' Izda min ikollu (jiekol minn dan l-ikel minĂ„Â§abba l-Ă„Â§tiega), mingĂ„Â§ajr ma jixtieq, u mingĂ„Â§ajr ma jiekol izzejjed, Sidek huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

146.translation: U gĂ„Â§al-Lhud gĂ„Â§amilna ma jiswewx il-bhejjem kollha bid-difer (mhux mifrud), u ma Ă„Â§allejnihomx jieklu xaĂ„Â§am il-baqar u n-nagĂ„Â§ag; Ă„Â§lief dak li (dawn il-bhejjem) gĂ„Â§andhom ma' daharhom, jew fil-gewwieni (ma' l- imsaren), jew dak (ix-xaĂ„Â§am) li tĂ„Â§allat ma' l-gĂ„Â§adam. B'hekk Ă„Â§allasniehom tal-Ă„Â§azen tagĂ„Â§hom. AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq ngĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa

147.translation: U jekk. (il-Lhud) igiddbuk, gĂ„Â§idil(hom: MuĂ„Â§ammad): sSidkom hu ta' Ă„Â§niena kbira (gĂ„Â§aliex ilu. Ă„Â§afna jissaportikom), izda l-qilla tiegĂ„Â§u ma tinzammx minn fuq in-nies il-Ă„Â§atjin

148.translation: Dawk li xierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla ) se jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Li kieku. Alla ried, ma konniex. inxierku, u lanqas missirijietna, u ma konna nipprojbixxu xejn (f'dak /i hu ikel).' BĂ„Â§alhom kienu giddbu dawk ta' qabilhom, sa ma (fl-aĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar) daqu l-qilla tagĂ„Â§na. GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): '' GĂ„Â§andkom (xi prova ta' dan jew) xi. gĂ„Â§arfien li tistgĂ„Â§u toĂ„Â§orguh gĂ„Â§alina (biex nemmnu li qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa) 7 Intom ma timxux gĂ„Â§ajr fuq l-istĂ„Â§ajjil (tagĂ„Â§kom), u intom tigdbu biss

149.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Ta' Alla hija l-aqwa xhieda, u li kieku ried, kien imexxikom ilkoll fit-triq it-tajba

150.translation: GĂ„Â§id(i/hom): 'Gibu x-xhieda tagĂ„Â§kom li jixhdu li Alla gĂ„Â§amel dan (l-ikel) ma, jiswiex. U jekk jixhdu (falz u jaqilgĂ„Â§u l-gideb), inti (MuĂ„Â§ammad) tixhidx magĂ„Â§hom. U timxix fuq ix-xewqat ta' dawk li giddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na, li ma jemmnux (fil-Ă„Â§ajja) l-OĂ„Â§ra, u jqisu (l-allat foloz tagĂ„Â§hom) daqs idhom

151.translation: GĂ„Â§id(i/hom): 'Ejjew (biex) inĂ„Â§abbrilkom dak li Sidkom gĂ„Â§amel ma jiswiex gĂ„Â§alikom: la xxierku xejn miegĂ„Â§u, u gibu rwieĂ„Â§kom tajjeb mal-genituri, toqtlux lil uliedkom minĂ„Â§abba l-faqar (tagĂ„Â§kom) AĂ„Â§na ngĂ„Â§ajxu lilkom u lilhom. La toqorbux lejn l-gĂ„Â§emejjel faĂ„Â§xija, sew dak minnhom li jidher u sew li ma jidhirx, u la toqtlux ir-ruĂ„Â§ li Alla qaddes, jekk mhux bil-Ă„Â§aqql Dak huwa li wissiekom, biex forsi tifhmu

152.translation: U la toqorbux lejn gid l-iltim, Ă„Â§lief bl-aĂ„Â§jar mod (gĂ„Â§all- gid tiegĂ„Â§u), sa ma jilĂ„Â§aq l-aqwa tiegĂ„Â§u (u jsir matur), u agĂ„Â§tu kejl u wzin sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ bil-Ă„Â§aqqt AĂ„Â§na ma ngĂ„Â§abbu lil Ă„Â§add aktar milli jiflaĂ„Â§. U meta titkellmu, gĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa, anki jekk (kliemkom jolqot fil-laĂ„Â§am il-Ă„Â§aj lil xi Ă„Â§add) li hu qarib (tagĂ„Â§kom), u wettqu r-rabta ta' Allal Dak huwa li wissiekom, biex forsi tiftakru

153.translation: Din hija triqti d-dritta. Mela imxu fiha, u la timxux fit- toroq (l-oĂ„Â§ra) gĂ„Â§aliex ixerrdukom minn triqtu (triq Alla; u titbiegĂ„Â§du minnu), Dak huwa li wissiekom, biex forsi tibzgĂ„Â§u minnu

154.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad tajna lil Mosc l-Ktieb li huwa l-milja (tat- tjieba tagĂ„Â§na) fuq dak (il-bniedem gust) li jagĂ„Â§mel it- tajjeb; (Ktieb) li jfisser kollox bir-reqqa u tmexxija tajba u Ă„Â§niena, biex forsi (il-Lhud) jemmnu fil-laqgĂ„Â§a ma' Sidhom (f'Jum il-Gudizzju)

155.translation: Dan (il-Qoran) hu Ktieb li AĂ„Â§na nizzilnieh, imbierek. Mela imxu fuqu u ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, biex forsi tiksbu l- Ă„Â§niena (tiegĂ„Â§u)

156.translation: (U araw) li ma tgĂ„Â§idux (f'Jum il-Qawmien): 'Qabilna, il-Ktieb tnizzel fuq zewg gemgĂ„Â§at biss (il-Lhud u l- Insara), u ma konniex nafu bl-istudji tagĂ„Â§hom

157.translation: Jew tgĂ„Â§idu: ''Li kieku l-Ktieb tnizzel fuqna (kif rizzel fuq dawk li gew qabilna), konna nkunu fit-triq it-tajba aktar minnhom. ' Tassew giekom sinjal car minn Sidkom, (kif ukoll) tmexxija tajba u Ă„Â§niena. Mela min huwa agĂ„Â§ar minn: dak li jgiddeb is-sinjali ta' Alla u jwarrab minnhom 7 Se nĂ„Â§allsu lil-dawk li warrbu mis-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na b'kastig mill-agĂ„Â§ar, talli kienu jwarrbu minnhom

158.translation: Jaqaw (il-pagani) ma humiex jistennew Ă„Â§lief li jiguhom. l-angli (fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum biex jeĂ„Â§dulhom irwieĂ„Â§hom), jew li jigihom) Sidek (innifsu f'Jum il-Ă„Â¦aqq), jew inkella jigufhom) xi sinjali ta' Sidek 2 Fil-Jum meta jigu xi sinjali ta' Sidek, it-twemmin (dak il-Ă„Â§in) ma jkun ta' fejda gĂ„Â§al ebda ruĂ„Â§ jekk (dik ir-ruĂ„Â§) ma kinitx temmen qabel, jew kisbet xi gid mit-twemmin tagĂ„Â§ha. GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): f'Stennew; aĂ„Â§na. (ukoll) qegĂ„Â§din nistennew

159.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li jifirdu r-religjon tagĂ„Â§hom, u jinqasmu f'gemgĂ„Â§at, inti (MuĂ„Â§ammad) ma gĂ„Â§andekx x'taqsam magĂ„Â§hom. Dawk, minnhom lil Allat ImbagĂ„Â§ad iĂ„Â§abbrilhom x'kienu qegĂ„Â§din jagĂ„Â§mlu

160.translation: Min (f'Jum il-Ă„Â¦aqq) igib gĂ„Â§emil ta' gid, ikollu gĂ„Â§axra bĂ„Â§alu, u min igib gĂ„Â§emil ta' deni, jitĂ„Â§allas biss bĂ„Â§alu. Huma ma jgarrbux ingustizzja

161.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad lill-pagani): 'Sidi. mexxieni lejn triq dritta, religjon sewwa. (bla ebda tagĂ„Â§wig fiha), it-twemmin safi ta' Abraham. Huwa ma kienx minn dawk li jxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla)

162.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'TabilĂ„Â§aqq li t-talb tiegĂ„Â§i, ir- riti tiegĂ„Â§i, Ă„Â§ajti u mewti huma (ko//ha) gĂ„Â§al Alla, Sid il- Ă„Â§olqien

163.translation: Huwa ma gĂ„Â§andux xrikl Dan hu l-amar li Ă„Â§adt, u jiena l-ewwel fost il-Misilmin li ntelqu f'idejh

164.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom): 'Jaqaw gĂ„Â§andi nixtieq lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or gĂ„Â§ajr lil Alla bĂ„Â§ala Sid, meta Huwa Sid kollox 77 Kull ruĂ„Â§ ma tiksibx (il-Ă„Â§las) Ă„Â§lief gĂ„Â§aliha nnifisha (skond gĂ„Â§emilha), u ebda ruĂ„Â§ ma terfa' t-toqol (tad-dnub) ta' (ruĂ„Â§). oĂ„Â§ra, ImbagĂ„Â§ad lejn Sidkom tmorru lura, u jĂ„Â§abbrilkom dak li ma'kontux taqblu fuqu

165.translation: Huwali gĂ„Â§amilkom il-werrieta ta' l-art (minn nisel gĂ„Â§al nisel), u refa' wĂ„Â§ud minnkom fuq oĂ„Â§rajn fi gradi (ta' gĂ„Â§erf, gĂ„Â§ana, qawwa, u gieĂ„Â§), biex igarrabkom f'dak li takom. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidek malajr jagĂ„Â§ti l-kastig, izda Huwa tassew Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

2.translation: Ktieb li tnizzillek. (MuĂ„Â§ammad). Mela Ă„Â§alli ma jkun hemm ebda diqa f'sidrek minĂ„Â§abba fih; biex twissi bih u (ikun ta') tifkira gĂ„Â§al dawk li jemmnu

3.translation: Imxu fuq dak li tnizzlilkom minn Sidkom, u la timxux wara sidien (foloz) minfloku (/zda intom) ftit tiftakru (fit-twissija)

4.translation: Kemm-il belt qridna u l-qilla tagĂ„Â§na gietha (gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda) billejl, jew waqt li kienu fin-nagĂ„Â§sa ta' wara nofsinhar

5.translation: It-talba tagĂ„Â§hom, meta giethom il-qilla tagĂ„Â§na, ma kinitx gĂ„Â§ajr li qalu: ''AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq konna Ă„Â§zienat

(tal-ligi ta' Alla), u meta l- MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§na (l-angli) jiguhom biex jeĂ„Â§dulhom irwieĂ„Â§hom, huma jgĂ„Â§idu (lill-Ă„Â§ziena): 'Fejn huma dawk fl-allat foloz) ti kontu ssejĂ„Â§u minflok lil-Alla (forsi jeĂ„Â§ilsukom) 7' Huma jwiegbu: ''Telquna,' u (hekk) jixhdu kontra tagĂ„Â§hom infushom li huma kienu ma jemmnux

' Kull darba li jidĂ„Â§ol gens (fin-Nar, arah) jisĂ„Â§et lil Ă„Â§uh (il- gens ta' qablu), hekk li meta Ikoll jilĂ„Â§qu lil-xulxin fih, l- aĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar wieĂ„Â§ed fosthom jgĂ„Â§id dwar ta' l-ewwel: ''Sidnal Dawk tellfuna t-triqi Mela agĂ„Â§tihom kastig doppju fin- Nar,' Huwa jgĂ„Â§id: ''KulĂ„Â§add imissu (kastig) doppju, izda ma tafux (dwar dan)

U jsejĂ„Â§u lil nies il- Genna (u jgĂ„Â§idulhom): ''Sliem gĂ„Â§alikomt' Huma (ta' fuq is-swar) ma jidĂ„Â§lux fiha, gĂ„Â§ad li huma jittamaw (Ă„Â§afna. dan)

51.translation: dawk li Ă„Â§adu d-din tagĂ„Â§hom b'mogĂ„Â§dija ta' zmien u bil- logĂ„Â§ob, u qarrqet bihom il-Ă„Â§ajja (bit-rlellix tagĂ„Â§ha f'din) id-dinja 7 Ilum ninsewhom (u nĂ„Â§alluhom fil-kastig tagĂ„Â§hom), bĂ„Â§alma huma nsew (din) il-laqgĂ„Â§a ta' dan il- Jum tagĂ„Â§hom, u kienu jicĂ„Â§du s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na

Huwa jgĂ„Â§atti n-nhar bil-lejl, u (kull wieĂ„Â§ed minnhom: it-tnejn) jigri bil-Ă„Â§effa wara l-ieĂ„Â§or. (Huwa Ă„Â§alaq) ix-xemx, il- qamar, u l-kwiekeb (u gĂ„Â§amilhom) joqogĂ„Â§du gĂ„Â§all-amar tiegĂ„Â§u. TiegĂ„Â§u l-Ă„Â§olqien u l-amar. Jitbierek Alla Sid il- Ă„Â§olqieni
