Hekk ukoll noĂ„Â§orgu l-mejtin (gĂ„Â§all-Ă„Â§ajja), biex forsi tiftakru

58.translation: U l-art tajba toĂ„Â§rog il-Ă„Â§xejjex tagĂ„Â§ha, bir-rieda. ta' Sidha, izda (l-art) Ă„Â§azina ma toĂ„Â§rogx (il-Ă„Â§xejjex) gĂ„Â§ajr b'xeĂ„Â§Ă„Â§a. Hekk infissru s-sinjali (tagĂ„Â§na) lil nies li jizzu Ă„Â§ajr

59.translation: AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq bgĂ„Â§atna lil- Noc gĂ„Â§and niesu u qal(ilhom): ''Ja niesi, qimu lil Allal Ma gĂ„Â§andkomx alla ieĂ„Â§or gĂ„Â§ajru. Jiena nibza' li (jekk se tibqgĂ„Â§u tqimu l-idoli) se jkollkom il-kastig ta' Jum kbir

60.translation: Il-kbarat ta' niesu qalu: 'AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq qegĂ„Â§din narawk f'telfien mill-aktar car

61.translation: Qal(ilhom Noc): 'Ja niesi, ma ninsab f'ebda telfien, izda jiena l-MibgĂ„Â§ut minn Sid il-Ă„Â§olqien

62.translation: Jiena nwasslilkom il-messaggi ta' Sidi. (gĂ„Â§all-gid tagĂ„Â§kom), nagĂ„Â§tikom pariri, u naf minn Alla dak li intom ma tafux

63.translation: Jew qegĂ„Â§din tistagĂ„Â§gbu li gietkom tifkira minn Sidkom ma' ragel minn fostkom, biex iwissikom u jkollkom il- biza' ta' Alla, u forsi tintwera Ă„Â§niena magĂ„Â§kom

64.translation: Izda huma giddbuh, u AĂ„Â§na Ă„Â§lisna (mid-dilluvju) lilu u lil ta' miegĂ„Â§u, fl-arka, u gĂ„Â§erriqna lil dawk li giddbu s- sinjali: tagĂ„Â§na. Huma kienu tabilĂ„Â§aqq nies gĂ„Â§omja (f'qalbhom u f'moĂ„Â§Ă„Â§hom)

65.translation: U (bgĂ„Â§atna) gĂ„Â§and (in-nies ta') GĂ„Â§ad' lil Ă„Â§uhom Had (bĂ„Â§ala Profeta). Qal(ilhom): ''Ja niesi, qimu lil Allal Ma gĂ„Â§andkomx alla ieĂ„Â§or gĂ„Â§ajru. Mela ma tibzgĂ„Â§ux (minnu)

66.translation: Il-kbarat ta' dawk li m'emmnux fost niesu qalu: 'AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq qegĂ„Â§din narawk fil-bluha, u tassew naĂ„Â§sbu li inti mill-giddibin

67.translation: Qal(ilhom): 'Ja niesi, ma hemm ebda bluha fija, izda jiena MibgĂ„Â§ut minn Sid il-Ă„Â§olqien

68.translation: Jiena nwasslilkom il-messaggi: ta' Sidi, u jiena magĂ„Â§kom bniedem sincier li jiftĂ„Â§ilkom gĂ„Â§ajnejkom

69.translation: Jew qegĂ„Â§din tistagĂ„Â§gbu li gietkom tifkira minn Sidkom ma' ragel minn fostkom, biex iwissikom 7 U ftakru meta gĂ„Â§amilkom werrieta wara nies Noc, u ziedkom fil-kobor u l-qawwa ta' gisimkom. Ftakru fil-grazzji ta' Alla, biex forsi tkunu rebbiĂ„Â§in

70.translation: (Qaluf/u): 'Jaqaw gejtna biex inqimu lil Alla, waĂ„Â§du, u nĂ„Â§allu dak li kienu jqimu missirijietna 2 Gibilna dak (il- kastig) li qiegĂ„Â§ed twegĂ„Â§edna (u theddidna bih), jekk inti minn dawk li jgĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa

71.translation: Qal (Hid lil niesu): 'Tassew nizlu fuqkom; mingĂ„Â§and Sidkom, kastig u gĂ„Â§adab. Jaqaw qegĂ„Â§din tĂ„Â§aqquha miegĂ„Â§i dwar ismijiet (ta' allat) li semmejtu intom u missirijietkom mingĂ„Â§ajr ma Alla nizzel (ebda) prova dwarhom 7 Mela stennew (il-kastigjl Jiena tassew qiegĂ„Â§ed nistenna magĂ„Â§kom)

72.translation: U Ă„Â§lisna lilu u lil ta' miegĂ„Â§u, bil-Ă„Â§niena tagĂ„Â§na, u qtajna (u xejjinna) dak li baqa' minn dawk li giddbu s- sinjali tagĂ„Â§na u ma kinux jemmnu

73.translation: U (bgĂ„Â§atna) gĂ„Â§and (in-nies ta') Tamdd'' lil-Ă„Â§uhom SaliĂ„Â§ (bĂ„Â§ala Profeta). Qalilhom): 'Ja. niesi, qimu lil Allaf. Ma gĂ„Â§andkomx. alla: ieĂ„Â§or gĂ„Â§ajru. Tassew waslilkom sinjal car minn Sidkom. Din il-gemla ta' Alla hija sinjal gĂ„Â§alikom. Mela Ă„Â§alluha tiekol f'art Alla, u la tagĂ„Â§mlulhiex deni, gĂ„Â§aliex inkella jigi fuqkom kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

74.translation: U ftakru meta gĂ„Â§amilkom werrieta wara l-gens ta' GĂ„Â§ad, u takom gĂ„Â§amara fuq l-art (ta' 'al-Ă„Â¦igr) biex tibnu palazzi fil-witat tagĂ„Â§ha, u tĂ„Â§affru djar fl-igbla. U ftakru (ukoll) il-grazzji ta' Alla (li Ă„Â§adtu) u tagĂ„Â§mlux Ă„Â§azen fuq l-art bil-Ă„Â§sara tagĂ„Â§kom

75.translation: Il-kbarat ta' dawk li tkabbru fost niesu qalu (b'sarkazmu) lil dawk meqjusa dgĂ„Â§ajfa, (jigifieri) dawk fosthom. li emmnu: ''Tafu li SaliĂ„Â§ huwa MibgĂ„Â§ut minn Siduf' Huma qalu(lhom): 'AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq nemmnu f'dak li ntbagĂ„Â§at bih

76.translation: Dawk li tkabbru qalu: 'AĂ„Â§na ma nemmnux f'dak li temmnu intomi

77.translation: GĂ„Â§alhekk qatlu l-gemla u kisru l-amar ta' Alla filwaqt li qalu: 'Ja SaliĂ„Â§, gibilna dak (il-kastig) li: qiegĂ„Â§ed twegĂ„Â§edna. ( 4 theddidna bih), jekk inti (wieĂ„Â§ed) mill- MibgĂ„Â§utini

78.translation: U Ă„Â§adhom it-tregĂ„Â§id ta' l-art, u mas-sebĂ„Â§ kienu mixĂ„Â§utin fl-art (gĂ„Â§al mejta) fi djarhom

79.translation: GĂ„Â§alhekk (SaliĂ„Â§) tahom dahru, filwaqt li qalfi/hom): 'Ja niesi, wassaltilkom il-messagg ta' Sidi, u ftaĂ„Â§tilkom gĂ„Â§ajnejkom. Izda intom ma' tĂ„Â§obbux min jiftĂ„Â§ilkom gĂ„Â§ajnejkom

80.translation: U (bgĂ„Â§atna wkoll) lil-Lot u qal lil-niesu' (f'Sodoma): Zjaqaw tagĂ„Â§mlu gĂ„Â§emejjel faĂ„Â§xija (ta' omosesswalita) li Ă„Â§add qabilkom fil-Ă„Â§olqien ma gĂ„Â§amel

81.translation: Intom tersqu lejn l-irgiel bix-xewqa tal-gisem, flok lejn in-nisa. Intom tassew nies bla razani

82.translation: t-twegiba ta' miesu ma' kinitx. Ă„Â§lief li qalu: GĂ„Â§orguhom. (lil Lot u lil sĂ„Â§abu) mill-belt tagĂ„Â§koml Dawk tabilĂ„Â§aqq nies li jzommu s-safa, (mhux bĂ„Â§alna)

83.translation: U Ă„Â§lisna lilu u lil niesu, Ă„Â§lief lil martu, li kienet minn dawk li nqerdu

84.translation: U bgĂ„Â§atna fuqhom xita (ra' gebel tafli). U ara kif kien imiem il-Ă„Â§atjin

85.translation: U (bgĂ„Â§atna) gĂ„Â§and (in-nies ta') Madjan' lil-Ă„Â§uhom XugĂ„Â§ajb. Qal(i/hom): 'Ja. niesi, qimu lil-Allal Ma gĂ„Â§andkomx alla ieĂ„Â§or gĂ„Â§ajru. Tassew waslilkom sinjal car minn Sidkom. Mela agĂ„Â§tu l-kejl u l-uzin mistĂ„Â§oqq, u. la ccaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§dux lin-nies minn dak li hu tagĂ„Â§hom, u lanqas tagĂ„Â§mlu Ă„Â§sara fuq l-art wara li ssewwiet. Dak huwa aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§alikom, jekk intom temmnu

86.translation: U latoqogĂ„Â§dux f'kull triq, theddu (li/ min ikun gej biex jismagĂ„Â§ni), u zzommu mit-triq ta' Alla lil-min jemmen fih, u tixtiquha (tkun zriq) mgĂ„Â§awga. U ftakru meta kontu ftit, u mbagĂ„Â§ad kattarkom. Araw kif kien it-tmiem ta' nies il-Ă„Â§sara

87.translation: U jekk hemm gemgĂ„Â§a minnkom li temmen f'dak li jiena ntbagĂ„Â§att bih, u gemgĂ„Â§a (oĂ„Â§ra) li ma temminx, mela stabru sa ma Alla jagĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq minna. Huwa l- AĂ„Â§jar li jagĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq

88.translation: Il-kbarat ta' niesu, li tkabbru ( 2 caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin f'Alla), qalu: ''Tassew li noĂ„Â§orguk, ja XugĂ„Â§ajb, u lil dawk miegĂ„Â§ek li jemmnu, mill-belt tagĂ„Â§na; inkella erggĂ„Â§u lura gĂ„Â§at-twemmin tagĂ„Â§na' Huwa qal: 'Anki jekk aĂ„Â§na nistmerru (dan)

89.translation: (Inkunu qegĂ„Â§din naqilgĂ„Â§u gideb kontra Alla, kieku nerggĂ„Â§u lura gĂ„Â§al twemminkom, wara li Alla Ă„Â§elisna minnu. Ma jixirqilniex li nerggĂ„Â§u lura gĂ„Â§alih, Ă„Â§lief jekk Alla Sidna jkun irid fdan iseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§). Sidna jesa' l-gĂ„Â§arfien ta' kollox. F'idejn Alla Ă„Â§allejna. Sidna, agĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq bejnna u bejn niesna bis-sewwa. Inti l-AĂ„Â§jar fost dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu Ă„Â§aqq

90.translation: Il-kbarat ta' niesu, li m'emmnux, qalu: 'Jekk timxu wara XugĂ„Â§ajb, mela intom tkunu t-tellifin

91.translation: U t-tregĂ„Â§id ta' l-art Ă„Â§adhom, u mas-sebĂ„Â§ kienu mixĂ„Â§utin fl-art (gĂ„Â§al mejta) fi djarhom

92.translation: dawk li giddbu lil XugĂ„Â§ajb, bĂ„Â§allikieku qatt ma gĂ„Â§exu fihom. Dawk li giddbu lil XugĂ„Â§ajb, kienu huma t-tellifint

93.translation: U (XugĂ„Â§ajb) tahom dahru u qal: 'Ja niesi, jiena wassaltilkom il-messaggi ta' Sidi, u ftaĂ„Â§tilkom gĂ„Â§ajnejkom. Izda gĂ„Â§aliex gĂ„Â§andi nitnikket gĂ„Â§al nies li ma jemmnux

94.translation: Qatt ma bgĂ„Â§atna f'belt lil ebda Profeta (li mbagĂ„Â§ad kien micĂ„Â§ud) mingĂ„Â§ajr ma Ă„Â§adna lil niesha bit-taĂ„Â§bit u l-Ă„Â§sara biex forsi jiccekknu (kollhom umilta u jindmu)

95.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad biddilnie(/hom) id-deni (li kienu fih) f'gid, sa ma kibru fl-gĂ„Â§add u ssaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§u, u qalu: 'Lil missirijietna (ukoll): missuhom: l-hemm u l-hena'' GĂ„Â§alhekk Ă„Â§adniehom gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda meta ma kinux qegĂ„Â§din jintebĂ„Â§u (bil-Ă„Â§sara li giet fuqhom)

96.translation: Li kieku nies l-ibliet emmnu u bezgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, konna niftĂ„Â§u fuqhom barkiet mis-sema u l-art, Izda huma giddbu (is-sinjali li waslu lilhom u lill-MibgĂ„Â§utin), u Ă„Â§adniehom minĂ„Â§abba (il-Ă„Â§azen) li kienu qegĂ„Â§din jiksbu (b'gĂ„Â§emilhom)

97.translation: Jaqaw nies l-ibliet iserrĂ„Â§u rashom li l-qilla tagĂ„Â§na ma hijiex se tigihom (gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda) billejl, waqt li huma reqdin

98.translation: Jew nies l-ibliet serrĂ„Â§u rashom li l-qilla tagĂ„Â§na ma hijiex se tigihom (gĂ„Â§a' gĂ„Â§arrieda) binhar, waqt li jkunu jilagĂ„Â§bu (u jaĂ„Â§lu Ă„Â§inhom fil-frugĂ„Â§at)

99.translation: Jaqaw serrĂ„Â§u rashom mill-pjan sigriet ta' Alla (imĂ„Â§ejji gĂ„Â§alihom)' Ma jserrĂ„Â§ux rashom mill-pjan sigriet ta' Alla Ă„Â§lief it-tellifin

100.translation: Ma kinitx (bizzejjed it-tagĂ„Â§lima) gĂ„Â§al dawk li wirtu l- art wara niesha (li gĂ„Â§exu qabilhom u nqerdu) li, kieku ridna, stajna nolqtuhom. (bil-kastig tagĂ„Â§na) minĂ„Â§abba fi dnubiethom, u konna nqiegĂ„Â§du sigill fuq qlubhom biex ma jisimgĂ„Â§ux (u ma jkunux jistgĂ„Â§u jifhmu t-twissija)

101.translation: Dawk huma (MuĂ„Â§ammad) l-ibliet li qegĂ„Â§din nagĂ„Â§tuk aĂ„Â§barhom. Il-MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§hom gewhom bis-sinjali c- cari (dwar is-setgĂ„Â§a: ta' Alla), izda ma' ridux jemmnu f'dak li giddbu qabel. Hekk iqiegĂ„Â§ed Alla sigill fuq qlub dawk li ma jemmnux

102.translation: U ma' sibniex lil Ă„Â§afna minnhom iĂ„Â§arsu r-rabta (tagĂ„Â§hom ma' Alla), u sibna li Ă„Â§afna minnhom Ă„Â§ziena

103.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad bgĂ„Â§atna, warajhom, lil Mosc bis-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na gĂ„Â§and il-FargĂ„Â§un u l-kbarat tiegĂ„Â§u, u caĂ„Â§duhom. Issa ara kif kien it-tmiem ta' nies il-Ă„Â§sara

104.translation: Mosc qal: Ă˘â€šÂ¬Ja FargĂ„Â§un, jiena MibgĂ„Â§ut minn Sid il- Ă„Â§olqien

105.translation: Huwa dmiri li ma ngĂ„Â§idx dwar Alla gĂ„Â§ajr is-sewwa, Jiena gibtilkom sinjal car minn Sidkom (li juri li qiegĂ„Â§ed ngĂ„Â§id is-sewwa). Mela ibgĂ„Â§at miegĂ„Â§i lil Ulied Israelf

106.translation: Qal (il-FargĂ„Â§un): ''Jekk tassew gejt b'sinjal, mela gibu (Ă„Â§a narawh), jekk qiegĂ„Â§ed tgĂ„Â§id is-sewwat

107.translation: Huwa (Mosc) xeĂ„Â§et il-Ă„Â§atar tiegĂ„Â§u (fl-art) u ara, (sar) serp fid-dieher

108.translation: U (Mosc) Ă„Â§areg idu, uara, (dehret) bajda (u kollha dija) gĂ„Â§al dawk li kienu jĂ„Â§arsu (ejha)

109.translation: Il-kbarat ta' nies il-FargĂ„Â§un qalu: ''Dan tassew saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar jilĂ„Â§aqlu

110.translation: Huwa jrid joĂ„Â§rogkom (bis-seĂ„Â§er tiegĂ„Â§u) minn artkom. Mela x'inhu l-amar tagĂ„Â§kom

111.translation: Qalu (lill-FargĂ„Â§un): 'Zomm lilu u lil Ă„Â§uh (gĂ„Â§al xi zmien), u ibgĂ„Â§at fl-ibliet nies li jigbru/lek is-sĂ„Â§aĂ„Â§ar

113.translation: U s-sĂ„Â§aĂ„Â§ar gew gĂ„Â§and il-FargĂ„Â§un u qalu: ''TabilĂ„Â§aqq se jkollna l-Ă„Â§las, jekk-aĂ„Â§na nkunu r-rebbiĂ„Â§in

114.translation: Qal(i/hom): ''lva, u tkunu minn dawk qrib. (tiegĂ„Â§i wkoll)

115.translation: Qalu: 'Ja Mosc, jew tixĂ„Â§et (il-Ă„Â§atar inti l-ewwel), jew inkella nixĂ„Â§tu aĂ„Â§na

116.translation: (Qalfilhom): ''IxĂ„Â§tu intoml' U meta xeĂ„Â§tu (l-oĂ„Â§tra u l- Ă„Â§bula tagĂ„Â§hom), saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ru. gĂ„Â§ajnejn in-nies, qanqlu biza' kbir fihom, u gĂ„Â§amlu seĂ„Â§er kbir

117.translation: U nebbaĂ„Â§ina lil Mosc (u gĂ„Â§ednielu): 'IxĂ„Â§et il-Ă„Â§atar tiegĂ„Â§ekf' U arah, bela' l-qerq tagĂ„Â§hom

118.translation: B'hekk seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ is-sewwa, u gie fix-xejn dak li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

119.translation: U hemmhekk dlonk ingĂ„Â§elbu (il-FargĂ„Â§un u l-kbarat tiegĂ„Â§u) u tbaxxew

120.translation: U s-sĂ„Â§aĂ„Â§ar inxteĂ„Â§tu fl-art jagĂ„Â§tu qima

123.translation: Il-FargĂ„Â§un. qal(i/hom): 'Emmintu. fih qabel ma nagĂ„Â§tikom permess jien 2 Dan tassew tnassis li nassastu fil-belt (flimkien ma' Mosc) biex toĂ„Â§orgu minnha. lil niesha (lill-Egizzjani, u fiha jgĂ„Â§ixu l-Lhud minflokhom). Izda (dalwaqt) tkunu taful

124.translation: Tassew li naqtagĂ„Â§lkom idejkom u riglejkom, id ta' naĂ„Â§a u rigel ta' naĂ„Â§a oĂ„Â§ra, imbagĂ„Â§ad insallabkom ikolli

125.translation: Qalu (is-sĂ„Â§aĂ„Â§ar): ''(B'daqshekk' Xi darba jew oĂ„Â§ra) aĂ„Â§na sejrin lura gĂ„Â§and Sidna

126.translation: Inti ma tivvendikax ruĂ„Â§ek minna Ă„Â§lief minĂ„Â§abba li emminna fis-sinjali ta' Sidna, meta gewna,' (ImbagĂ„Â§ad talbu hekk): ''Sidna, agĂ„Â§tina s-sabar (waqr il-kastig li se.) jagĂ„Â§tina: l-FargĂ„Â§un), u. Ă„Â§udilna rwieĂ„Â§na meta aĂ„Â§na mitluqin f'idejk, Misilmin

127.translation: Il-kbarat ta' nies il-FargĂ„Â§un qalu: '(Ja FargĂ„Â§un) se tĂ„Â§alli lil Mosc u lil niesu jagĂ„Â§mlu Ă„Â§sara fuq l-art, u jitlaq lilek u lill-allat tiegĂ„Â§ek 77 Qal (il-FargĂ„Â§un): ''Se noqtlu s- subien. tagĂ„Â§hom, u nĂ„Â§allu n-nisa tagĂ„Â§hom. Ă„Â§ajjin (imjassrin magĂ„Â§na). AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq naĂ„Â§kmu fuqhom

128.translation: Moscqal lil niesu: ''Itolbu l-gĂ„Â§ajnuna ta' Alla, u stabrul TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-art hija ta' Alla, u jagĂ„Â§tiha b'wirt lil min irid minn fost il-qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§u. L-(aqwa) tmiem huwa ta' dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla

129.translation: Huma (il-Lhud) qalu: 'AĂ„Â§na garrabna d-deni qabel ma gejtna, kif ukoll wara li gejtna'' Qal(ilhom): ''GĂ„Â§andu mnejn Sidkom jeqred l-gĂ„Â§adu tagĂ„Â§kom, jagĂ„Â§milkom werrieta fuq l-art, u jara kif iggibu rwieĂ„Â§kom

130.translation: U garrabna lil nies il-FargĂ„Â§un bi snin ta' nixfa kbira u nuqqas ta' frott, biex forsi jiftakru (fit-twissija ta' Alla)

131.translation: U meta giehom il-gid, qalu: ''Dan tagĂ„Â§na (gĂ„Â§aliex Ă„Â§aqqna)'' Izda meta giehom id-deni, qisuh b'xorti Ă„Â§azina minĂ„Â§abba Mosc u dawk ta' miegĂ„Â§u. (Xejn minn dan, gĂ„Â§aliex) ix-xorti Ă„Â§azina tagĂ„Â§hom kienet biss (gejja minn) gĂ„Â§and Alla, izda Ă„Â§afna minnhom ma kinux jafu

132.translation: Huma qalu: 'Ikun xi jkun is-sinjal li ggib biex issaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§arna bih, aĂ„Â§na m'aĂ„Â§niex se nemmnukt

133.translation: U bgĂ„Â§atna fughom. l-gĂ„Â§argĂ„Â§ar, il-gurati, il-qamel, iz- zringijiet, u d-demm sinjali cari, izda huma tkabbru (u caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin), u kienu nies mill-agĂ„Â§ar

134.translation: Kull meta waqa' fuqhom il-kastig, qalu: ''Ja Mosc, itlob lil Sidek gĂ„Â§alina, bis-saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§a tar-rabta. tiegĂ„Â§u miegĂ„Â§ek. Jekk tneĂ„Â§Ă„Â§i minn fuqna l-kastig, zgur nemmnuk, u nibagĂ„Â§tu miegĂ„Â§ek lil Ulied Israel

135.translation: Izda meta neĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ejna minn fuqhom il-kastig, sa zmien (l- gĂ„Â§arqa) li kellhom jaslu gĂ„Â§alih, arahom jerggĂ„Â§u jiksru kelmithom

136.translation: GĂ„Â§alhekk tĂ„Â§allasna minnhom, u gĂ„Â§erriqniehom. fil- baĂ„Â§ar talli giddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na u ma tawx kashom

137.translation: U lin-nies li kienu maĂ„Â§qurin (mill-FargĂ„Â§un u minn niesu) tajniehom b'wirt il-Lvant u l-Punent ta' l-art li konna berikna, u l-kelma t-tajba ta' Sidek laĂ„Â§qet il-milja tagĂ„Â§ha ma' Wlied Israel, gĂ„Â§aliex kienu stabru (fit-tbatijiet tagĂ„Â§hom), filwaqt li qridna kulma kienu gĂ„Â§amlu l- FargĂ„Â§un u niesu, u kulma kienu bnew

138.translation: U qsamna l-baĂ„Â§ar b'Ulied Israel, u gew fost nies mogĂ„Â§tija. gĂ„Â§all-idoli tagĂ„Â§hom. Qalu (Ufied Israel): 'Ja Mosc, agĂ„Â§mlilna alla bĂ„Â§alma (dawn) gĂ„Â§andhom allat (tagĂ„Â§hom).' Qal(ilhom): ''Intom tabilĂ„Â§aqq nies li ma tafux (x'qegĂ„Â§din titolbuji)

139.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dak (il-Ă„Â§azen ta' l-idolatrija) li dawn (in- nies) jinsabu fih iwassal gĂ„Â§all-qerda, u huwa fieragĂ„Â§ dak li qegĂ„Â§din jagĂ„Â§mlu

140.translation: (Qalfilhom ukoll Mosc): 'Jaqaw se nfittxilkom alla (ieĂ„Â§or) minflok Alla, meta kien Hu li ppreferiekom fuq il-Ă„Â§olqien (kollu)

141.translation: (U ftakru) meta Ă„Â§lisniekom minn nies il-FargĂ„Â§un li kienu jgarrbukom (u jaĂ„Â§qrukom) bl-agĂ„Â§ar tbatija, joqtlu s-subien tagĂ„Â§kom filwaqt li jĂ„Â§allu lin-nisa tagĂ„Â§kom Ă„Â§ajjin (imjassrin magĂ„Â§hom). F'dan kien hemm tigrib kbir minn Sidkom

142.translation: U rfajna gĂ„Â§al Mosc (zmien) tletin lejla, u gĂ„Â§amilniehom sĂ„Â§aĂ„Â§ b'gĂ„Â§axra (oĂ„Â§ra), hekk li (b'kollox) iz-zmien maĂ„Â§sub ta' Sidu kien ta' erbgĂ„Â§in lejla. U Mosc qal lil Ă„Â§uh Aron: 'OqgĂ„Â§od minfloki fost niesi, agĂ„Â§mel il-gid (fosthom), u la timxix fit-triq ta' nies il-Ă„Â§saral

143.translation: U meta Mosc gie fiz-zmien maĂ„Â§sub tagĂ„Â§na, u kellmu Sidu, (Mosc) qal: ''Sidi, urini (lilek innifsek), biex inĂ„Â§ares lejk. (Alla) qal: S'M'intix se tarani, izda Ă„Â§ares lejn il- muntanja: jekk izzomm f'postha, se tarani.' Izda meta Sidu deher (fis-sebĂ„Â§ tiegĂ„Â§u) lill-muntanja, gĂ„Â§amilha frak, u Mosc nxteĂ„Â§et fl-art mitluf minn sensih. U meta ( Mosc). stejqer qal: ''SebĂ„Â§ lilekt Jiena (sogĂ„Â§bien) dort lejk bl- indiema, u jiena l-ewwel fost dawk li jemmnul

144.translation: Qal (Alla): la Mosc, Jiena gĂ„Â§aziltek fuq in-nies fl- oĂ„Â§ra) bil-messaggi tiegĂ„Â§i (li gĂ„Â§addejtlek), u bi kliemi (li Jiena gĂ„Â§edilek). Mela Ă„Â§u (il-gieĂ„Â§) li tajtek, u kun minn dawk li jizzu Ă„Â§ajri

145.translation: U ktibnielu fuq kull Ă„Â§aga, fuq it-twavel, bi twissija u tifsir bir-reqqa ta' kollox, 'Mela Ă„Â§udhom, (zommhom u Ă„Â§arishom) bil-qawwa (tiegĂ„Â§ek kollha), u amar lil niesek izommu ma' l-aĂ„Â§jar li fihom (dawn it-twavel). Se nurikom (dalwaqt) dar il-Ă„Â§ziena

146.translation: Se nbiegĂ„Â§ed mis-sinjali tiegĂ„Â§i lil dawk li jitkabbru fuq l-art, mingĂ„Â§ajr Ă„Â§aqq (u ma nĂ„Â§allihomx jifhmuhom; dawk.) li mqar) jekk jaraw. kull sinjal (u miraklu ieĂ„Â§or, xorta waĂ„Â§da) ma jemmnux fih. U jekk jaraw it-triq it-tajba, ma jeĂ„Â§duhiex bi trigfithom), izda jekk jaraw triq il-Ă„Â§tija, (arahom) jeĂ„Â§duha bi. triqfirhom). Dak gĂ„Â§aliex. huma giddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na, u ma tawx kashom

147.translation: Dawk li jgiddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na u l-laqgĂ„Â§a ta' (il- Ă„Â¦ajja) l-OĂ„Â§ra (ma' Alla), jistaw fix-xejn l-gĂ„Â§emejjel tagĂ„Â§hom. Jaqaw se jitĂ„Â§allsu gĂ„Â§ajr ta' dak li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

148.translation: U nies Mosc, wara (it-tluq tiegĂ„Â§u lejn. il-muntanja), Ă„Â§adu (b''alla tagĂ„Â§hom) xbieha ta' gĂ„Â§ogol magĂ„Â§mul mit- tizjin: (tad-deheb u l-fidda) tagĂ„Â§hom, u kien jgĂ„Â§ajjat (meta jgĂ„Â§addi r-riĂ„Â§ minnu). Mela ma rawx li (dan l- gĂ„Â§ogol) la jkellimhom u lanqas jurihom it-triqz Huma Ă„Â§aduh (gĂ„Â§all-qima tagĂ„Â§hom). u kienu Ă„Â§ziena

149.translation: U meta nidmu sewwa (minn dak li kienu gĂ„Â§amlu), u raw li kienu mitlufin, qalu: 'Jekk Sidna ma' jĂ„Â§ennx gĂ„Â§alina u jaĂ„Â§frilna, tassew inkunu fost it-tellifint

150.translation: Meta Mosc rega' lura gĂ„Â§and niesu, mgĂ„Â§addab u (fl- istess Ă„Â§in) imnikket (gĂ„Â§aliex qiemu l-gĂ„Â§ogol), qalilhom): Huwa ta' gĂ„Â§ajb dak li gĂ„Â§amiltu fin-nuqqas tiegĂ„Â§i. Jaqaw. ridtu tgĂ„Â§agglu, (kontra) l-amar ta' Sidkom (ur ma flaĂ„Â§tux tistennewni ninzel mill-muntanja) 17 U (fl-gĂ„Â§adab tiegĂ„Â§u) rema t-twavel (tal-ligi), qabad ras Ă„Â§uh, u gibdu lejh. Qal (Aron): SBin ommi, in-nies qisuni dgĂ„Â§ajjef (u ma'tawx kasi), u kienu gĂ„Â§oddhom qatluni. Mela la tferraĂ„Â§x bija lill-gĂ„Â§edewwa: (tagĂ„Â§na), u la tgĂ„Â§oddnix man-nies il- Ă„Â§ziena

151.translation: Qal (Mosc): ''Sidi, aĂ„Â§fer lili u lil Ă„Â§ija, u daĂ„Â§Ă„Â§alna fil- Ă„Â§niena tiegĂ„Â§ek. Inti l-Aktar Ă„Â¦anin fost min iĂ„Â§enn

152.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li-dawk li gĂ„Â§azlu gĂ„Â§alihom l-gĂ„Â§ogol se jmisshom gĂ„Â§adab minn Sidhom u tkasbir fil-Ă„Â§ajja Ă‚ÂŁ (din) id-dinja. Hekk inĂ„Â§allsu lil dawk li jaqilgĂ„Â§u l-gideb

153.translation: Izda dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu l-gĂ„Â§emejjel Ă„Â§ziena, imbagĂ„Â§ad wara jindmu u jemmnu, tabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidek, wara dan, huwa Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

154.translation: U meta l-gĂ„Â§adab gĂ„Â§adda minn fuq Mosc, (Mosc) Ă„Â§a t- twavel, u fil-kitba tagĂ„Â§hom kien hemm tmexxija tajba u Ă„Â§niena gĂ„Â§al dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Sidhom

155.translation: Mosc (imbagĂ„Â§ad) gĂ„Â§azel sebgĂ„Â§in ragel minn niesu gĂ„Â§al waqt (li fih kellha sseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§) il-laqgĂ„Â§a magĂ„Â§na, u meta Ă„Â§adhom it-tregĂ„Â§id (tal-muntanja), qal (Mose): 'Sidi, li kieku ridt, sa minn qabel kont teqred lilhom u lili. Kont forsi se teqridna minĂ„Â§abba dak li (dawn) il-boloh fostna gĂ„Â§amlu (meta talbu li jarawk wicc imb'wiccj) Dan ma huwiex gĂ„Â§ajr it-tigrib tiegĂ„Â§ek (/i/na). li bih toĂ„Â§rog mit- triq it-tajba lil min trid, u tqabbad it-triq it-tajba lil-min trid. Inti tĂ„Â§arisnal Mela aĂ„Â§frilna u Ă„Â§enn gĂ„Â§alina, gĂ„Â§aliex Inti l-AĂ„Â§jar fost dawk li jaĂ„Â§fru

156.translation: U iktbilna (b'amar tiegĂ„Â§ek) dak li-hu tajjeb f'din id- dinja u fl-OĂ„Â§ra. AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq dorna lejk (bl-indiema).' Qal (Alla): 'Nolqot bil-kastig tiegĂ„Â§i lil-min irrid, u l- Ă„Â§niena tiegĂ„Â§i tesa' kollox. GĂ„Â§alhekk se niktibha (b'amar) lil dawk li gĂ„Â§andhom il-biza' ta' Alla, dawk li jagĂ„Â§tu l- karita, u dawk li jemmnu fir-Rivelazzjoni tagĂ„Â§na

157.translation: dawk li jimxu wara l-MibgĂ„Â§ut, il-Profeta bla tagĂ„Â§lim, li jsibuh miktub. gĂ„Â§andhom fit-Tora u fl-Evangelju, li jamrilhom jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb, u jzommhom 'il bogĂ„Â§od mill-Ă„Â§azin, jippermettilhom jieĂ„Â§du mill-Ă„Â§wejjeg tajba, u jipprojbilhom il-Ă„Â§wejjeg Ă„Â§ziena, u jneĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ilhom it-toqol tagĂ„Â§hom u l-madmad (tal-ligijiet tqal minĂ„Â§abba l-Ă„Â§azen tagĂ„Â§hom), li kellhom fughom. U dawk li jemmnuh (li/ MuĂ„Â§ammad), li jagĂ„Â§tuh gieĂ„Â§, li jgĂ„Â§inuh u li jimxu fid- dawl li tnizzel miegĂ„Â§u (il-Qoran), dawk huma r- rebbieĂ„Â§a

158.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Ja nies, jiena l-MibgĂ„Â§ut ta' Alla gĂ„Â§andkom ilkoll, (il-MibgĂ„Â§ut ta') Dak li tiegĂ„Â§u hija s- saltna tas-smewwiet u l-art: ma hemmx alla Ă„Â§liefu, li jagĂ„Â§ti l-Ă„Â§ajja u jagĂ„Â§ti l-mewt. Mela emmnu f'Alla u fil- MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, il-Profeta bla tagĂ„Â§lim li jemmen f'Alla u fi Kliemu, u imxu warajh, biex forsi timxu fit-triq it- tajba

159.translation: Fostnies Mosc hemm gemgĂ„Â§a li tmexxi (lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) bis-sewwa, u bih jagĂ„Â§mlu Ă„Â§aqq

160.translation: U qassamniehom fi tnax-il tribi (Ă„Â§ergin mit-tnax-il tifel ta' Gakobb; tnax-il) gens. U nebbaĂ„Â§na lil Mosc, meta niesu talbuh l-ilma (u gĂ„Â§ednielu): 'Olqot il-Ă„Â§agra bil- Ă„Â§atar tiegĂ„Â§eki' Minnha Ă„Â§argu tnax-il gĂ„Â§ajn (ta' l-ilma), hekk li kulĂ„Â§add kien jaf minn fejn seta' jixrob. U dellilna fuqhom bis-sĂ„Â§ab (konrra l-qilla tax-xemx), u. nizzilna fuqhom il-manna (li tidher fis-sigar) u s-summien (u gĂ„Â§ednielhom): ''Kulu mill-Ă„Â§wejjeg tajba li tajniekomi' (Izda huma Ă„Â§aduha kontrina), u ma naqsux lejna, izda kienu qegĂ„Â§din jonqsu lejhom infushom

161.translation: U (ftakar MuĂ„Â§ammad) meta ntqalilhom: 'GĂ„Â§ixu f'din il-belt, kulu minnha kemm tixtiequ, u gĂ„Â§idu: '(Nitolbu) il-MaĂ„Â§fral' IdĂ„Â§lu mill-bieb (tal-belt) b'Ă„Â§arsitkom lejn l- art. AĂ„Â§na naĂ„Â§frulkom Ă„Â§tijietkom, u se nzidu sehem dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

162.translation: U dawk fosthom li gĂ„Â§amlu l-Ă„Â§azen biddlu dak li kien intqalilhom bi kliem (ieĂ„Â§or). GĂ„Â§alhekk bgĂ„Â§atna fuqhom kastig mis-sema minĂ„Â§abba l-Ă„Â§azen tagĂ„Â§hom

163.translation: Staqsihom (MuĂ„Â§ammad lil-Lhud) dwar il-belt li kienet Ă„Â§dejn il-baĂ„Â§ar, meta kisru s-Sibt: meta l-Ă„Â§ut tagĂ„Â§hom kien jitla' f'wicc il-baĂ„Â§ar f'jum is-Sibt tagĂ„Â§hom, u meta ma jkunx jum is-Sibt (il-Ă„Â§ur) ma kienx jigihom. Hekk garrabniehom talli kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§azen

164.translation: (Meta gemgĂ„Â§a minnhom qalet: ''GĂ„Â§aliex twissu fu twiddbu) lil nies li Alla se jeqred, jew se jikkastiga b'kastig qalilf 7 Qalu: 'Biex inkunu bla Ă„Â§tija quddiem Sidkom, u biex forsi jibzgĂ„Â§u (minn Alla)

165.translation: (U meta nsew dak li kienu mwissija, Ă„Â§lisna lil-dawk li kienu jgĂ„Â§idu lill-Ă„Â§ziena biex ma jagĂ„Â§mlux il-Ă„Â§azen, u lil dawk li dinbu tajniehom) kastig aĂ„Â§rax. talli: kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§azen

166.translation: U meta tkessĂ„Â§u u kisru dak li ma kienx jiswa gĂ„Â§alihom, gĂ„Â§ednielhom: ''Kunu xadini umiljati (u mibgĂ„Â§uda)f

167.translation: U (fiakar MuĂ„Â§ammad) li Sidek Ă„Â§abbar li tassew se jibgĂ„Â§at fuqhom, sa (ma jasal) Jum il-Qawmien, lil min jgĂ„Â§addihom minn tbatija mill-agĂ„Â§ar. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidek malajr jagĂ„Â§ti l-kastig, izda Huwa Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

168.translation: AĂ„Â§na. (lil-Lhud) qassamniehom fi gnus (u xerridniehom) fuq l-art. Hemm minnhom tajbin, u oĂ„Â§rajn ma humiex hekk. AĂ„Â§na garrabniehom bil-gid u bid-deni, biex forsi jerggĂ„Â§u lura (lejna)

169.translation: Warajhom gew nies (Ă„Â§ziena oĂ„Â§ra) li wirtu l-Ktieb (tat- Tora), u Ă„Â§adu l-frugĂ„Â§a ta' din id-dinja, filwaqt li qalu; tSe jinĂ„Â§afrilna (kulma nagĂ„Â§mlu).' Izda jekk terga' tigihom frugĂ„Â§a (oĂ„Â§ra) bĂ„Â§alha, huma jeĂ„Â§duha. Jaqaw ma humiex marbuta bil-patt tal-Ktieb (tat-Tord, dak il-patt li jorbothom) li ma jgĂ„Â§idux dwar Alla Ă„Â§lief is-sewwa' Huma studjaw (ur jafu sewwa) dak li hemm fih (dan il- Ktieb). U d-Dar l-OĂ„Â§ra hija aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§al dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla. Mela ma tifhmux

170.translation: Izda dawk li jzommu sewwa mal-Ktieb u jagĂ„Â§mlu t- talb, AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq m'AĂ„Â§niex se ntellfu l-Ă„Â§las ta' dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu l-gid

171.translation: U (ftakar: MuĂ„Â§ammad) meta. hezzizna. l-muntanja u gĂ„Â§ollejnieha fuqhom. qisha saqaf, u Ă„Â§asbu li kienet niezla fuqhom. (GĂ„Â§ednielhom): 'Zommu bil-qawwa ma' dak li tajniekom, u ftakru f'li fih, biex forsi tibzgĂ„Â§u minn Allaf

172.translation: U (ftakar ukoll) meta Sidek Ă„Â§areg minn ulied Adam, minn Ă„Â§danhom, in-nisel tagĂ„Â§hom, u gagĂ„Â§alhom jixhdu gĂ„Â§alihom infushom (iera qalilhom): ''Jaqaw m'iniex Sidkom'' Qalu: 'Melal AĂ„Â§na nixhdu (gĂ„Â§al danji' (Dan sar biex) f'Jum il-Qawmien ma tgĂ„Â§idux: ''AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq kellna moĂ„Â§Ă„Â§na mtajjar dwar dan (u ma tajniex kas)

173.translation: Jew (inkella) tgĂ„Â§idu: ''Imma, qabel, missirijietna xierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla), u aĂ„Â§na (m'aĂ„Â§niex Ă„Â§lief) nisel (li gejna) warajhom. Jaqaw se teqridna minĂ„Â§abba dak li gĂ„Â§amlu l-qarrieqa

174.translation: Hekk infissru bir-reqqa s-sinjali (tagĂ„Â§na), u forsi jerggĂ„Â§u lura (gĂ„Â§as-sewwa)

175.translation: GĂ„Â§idilhom (MuĂ„Â§ammad lil-Lhud) il-grajja ta' dak li tajnieh is-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na; izda hu warrab minnhom, u x- Xitan mexa warajh hekk li kien minn dawk li tilfu t-triq

176.translation: Kieku ridna, konna nerfgĂ„Â§uh bihom (bis-sinjal tagĂ„Â§na ti jkun fost l-gĂ„Â§orrief u l-gusti), izda huwa miel lejn l-art u mexa wara xewqatu. Huwa bĂ„Â§all-kelb li, jekk taĂ„Â§bat gĂ„Â§alih (biex rkeccih), jilheg, jew jekk tĂ„Â§allih (fil-kwiet), jilheg (ukoll). Dan huwa bĂ„Â§an-nies li jgiddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na. Mela gĂ„Â§id il-grajjiet (ta' nies il-qedem) biex forsi jixtarru (is-siwi tagĂ„Â§hom)

177.translation: Huma ta' ezempju Ă„Â§azin in-nies li jgiddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na, u kienu qegĂ„Â§din jonqsu lejhom infushom

178.translation: Dakeli Alla jurih it-triq, huwa tassew fit-triq it-tajba, u dawk li Huwa jtellef (/i/hom). it-triq, dawk huma t- telliefa

179.translation: AĂ„Â§na Ă„Â§laqna gĂ„Â§all-Infern Ă„Â§afna minn fost il-gini u l- bnedmin: (dawn) gĂ„Â§andhom qlub li ma jifhmux bihom, gĂ„Â§andhom gĂ„Â§ajnejn li ma jarawx bihom, u gĂ„Â§andhom widnejn li ma jisimgĂ„Â§ux bihom. Huma bĂ„Â§all-frat, anzi huma aktar mitlufin (minnhom). Dawk huma ta' moĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ imtajjar

180.translation: Ta' Alla huma l-isbaĂ„Â§ ismijieti'' Mela sejĂ„Â§ulu bihom, u itilqu lil-dawk li jzebilĂ„Â§u l-ismijiet tiegĂ„Â§u. Huma gĂ„Â§ad jitĂ„Â§allsu talli kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

181.translation: U minn dawk li Ă„Â§laqna hemm: nazzjon li jmexxi (i/ Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) bis-sewwa, u bih jagĂ„Â§mlu Ă„Â§aqq

186.translation: Daktli Alla jtellef (/i/u) it-triq, ma gĂ„Â§andu lil-Ă„Â§add min imexxih. Huwa jĂ„Â§allihom jiggerrew, mitlufin, fil-Ă„Â§tija kbira tagĂ„Â§hom

187.translation: Huma jistaqsuk (MuĂ„Â§ammad) dwar is-SiegĂ„Â§a, meta gĂ„Â§andha tasal. GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): 'L-gĂ„Â§arfien dwarha jinsab biss gĂ„Â§and Sidil Ă„Â¦add Ă„Â§liefu ma juriha fi zmienha, Hija Ă„Â§aga kbira, fis-smewwiet u fl-art (iz saret tal-biza' gĂ„Â§al kulĂ„Â§add). Hija ma. tasalx fuqkom Ă„Â§lief gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§arrieda. ' Huma jistaqsuk bĂ„Â§allikieku inti taf sew fuqha, GĂ„Â§idilhom (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''L-gĂ„Â§arfien dwarha jinsab biss gĂ„Â§and Allat Izda l-kotra tan-nies ma jafux (gĂ„Â§aliex Alla Ă„Â§eba minnhom iz-zmien meta gĂ„Â§andha tasal)

188.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'liena ma'nistax inkun ta' siwi gĂ„Â§alija nnifsi, jew ta' deni, Ă„Â§lief dak li jrid Alla (gĂ„Â§alija), /) u kieku kont naf il-mistur, kont (raza (i) nikseb aktar gid, u li ma jmissnix id-deni. Jiena m'iniex gĂ„Â§ajr dak li jwissi u jagĂ„Â§ti l-bxara t-tajba lil nies li jemmnu

189.translation: Huwa li Ă„Â§alaqkom minn ruĂ„Â§ waĂ„Â§da (Adam), u minnu gĂ„Â§amel lil martu (Eva) biex jitwennes biha. U meta gĂ„Â§attieha. (u. ngĂ„Â§aqad magĂ„Â§ha). (gĂ„Â§all-bidu). Ă„Â§oblot Ă„Â§biela Ă„Â§afifa u garritha (mingĂ„Â§ajr ffixkil). Meta mbagĂ„Â§ad (maz-zmien dik il-Ă„Â§biela). tqalet, huma. t-tnejn. sejĂ„Â§u lil Alla Sidhom ( 4 qalu): ''Jekk tagĂ„Â§tina (wild) tajjeb, qawwi u sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§, aĂ„Â§na tassew nizzuk Ă„Â§ajr

190.translation: U meta ((il nisel Adam u Eva) tahom (wild) tajjeb, qawwi u sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§, huma. t-tnejn (il-genituri) xierku (lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) miegĂ„Â§u f'dak li (A/la) tahom. Alla wisq ogĂ„Â§la minn dak li (il-pagani) ixierku miegĂ„Â§u

191.translation: Jaqaw ixierku miegĂ„Â§u lil dawk li ma joĂ„Â§olqu xejn, izda huma maĂ„Â§luqa

192.translation: Huma ma jistgĂ„Â§ux jgĂ„Â§inuhom, u lanqas jistgĂ„Â§u jgĂ„Â§inu lilhom infushom

193.translation: U jekk issejĂ„Â§ulhom lejn tmexxija tajba, ma jigux warajkom. Xorta waĂ„Â§da gĂ„Â§alikom, sew jekk issejĂ„Â§ulhom. u sew jekk tibqgĂ„Â§u sektin

194.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li intom issejĂ„Â§u, minflok Alla, huma qaddejja bĂ„Â§alkom. SejĂ„Â§ulhom, u Ă„Â§alluhom iwegbukom, jekk qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa

195.translation: Jaqaw gĂ„Â§andhom riglejn biex jimxu bihom, jew idejn biex jaĂ„Â§tfu bihom, jew gĂ„Â§ajnejn biex jaraw bihom, jew widnejn biex jisimgĂ„Â§u bihom 2 GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): SejĂ„Â§u lil (dawn) sĂ„Â§abkom (u itolbuhom l-gĂ„Â§ajnuna), u onsbuni (kemm tridu flimkien ma' l-allat tagĂ„Â§kom), u tagĂ„Â§tunix nifsl

196.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla huwa Dak li jĂ„Â§arisni, Dak li nizzel il- Ktieb. Huwa jieĂ„Â§u Ă„Â§sieb il-gusti

197.translation: U dawk (l-allat). li intom issejĂ„Â§u, minflok Alla, ma jistgĂ„Â§ux jgĂ„Â§inukom, u lanqas jistgĂ„Â§u jgĂ„Â§inu lilhom infushom

198.translation: U jekk issejĂ„Â§ulhom lejn: it-tmexxija t-tajba, ma jisimgĂ„Â§ux. Tarahom iĂ„Â§arsu lejk (MuĂ„Â§ammad), izda huma ma jarawx

199.translation: Zomm mal-maĂ„Â§fra (MuĂ„Â§ammad), amar ix-xieraq, u. warrab mill-injurantil

200.translation: U jekk jolqtok xi tkeskis gĂ„Â§all-Ă„Â§azen mix-Xitan, stkenn f'Alla. Huwa jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

201.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li gĂ„Â§andhom il-biza' ta' Alla, meta jmisshom xi tigrib mix-Xitan, jiftakru (fil-kasrig ta' Alla) uara, (malajr jerggĂ„Â§u) jaraw (is-sewwa)

202.translation: (Izda Ă„Â§uthom fix-xjaren li ssieĂ„Â§bu magĂ„Â§hom fil-Ă„Â§azen) izidu jgĂ„Â§addsuhom fil-Ă„Â§tija, bla qatt ma jieqfu

203.translation: U jekk ma ggibilhomx sinjal: (kif iriduk tagĂ„Â§mel), jgĂ„Â§idulek: 'GĂ„Â§aliex ma qlajtx xi wieĂ„Â§ed minn zniedek 7' GĂ„Â§id(ilkom): 'Jiena nimxi biss fuq dak li jitnebbaĂ„Â§ lili mingĂ„Â§and Sidi. Dan (il-Qoran) huwa Dawl gĂ„Â§all-moĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ minn Sidkom, u tmexxija tajba u Ă„Â§niena gĂ„Â§al nies li jemmnu

204.translation: U meta l-Qoran jinqara, isimgĂ„Â§uh u agĂ„Â§tu widen fis- skiet, biex forsi tintwera Ă„Â§niena magĂ„Â§kom

205.translation: U ftakar f'Sidek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) fik innifsek, bl-umilta u bil-biza', mhux b'leĂ„Â§en gĂ„Â§oli, filgĂ„Â§odu u filgĂ„Â§axija, u la tkunx minn dawk ta' moĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ imtajjar

206.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk (l-angli) li jinsabu gĂ„Â§and Sidek ma jitkabbrux fil-qima tiegĂ„Â§u. Huma jsebbĂ„Â§uh u jinxteĂ„Â§tu fl- art quddiemu

1.translation: Jistaqsuk (MuĂ„Â§ammad) fuq il-priza tat-taqbida (ta' Badr, u kif se tinqasam.) GĂ„Â§idil(hom): 'iIl-priza tat-taqbida hija ta' Alla u tal-MibgĂ„Â§ut (tiegĂ„Â§u). Mela ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, sewwu l-inkwier) ta' bejnietkom, u oqogĂ„Â§du gĂ„Â§al Alla u gĂ„Â§all- MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, jekk intom temmnuf

2.translation: Dawk li jemmnu ma: humiex gĂ„Â§ajr dawk li, meta jissemma' Alla, qlubhom jibzgĂ„Â§u, u meta jinqrawlhom il- versi. tiegĂ„Â§u. (fil-Qoran). jizdiedu. fit-twemmin u jĂ„Â§allu f'idejn Sidhom

3.translation: dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-talb, u jonfqu (gĂ„Â§al Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) mill-gid li tajniehom

4.translation: Dawk huma li jemmnu tassew. TagĂ„Â§hom huma gradi (ta' tjieba) gĂ„Â§and Sidhom, u maĂ„Â§fra u gĂ„Â§ajxien kotran

5.translation: Hekk ukoll Sidek Ă„Â§argek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) minn darek bis- sewwa (biex titqabad), minkejja li gemgĂ„Â§a fost dawk li jemmnu stkerrhu (din il-Ă„Â§aga)

6.translation: u qagĂ„Â§du jĂ„Â§aqquha miegĂ„Â§ek dwar is-sewwa. (ta' l-gĂ„Â§azla tiegĂ„Â§ek li toĂ„Â§rog gĂ„Â§at-taqbida kontra l-pagani ta' Mekka) wara li (dan is-sewwa) deher bic-car, bĂ„Â§allikieku (fic- certezza tagĂ„Â§hom li se jitilfu, stĂ„Â§ajlu lilhom. infushom) misjuqin lejn il-mewt, filwaqt li kienu qegĂ„Â§din jaraw (dan iseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§)

7.translation: U (ftakru) meta Alla wegĂ„Â§edkom li waĂ„Â§da miz-zewg gemgĂ„Â§at (jigifieri jew il-karovana niezla mis-Sirja, bil-gid kollu tagĂ„Â§ha, jew l-armata tat-tribir ta' Qurajx) se tkun tagĂ„Â§kom. Intom xtaqtu li dik mingĂ„Â§ajr armi tkun tagĂ„Â§kom. Izda Alla ried li bil-kelmiet tiegĂ„Â§u jwettaq is-sewwa, u jaqta' (u jgib fix-xejn) dak li baqa' minn dawk li ma jemmnux

8.translation: Dan biex iwettaq is-sewwa (ta' l-Islam) u jgib fix-xejn il- qerq (ta' dawk bla twemmin), anki jekk (dan) jistmerruh il- Ă„Â§atjin

9.translation: U (ftakru wkoll) meta. tlabtu l-gĂ„Â§ajnuna ta' Sidkom (biex joĂ„Â§rogkom rebbiĂ„Â§in fuq il-pagani ta' Mekka), u wegibkom: ''TabilĂ„Â§aqq ngĂ„Â§inkom b'elf anglu, wieĂ„Â§ed wara l-ieĂ„Â§ori

10.translation: (Dan) Alla ma gĂ„Â§amlux jekk mhux bĂ„Â§ala bxara tajba (gĂ„Â§alikom). u biex qlubkom isibu serĂ„Â§an bih: Ma hemmx rebĂ„Â§a Ă„Â§lief mingĂ„Â§and Allal Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq Qawwi u GĂ„Â§aref

11.translation: U (ftakru) meta gab fuqkom in-ngĂ„Â§as bi sliem mingĂ„Â§andu, u nizzel fuqkom ilma mis-sema biex I isaffikom bih, ineĂ„Â§Ă„Â§i minn fuqkom it-tfesfis tax-Xitan (/i J bih qagĂ„Â§ad. ibezzagĂ„Â§kom bla waqfien), iqawwilkom l qlubkom (bit-tama tar-rebĂ„Â§a), u bih isaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§aĂ„Â§ ir-riglejn

12.translation: U (ftakar ukoll) meta Sidek nebbaĂ„Â§ lill-angli (hekk): Jiena magĂ„Â§koml Mela saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§u (bit-tama tar-rebĂ„Â§a) lil dawk li jemmnul Jiena se nixĂ„Â§et il-biza' fi qlub dawk li ma' jemmnux. Mela ;olqtu/hom) fuq l-gĂ„Â§enuq, u idorbulhom truf subgĂ„Â§ajhom kollha

13.translation: Dan minĂ„Â§abba li Ă„Â§aduha kontra Alla u l-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u. Min jeĂ„Â§odha kontra Alla u l-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq Qalil fil-kastig (li jĂ„Â§ejji gĂ„Â§alih)

14.translation: (Jintqal lill-pagani): ''Dak (huwa l-kastig li Ă„Â§aqqkom): Mela duquh, u (kun afa) li gĂ„Â§al dawk li ma jemmnux hemm il-kastig tan-Nari

15.translation: Intom li temmnu, meta tiltaqgĂ„Â§u ma' dawk li-ma jemmnux resqin lejkom. gĂ„Â§at-taqbid, la (tibzgĂ„Â§ux minnhom (u). tagĂ„Â§tuhomx daharkom (biex taĂ„Â§arbu minnhom)

16.translation: Dakinhar min jagĂ„Â§tihom dahru (biex jaĂ„Â§rab), Ă„Â§lief jekk jirtira biex wara jerga' lura fit-taqbid, jew gĂ„Â§aliex ikun sejjer jgĂ„Â§in gemgĂ„Â§a (oĂ„Â§ra fit-taqbid), dan jigbed fuqu gĂ„Â§adab minn Alla, u l-kenn tiegĂ„Â§u jkun l-Infern. (Dari ikun tassew) tmiem ta' gĂ„Â§ajbl

17.translation: Mhux intom. qtiltuhom (lill-pagani), izda Alla qatilhom, u (inti: MuĂ„Â§ammad), meta rmejt. (it-trab f'gĂ„Â§ajnejn il-pagani), ma kontx inti li-rmejt, izda Alla rema, biex igarrab lil dawk li jemmnu b'tigrib tajjeb: J mingĂ„Â§andu. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

18.translation: Dak (gara tassew). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla jdgĂ„Â§ajjef in-nasba ta' dawk li ma jemmnux

19.translation: (Intom pagani ta' Mekka) jekk titolbu r-rebĂ„Â§a (fisq il- Misilmin), ir-rebĂ„Â§a issa gietkom (imma f'gĂ„Â§amla ta' telfa kbira.) Jekk tieqfu (mill-Ă„Â§bir tagĂ„Â§kom fuq dawk li jemmnu), ikun aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§alikom, izda jekk terggĂ„Â§u lura (gĂ„Â§at-taqbid), aĂ„Â§na nerggĂ„Â§u lura (ukoll), u xejn ma tiswielkom il-gemgĂ„Â§a tagĂ„Â§kom, anki jekk kotrana. U (kimu afu) li Alla ma' dawk li jemmnu

20.translation: Intom li temmnu, oqogĂ„Â§du gĂ„Â§al Alla u gĂ„Â§all-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, u la tagĂ„Â§tuhx daharkom (u twebbsu qalbkom) meta intom tisimgĂ„Â§ufh ikellimkom fil-Qoran)i

21.translation: La tkunux bĂ„Â§al dawk (il-pagani) li jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Smajna,' izda ma jisimgĂ„Â§ux (tassew)

22.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-agĂ„Â§ar bhejjem gĂ„Â§al Alla huma t-torox u l- imbikkma li ma jifhmux

23.translation: Li kieku Alla sab xi Ă„Â§aga tajba fihom, kien isemmagĂ„Â§hom. Izda kieku gĂ„Â§amilhom jisimgĂ„Â§u, (xorta waĂ„Â§da) kienu jagĂ„Â§tu daharhom u jwarrbu (il-kelma ta' Alla)

24.translation: Intom li temmnu, wiegbu lil Alla u lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut (tiegĂ„Â§u) meta jsejĂ„Â§ilkom gĂ„Â§al dak (it-twemmin fil-Qoran) li jagĂ„Â§tikom il-Ă„Â§ajja. U kunu afu li Alla (jinfed u) jidĂ„Â§ol bejn il-bniedem u qalbu, u li gĂ„Â§andu gĂ„Â§ad tingabru

25.translation: U ibzgĂ„Â§u minn tigrib li ma jolqotx biss lil dawk minnkom li dinbu. Kunu afu li Alla Qalil fil-kastig

26.translation: Ftakru meta (intom, l-ewwel Misilmin f'Mekka) kontu ftit u maĂ„Â§qurin fuq l-art (fost il-pagani), tibzgĂ„Â§u li n-nies jaĂ„Â§tfukom, izda. ( 4//a) takom il-kenn (fil-belt ta' Medina), u saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§aĂ„Â§kom bir-rebĂ„Â§a tiegĂ„Â§u, u takom mill- Ă„Â§wejjeg tajba gĂ„Â§all-gĂ„Â§ajxien. (tagĂ„Â§kom, mill-priza li qbadhu), biex forsi tizzu Ă„Â§ajr

27.translation: Intom li temmnu, la tittradixxux lil Alla u lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut, u la. tittradixxux. l-obbligazzjonijiet u l-Ă„Â§wejjeg fdati lilkom meta intom tafu (li ma gĂ„Â§andkomx tagĂ„Â§mlu hekk)

28.translation: U kunu afu li gidkom u wliedkom huma biss tigrib (mingĂ„Â§and Alla biex jara x'se tagĂ„Â§mlu bihom), u li Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq gĂ„Â§andu Ă„Â§las kbir

29.translation: Intom li temmnu, jekk tibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, jagĂ„Â§tikom qjies (f'qalbkom li bih. tkejlu. t-tajjeb u. l-Ă„Â§azin), iĂ„Â§assrilkom l-gĂ„Â§emejjel Ă„Â§ziena tagĂ„Â§kom, u. jaĂ„Â§frilkom. Alla huwa ta' tjieba bla tarf

30.translation: Ftakar (MuĂ„Â§ammad), meta dawk li ma jemmnux nassulek biex jaqbduk jew biex joqtluk, jew. (inkella) biex ikeccuk (minn Mekka). Huma jnassu, u Alla jnasses, izda Alla huwa l-Aqwa fost dawk li jnassu

31.translation: U meta l-versi tagĂ„Â§na jinqrawlhom, jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Smajna (dan qabel). Kieku ridna, stajna gĂ„Â§edna (kliem) bĂ„Â§al dan. Dawn ma humiex gĂ„Â§ajr l-istejjer ta' nies il-qedem

32.translation: U (ftakar) meta qalu: 'O Alla, jekk dan (il-Qoran) huwa s-sewwa mingĂ„Â§andek, mela nizzel fuqna xita ta' gebel mis-sema (bĂ„Â§alma nizzilt fuq nies Lot fl-imgĂ„Â§oddi), jew agĂ„Â§tina kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

33.translation: Izda Alla ma kienx se jikkastigahom waqt li inti (MuĂ„Â§ammad) kont gĂ„Â§adek fosthom (f'Mekka), Lanqas ma kien se jikkastigahom galadarba (kien gĂ„Â§ad hemm Misilmin li) kienu jitolbuh il-maĂ„Â§fta

34.translation: x'fargumentij gĂ„Â§andhom biex. Alla. ma jikkastigahomx, meta huma jzommu (lil: Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) mill-Moskea mqaddsa (f'Mekka u. l-ewwel. Misilmin kellhom jitilqu minn hemm). u ma kinux in-nies li jieĂ„Â§du Ă„Â§siebha (u jĂ„Â§arsuha). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li jieĂ„Â§du Ă„Â§siebha (u jĂ„Â§arsuha) huma biss dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla, izda Ă„Â§afna minnhom ma jafux

35.translation: It-talb tagĂ„Â§hom fid-dar (ta' A/la) ma huwiex gĂ„Â§ajr tisfir u capcip. Mela duqu l-kastig (tat-relfa kbira li garrabtu fit-taqbida ta' Badr), talli ma kontux temmnu

36.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li ma jemmnux jonfqu gidhom biex izommu (lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) mit-triq ta' Alla (li hi l-Islam). Huma se jonfquh: (gidhom: kollu. fit-taqbid kontra. l- Misilmin). ImbagĂ„Â§ad jisgĂ„Â§obbihom (gĂ„Â§aliex jintebĂ„Â§u li kien kollu gĂ„Â§alxejn), u mbagĂ„Â§ad jingĂ„Â§elbu. Dawk li ma jemmnux jingabru fl-Infern

37.translation: biex Alla. jnaqqi. l-Ă„Â§azin. mit-tajjeb, u l-Ă„Â§ziena jagĂ„Â§milhom fuq xulxin, jgĂ„Â§abbihom (gozz wieĂ„Â§ed) ilkoll, u jqegĂ„Â§edhom fl-Infern. Dawk huma t-tellifin

38.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad) lil-dawk li ma jemmnux li, jekk jieqfu (mill-Ă„Â§azen tagĂ„Â§hom), jinĂ„Â§afrilhom dak li gĂ„Â§adda, izda jekk jerggĂ„Â§u lura (gĂ„Â§alli kienu, Ă„Â§a jkunu jafu li) gĂ„Â§addiet (qabilhom) id-drawwa ta' nies il-qedem (bĂ„Â§ala twissija)

39.translation: U tqatlu kontrihom sa ma jkunx hemm aktar tigrib u moĂ„Â§qrija (kontra l-Misilmin), u l-qima tkun kollha ta' Alla. Izda jekk jieqfu (mill-ostilita), Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq jara kulma jagĂ„Â§mlu

40.translation: Izda jekk jagĂ„Â§tu daharhom (u ma jagĂ„Â§tux widen), kunu afu li Alla huwa l-Mulej tagĂ„Â§kom (i; jĂ„Â§ariskom). Ma hemm Ă„Â§add aĂ„Â§jar minnu fil-Ă„Â§arsien, u Ă„Â§add aĂ„Â§jar minnu fl-gĂ„Â§ajnuna

41.translation: U kunu afu li wieĂ„Â§ed minn Ă„Â§amsa mill-priza li taqbdu (fiz- taqbid) huwa gĂ„Â§al Alla u gĂ„Â§all-MibgĂ„Â§ut, u gĂ„Â§all-qraba (il- fqar tal-MibgĂ„Â§ut), u gĂ„Â§all-iltiema u gĂ„Â§all-fqar u gĂ„Â§al min iterraq, jekk tassew temmnu f'Alla f'dak li nizzilna fuq il- qaddej tagĂ„Â§na f'jum l-gĂ„Â§azla (bejn it-tajjeb u l-Ă„Â§azin, fit- taqbida ta' Badr), fil-jum meta z-zewg gemgĂ„Â§at iltaqgĂ„Â§u (biex jitqabdu). Alla fuq kollox SetgĂ„Â§an

42.translation: (U ftakar MuĂ„Â§ammad) meta kontu fuq l-eqreb xaqliba (tal-wied, fuq in-naĂ„Â§a ta' Medina) u huma fuq ix-xaqliba l- aktar imbiegĂ„Â§da (tal-wied), u l-karovana (ta' Qurajx) kienet 'l isfel minnkom (fil-wita qrib xatt il-baĂ„Â§ar). Li kieku wegĂ„Â§edtu lil xulxin (meta u fejn tiltaqgĂ„Â§u), ma kontux izzommu l-wegĂ„Â§da (u ma kontux tiltaqgĂ„Â§u minĂ„Â§abba li kontu tibzgĂ„Â§u minn xulxin), izda (il-laqgĂ„Â§a tagĂ„Â§kom seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§et) biex Alla jgib fis-seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ Ă„Â§aga li kienet maĂ„Â§suba (minn qabel): biex min. (dakinhar. kellu) jinqered (gĂ„Â§aliex mingĂ„Â§ajr twemmin), jinqered b'sinjal car (tal-qawwa tiegĂ„Â§u), u min baqa' Ă„Â§aj (bit-twemmin); jgĂ„Â§ix (huwa ukoll) b'sinjal car. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

43.translation: (Ftakar ukoll MuĂ„Â§ammad) meta. Alla wrihomlok (l- gĂ„Â§edewwa) fil-Ă„Â§olma tiegĂ„Â§ek bĂ„Â§allikieku kienu ftit (i mrlejt kuragg). U li kieku wrihomlok bĂ„Â§allikieku kienu Ă„Â§afna, kontu tinfixlu (u taqtgĂ„Â§u qalbkom), u kontu titlewmu dwar (din). il-Ă„Â§aga. (tat-taqbid), izda. Alla Ă„Â§eles. (lilkom. mit- taĂ„Â§wid). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li huwa jaf b'dak li hemm fil-qlub

44.translation: U (ftakar) meta. ltqajtu (inromr il-Misilmin u. l-gĂ„Â§adu tagĂ„Â§kom. fit-taqbida ta' Badr. Alla): wrihomlkom. (l- gĂ„Â§edewwa tagĂ„Â§kom) bĂ„Â§allikieku kienu ftit f'gĂ„Â§ajnejkom, u fl-istess: Ă„Â§in) cekkinkom f'gĂ„Â§ajnejhom, biex igib fis-seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ Ă„Â§aga li kienet maĂ„Â§suba (minni qabel). Kollox jitregga' lura gĂ„Â§and Alla (gĂ„Â§all-Gudizzju tiegĂ„Â§u)

45.translation: Intom li temmnu, meta tiltaqgĂ„Â§u ma' gemgĂ„Â§a (fit-taqbid), zommu sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ u ftakru Ă„Â§afna f'Alla (u faĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ruh), biex forsi toĂ„Â§orgu rebbiĂ„Â§in

46.translation: U oqogĂ„Â§du gĂ„Â§al Alla u gĂ„Â§all-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u (f'kulma tagĂ„Â§mlu), u la titlewmux, li ma. tinfixlux (u taqtgĂ„Â§u qalbkom) u qawwitkom titlaq(kom). U stabru (fit-taqbid); Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq ma' dawk li jistabru

47.translation: U la tkunux bĂ„Â§al dawk (iiinn nies Qurajx) li Ă„Â§argu minn djarhom (gĂ„Â§at-taqbida ta' Badr) imkabbrin, gĂ„Â§al gĂ„Â§ajnejn in-nies, u jzommu (li/ Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) mit-triq ta' Alla (fi hija l-Islam). Alla jaf sewwa b'dak li jagĂ„Â§mlu

48.translation: (U fiakar MuĂ„Â§ammad) meta x-Xitan. zejnilhom l- gĂ„Â§emejjel tagĂ„Â§hom (lill-pagani), u qal(ilhom): ''llum. Ă„Â§add minn fost in-nies ma jegĂ„Â§libkom, filwaqt li jiena nĂ„Â§ariskom:' Izda meta z-zewg gemgĂ„Â§at raw lil-xulxin, dawwar denbu u qal: 'Jiena ma gĂ„Â§andix x'naqsam magĂ„Â§kom. Jiena nara dak. li intom ma tarawx, u jiena nibza' minn Alla, gĂ„Â§aliex Alla huwa Qalil fil-kastig

49.translation: (Ftakar ukoll) meta dawk ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or u dawk b'marda fi qlubhom qalu: 'Dawn, ir-religjon tagĂ„Â§hom. qarrqet bihom. ' Izda min iĂ„Â§alli f'idejn Alla (isib li) Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq Qawwi u GĂ„Â§aref

50.translation: Li kieku tista' tara (MuĂ„Â§ammad id-dehra) meta l-angli jieĂ„Â§du l-erwieĂ„Â§ ta' dawk li ma jemmnux (li ggieldu fit- taqbida ta' Badr kontra l-Misilmin), (kif) jidorbuhom fuq wicchom u fuq daharhom (filwaqt li jgĂ„Â§idulhom); 'Duqu l-kastig tan-Nar iĂ„Â§eggegl

51.translation: Dan minĂ„Â§abba (il-Ă„Â§azen) li gĂ„Â§amlu idejkom, gĂ„Â§aliex Alla ma jonqosx lejn il-qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§u

52.translation: (Ă„Â¦azina triqithom) bĂ„Â§al ta' nies il-FargĂ„Â§un, u dawk ta' qabilhom. Huma caĂ„Â§du s-sinjali ta' Alla, u Alla kkastigahom ta' dnubiethom. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq Qawwi, u Qalil fil-kastig

53.translation: Dan minĂ„Â§abba li Alla qatt ma jibdel il-grazzja li jkun ta lil xi nies qabel ma (dawn) jibdlu dak li hemm fihom infushom ( 4 jidinbu kontrih). Alla jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

54.translation: (L-gĂ„Â§emejjel tagĂ„Â§hom) bĂ„Â§al ta' nies il-FargĂ„Â§un u ta' dawk ta' qabilhom. Huma giddbu s-sinjali tal-Mulej tagĂ„Â§hom. GĂ„Â§alhekk qridniehom minĂ„Â§abba dnubiethom, u gĂ„Â§erriqna nies il-FargĂ„Â§un. Huma kienu kollha Ă„Â§ziena

55.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li gĂ„Â§al Alla, l-agĂ„Â§ar fost il-Ă„Â§lejjaq huma dawk li caĂ„Â§du, u ma jemmnux

56.translation: f'dawk li dĂ„Â§alt f'rabta magĂ„Â§hom (biex ma jgĂ„Â§imux lill- Bagani), imbagĂ„Â§ad kull darba jiksru. l-patt tagĂ„Â§hom (miegĂ„Â§ek). Huma ma jibzgĂ„Â§ux minn Alla

57.translation: Mela'jjekk tassew (iseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§lek) taqbadhom. fil-gwerra (ikkastigahom, u bezza' u) xerred lil dawk li hemm warajhom; biex forsi jiftakru

58.translation: U jekk tassew tibza' (MuĂ„Â§ammad) mit-tradiment ta' xi nies, itfagĂ„Â§lhom lura. (il-patt tiegĂ„Â§ek magĂ„Â§hom, u gĂ„Â§arrafhom. li se. titqabad. kontrihom, u b'hekk tigu) indaqs (u tafu fiex qegĂ„Â§din). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla ma jĂ„Â§obbx lit-tradituri

59.translation: (Dawk li ma jemmnux ma gĂ„Â§andhom qatt jaĂ„Â§sbu li se jaĂ„Â§arbuflna minkejja li Ă„Â§elsuha mill-mewr fit-taqbida ta' Badr). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li ma jistgĂ„Â§ux jaĂ„Â§arbu l-kastig ta' Alla

60.translation: Ă„Â¦ejju kontrihom (l-gĂ„Â§edewwa) kemm tistgĂ„Â§u qawwiet u qtajja' ta' zwiemel li bihom tbezzgĂ„Â§u l-gĂ„Â§adu ta' Alla u l-gĂ„Â§adu tagĂ„Â§kom, (iv rbezzgĂ„Â§u wkoll nies) oĂ„Â§ra barra minnhom li intom ma tafuhomx (u gĂ„Â§alhekk ma tafux il- Ă„Â§azen u l-qerq tagĂ„Â§hom, izda lil dawn) jafhom Alla. Kull Ă„Â§aga li tonfqu gĂ„Â§al Alla, titĂ„Â§allsilkom sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ (f'din id-dinja u fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum), u ma tmorrux minn taĂ„Â§t

61.translation: (Izda jekk fl-gĂ„Â§edewwa) imilu lejn is-sliem, mela mil lejh (lejn is-sliem inti wkoll MuĂ„Â§ammad), u Ă„Â§alli f'idejn Alla. Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

62.translation: Izda jekk ikunu jridu jqarrqu bik (u mhux veru li jridu s-sliem), tabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla jkun bizzejjed gĂ„Â§alik. Huwa li qawwiek bl-gĂ„Â§ajnuna tiegĂ„Â§u u b'dawk li jemmnu

63.translation: (Mhux biss, talli kien Hu) li gab l-gĂ„Â§aqda fi qlubhom: Li kieku nfaqt kulma jinsab fuq l-art, ma kontx iggib (dik) l-gĂ„Â§aqda fi qlubhom, izda Alla gĂ„Â§aqqadhom (gĂ„Â§ax huwa Sid il-qlub). Huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq Qawwi u GĂ„Â§aref

64.translation: Ja Profeta, Alla huwa bizzejjed gĂ„Â§alik (u gĂ„Â§al) dawk li jemmnu li jimxu warajk

65.translation: Ja Profeta, Ă„Â§eggeg dawk li jemmnu biex jitqatlu. Jekk hemm fostkom gĂ„Â§oxrin (ruĂ„Â§) ta' sabar, (dawn) jegĂ„Â§lbu mitejn, u jekk fostkom hemm mija, (dawn) jegĂ„Â§lbu elf minn dawk li ma jemmnux, gĂ„Â§aliex (dawk ta' bla twemmin) huma nies li ma jifhmux (l-gĂ„Â§erf ta' Alla)

66.translation: Issa Alla Ă„Â§affifilkom (it-toqol li kellkom fuqkom bĂ„Â§ala Misilmin), u jaf li fikom hemm id-dgĂ„Â§ufija (u gĂ„Â§alhekk Ă„Â§em gĂ„Â§alikom fit-taqbid). Jekk fostkom hemm mitt (ruĂ„Â§) ta' sabar, (dawn) jegĂ„Â§lbu mitejn, u jekk fostkom hemm elf. (dawn) jegĂ„Â§lbu elfejn, bir-rieda ta' Alla. Alla huwa ma' dawk li jistabru

67.translation: Ma jixraqx li Profeta jzomm ilsiera (tal-gwerra) qabel ma jkun qatel Ă„Â§afna (mill-gĂ„Â§edewwa) fuq l-art (biex ibezza' lill-oĂ„Â§rajn). Intom tridu (tiksbu) dak li jgĂ„Â§addi (fil-Ă„Â§ajja ta' din) id-dinja, izda Alla jrid (li tiksbu l-aĂ„Â§jar Ă„Â§las fil-Ă„Â¦ajja) l-OĂ„Â§ra. Alla huwa Qawwi u GĂ„Â§aref

68.translation: Li kieku mhux minĂ„Â§abba digriet ta' Alla li kien laĂ„Â§aq Ă„Â§areg, (li min jizbalja fil-Ă„Â§sieb, b'intenzjoni tajba, ma jkunx ikkastigat), kieku kien imisskom kastig mill-kbar minĂ„Â§abba dak li Ă„Â§adtu (fi flus tal-fidwa ta' l-ilsiera tal- gwerra)

69.translation: Mela (issa) gawdu l-priza (tal-gwerra) li qbadtu, li tiswa u hija tajba (gĂ„Â§alikom). U ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

70.translation: Ja Profeta, gĂ„Â§id lill-ilsiera li gĂ„Â§andkom f'idejkom (wara t-taqbida ta' Badr): ''Jekk Alla jsib xi gid fi qlubkom, jagĂ„Â§tikom dak li huwa aĂ„Â§jar minn dak li ttieĂ„Â§ed. minnkom, u jaĂ„Â§frilkom. Alla Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

71.translation: Izda jekk iridu. jittraduk. (MuĂ„Â§ammad; u. juruk wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or, kun af li) huma tassew ittradew lil Alla (qabel it- taqbida ta' Badr), hekk li ta(k) is-setgĂ„Â§a fuqhom. Alla jaf kollox u GĂ„Â§aref

72.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li emmnu, emigraw (minn Mekka, art twelidhom) u. b'gidhom u bihom infushom tqabdu gĂ„Â§al Alla, kif ukoll dawk (minni fost nies Medina) li tawhom) kenn u gĂ„Â§enu(hom), dawn jidĂ„Â§lu gĂ„Â§al xulxin (u f l-gid jinqasam bejniethom); U dawk li emmnu, izda m'emigrawx, m'intomx marbutin li tĂ„Â§arsuhom, qabel ma. jemigraw. Izda jekk jitolbukom l-gĂ„Â§ajnuna dwar (Ă„Â§wejjeg li. jolqtu). ir-religjon, gĂ„Â§andkom. (id-dmir) tgĂ„Â§inuhom (kontra l-gĂ„Â§edewwa tagĂ„Â§hom, gĂ„Â§aliex: huma Ă„Â§utkom), Ă„Â§lief (jekk jirolbukom tgĂ„Â§inuhom kontra) dawk. li magĂ„Â§hom gĂ„Â§andkom patt. Alla jara sew dak li tagĂ„Â§mlu

73.translation: U dawk li ma jemmnux, iĂ„Â§arsu lil xulxin. U jekk ma tagĂ„Â§mlux dan (li nigali/koni, jigifieri li tĂ„Â§allu l-pagani u tingĂ„Â§aqdu ma' dawk li jemmnu), ikun hemm taĂ„Â§wid fuq l-art u Ă„Â§sara kbira

74.translation: Dawkeli emmnu, emigraw (minn Mekka) u tqabdu gĂ„Â§al Alla, u dawk (minn fost nies Medina) li tawfhom) kenn u gĂ„Â§enufhom), dawk huma li jemmnu tassew. TagĂ„Â§hom il- maĂ„Â§fra u gid kbir (fil-Genna)

75.translation: U dawk li, wara, emmnu, emigraw u tqabdu (gĂ„Â§al- twemmin) flimkien magĂ„Â§kom, dawk huma minnkom (u magĂ„Â§kom). Izda (f'dak li huwa l-wirt) il-qraba ta' gewwa huma eqreb lejn xulxin fil-Ktieb ta' Alla. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla jaf b'kollox

1.translation: Stqarrija minn. Alla. u mill-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u (MuĂ„Â§ammad) dwar Ă„Â§elsien minn obbligu lil dawk li jxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla) li dĂ„Â§altu f'patt magĂ„Â§hom

2.translation: terrqu (intom il-pagani li xxierku allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla) ma' l-art (kollha) gĂ„Â§al erba' xhur (u ebda deni ma huwa se jmisskom) izda kunu afu li intom m'intomx se taĂ„Â§arbu lil Alla, u li Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq ikasbar lil dawk li ma jemmnux

3.translation: U taĂ„Â§bira minn Alla u mill-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u lin-nies (migbura flimkien) f'jum il-pellegrinagg il-kbir: li Alla u l-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u huma Ă„Â§ielsa minn dawk li jxierku (ir ma gĂ„Â§andhom ebda obbligu lejhom). Jekk tindmu (u tibdew temmnu f'Alla wieĂ„Â§ed) dan ikun aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§alikom, izda jekk tagĂ„Â§tu daharkom (u ma tagĂ„Â§tux widen), kunu afu li m'intomx se taĂ„Â§arbu lil-Alla. AgĂ„Â§ti l-bxara (MuĂ„Â§ammad) lil dawk li ma jemmnux dwar kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

4.translation: Ă„Â§lief dawk (il-pagani) li jxierku, li dĂ„Â§altu f'patt magĂ„Â§hom u zammuh u ma naqsukom f'xejn, u lanqas ma gĂ„Â§enu lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or (minn fost l-gĂ„Â§edewwa tagĂ„Â§kom) kontrikom. Mela zommu. l-pattijiet (li gĂ„Â§andkom) magĂ„Â§hom sa tmiemhom. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla jĂ„Â§obb lil dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minnu (u jafix jzommu patt)

5.translation: Izda meta x-xhur imqaddsa jgĂ„Â§addu, oqtlu (lill-pagani) li jxierku, kull fejn issibuhom, aqbduhom. (ilsiera), dawruhom (minn kullimkien), u oqogĂ„Â§dulhom f'kull moĂ„Â§ba. Izda jekk jindmu, jagĂ„Â§mlu t-talb u jagĂ„Â§tu l-karita, eĂ„Â§ilsuhom. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

6.translation: Jekk wieĂ„Â§ed minn dawk li jxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla) jitolbok tĂ„Â§arsu, agĂ„Â§tih il-Ă„Â§arsien biex ikun jista' jisma' Kliem Alla (fil-Qoran), imbagĂ„Â§ad. (jekk ma jilqax l- Islam) wasslu sa fejn isib il-kenn. Dan minĂ„Â§abba li huma nies li ma jafux (is-siwi kbir ta' l-Islam)

7.translation: Kifjista' jkun li (il-pagani) li jxierku jkollhom patt ma' Alla u mal-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u (MuĂ„Â§ammad), Ă„Â§lief dawk li gĂ„Â§amiltu patt magĂ„Â§hom qrib il-Moskea mqaddsa (u zammuh)i. Sakemm. jimxu sew. magĂ„Â§kom, imxu sew magĂ„Â§hom. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq iĂ„Â§obb. lil dawk. li jibzgĂ„Â§u (minnu, u jafu jzommu patt)

8.translation: Kif (qatt jista' jkun hemm patt magĂ„Â§hom, meta dawn), jekk jegĂ„Â§lbukom, la jqisu li-huma qraba tagĂ„Â§kom u lanqas li hemm patt (Gejnietkom). Huma. (jippruvaw) jgĂ„Â§axxqukom bi (kliem). fommhom, izda qlubhom ma. jridux (li: jkollhom x'jaqsmu magĂ„Â§kom), u. Ă„Â§afna minnhom huma Ă„Â§ziena

9.translation: Huma biegĂ„Â§u' r-Rivelazzjoni ta' Alla (fil-Qoran) bi prezz irĂ„Â§is, u zammu (lil Ă„Â§afna) mit-triq tiegĂ„Â§u (li hija l- Islam). Kien tassew Ă„Â§azin dak li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

10.translation: La jqisu li huma qraba ta' dak li jemmen, u lanqas li hemm patt (miegĂ„Â§u). Dawk huma li jiksru l-ligi

11.translation: Izda jekk jindmu, jagĂ„Â§mlu t-talb u jagĂ„Â§tu l-karita, (huma jkunu) Ă„Â§utkom (indaqs) fid-din. AĂ„Â§na nfissru bir- reqqa r-Rivelazzjoni (tagĂ„Â§na) lil nies li jafu

12.translation: Izda jekk jiksru l-Ă„Â§alfa tagĂ„Â§hom, wara li daĂ„Â§lu fil-patt (magĂ„Â§kom), u jkasbru d-din tagĂ„Â§kom, mela tqatlu kontra l-irjus tac-caĂ„Â§da tat-twemmin tabilĂ„Â§aqq li gĂ„Â§alihom il- Ă„Â§alf ma huwa xejn biex forsi jieqfu (jagĂ„Â§mlu hekk)

13.translation: Jaqaw (m'intomx lesti) titqatlu kontra nies li kisru l-Ă„Â§alf tagĂ„Â§hom, raw kif ikeccu l-MibgĂ„Â§ut (MuĂ„Â§ammad minn Mekka), u kienu huma l-ewwel li bdew (iĂ„Â§ebbu) gĂ„Â§alikomz Jaqaw tibzgĂ„Â§u minnhomz Alla jistĂ„Â§oqqlu aktar li tibzgĂ„Â§u minnu, jekk tassew temmnu

14.translation: Tqatlu kontrihom, u Alla jikkastigahom: b'idejkom (stess), ikasbarhom, jgĂ„Â§inkom tegĂ„Â§lbuhom, u jserraĂ„Â§ qlub dawk li jemmnu (gĂ„Â§aliex jaraw l-Islam rebbieĂ„Â§)

15.translation: Huwa jneĂ„Â§Ă„Â§i l-gĂ„Â§adab ta' qlubhom. Alla jdur (bil- maĂ„Â§fra) lejn min irid. Alla jaf kollox u GĂ„Â§aref

16.translation: Jew taĂ„Â§sbu li se titĂ„Â§allew (mingĂ„Â§ajr tigrib u tintesew), bla ma Alla jkun jaf b'dawk fostkom li Ă„Â§abirku u tqabdu (gĂ„Â§alih), dawk li ma Ă„Â§adu (lil Ă„Â§add) bi Ă„Â§biebhom Ă„Â§lief lil Alla, lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, u lil dawk li jemmnu. Alla jaf sew b'dak li tagĂ„Â§mlu

17.translation: Dawk li jxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla) ma gĂ„Â§andhomx izuru l-moskej ta' Alla, filwaqt li jixhdu gĂ„Â§alihom infushom li huma bla twemmin. Dawk, l-gĂ„Â§emejjel tagĂ„Â§hom jigu fix-xejn, u fin-Nar jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem

18.translation: Izur biss il-moskej ta' Alla min jemmen f'Alla u fl- AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum, jagĂ„Â§mel it-talb, jagĂ„Â§ti l-karita u ma jibzax Ă„Â§lief minn Alla. Tassew li dawk ikunu fit-triq it-tajba

19.translation: Jaqaw intom tqisu li, gĂ„Â§aliex tisqu l-pellegrin u zzuru l- Moskea mqaddsa, (dan jiswa) daqs dak li jemmen f'Alla u fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum, li jĂ„Â§abrek u jitqabad gĂ„Â§al Alla 7 (Xejn minn danl) Quddiem Alla (dawk li jemmnu u dawk ta' bla twemmin) ma humiex indaqs. U Alla ma jmexxix lill- Ă„Â§ziena fit-triq it-tajba

20.translation: Dawk li emmnu, emigraw, Ă„Â§abirku u tqabdu gĂ„Â§al Alla b'gidhom u bihom infushom huma fi grad ogĂ„Â§la quddiem Alla (minn dawk il-pagani li xogĂ„Â§olhom biss li jisqu l- pellegrini u jzuru l-Moskea f'Mekka). Dawk huma r- rebbieĂ„Â§a (tal-Gonna ta' dejjem)

21.translation: Sidhom jagĂ„Â§tihom il-bxara t-tajba dwar Ă„Â§niena (gejja) minnu, gĂ„Â§axqa u Gonna li fihom gĂ„Â§andhom l-hena dejjiema

22.translation: Huma jgĂ„Â§ammru fihom gĂ„Â§al dejjem: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li gĂ„Â§and Alla hemm Ă„Â§las ta' kobor bla tarf

23.translation: Intom li temmnu, la tiĂ„Â§dux lil missirijietkom u lil Ă„Â§utkom bĂ„Â§ala alleati, jekk (dawn) jgĂ„Â§ozzu c-caĂ„Â§da tat- twemmin flok it-twemmin. Dawk minnkom li jzommuhom b'alleati, dawk ikunu l-Ă„Â§ziena. j

24.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Jekk missirijietkom, uliedkom, Ă„Â§utkom, in-nisa tagĂ„Â§kom, nieskom, xi gid li ksibtu, xi kummerc li tibzgĂ„Â§u li jmur lura, u xi djar li jogĂ„Â§gbukom huma egĂ„Â§zez gĂ„Â§alikom minn Alla u mill-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, u mit-tĂ„Â§abrik u t-taĂ„Â§bit (tagĂ„Â§kom). gĂ„Â§alih (gĂ„Â§al Alla), mela stennew sa ma Alla jgib fis-seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ l-amar tiegĂ„Â§u (is jagĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq minnkom kif jixraq). Alla ma jmexxix lill- Ă„Â§ziena fit-triq it-tajba

25.translation: Alla gĂ„Â§enkom f'Ă„Â§afna mkejjen (tat-taqbid), kif ukoll dakinhar ta' Ă„Â¦unajn,' meta tgĂ„Â§axxaqtu bl-gĂ„Â§add kbir tagĂ„Â§kom (rnax-il elf ruĂ„Â§, u Ă„Â§sibtu li tegĂ„Â§lbu. l-erbat elef suldat ta' l-gĂ„Â§adu), mingĂ„Â§ajr (izda) ma swielkom xejn, u (dehrilkom li) l-art. (tat-taqbida) saritilkom dejqa, minkejja li kienet wesgĂ„Â§a kbira, u mbagĂ„Â§ad dortu lura

26.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad Alla nizzel is-sliem tiegĂ„Â§u fuq il-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u u fuq dawk li jemmnu (biex iserrĂ„Â§ilhom rashom, jagĂ„Â§mlilhom il-qalb u jzidhom fil-Ă„Â§egga gĂ„Â§at-taqbid), u nizzel (l-angli mis-sema u dehru f'gĂ„Â§amla ta') suldati li intom ma rajtux, u kkastiga lil dawk bla twemmin. Dak huwa l-Ă„Â§las gĂ„Â§al dawk li ma jemmnux

27.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad wara dan Alla jdur (bil-maĂ„Â§fra u bil-Ă„Â§niena) lejn min irid. Alla huwa Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

28.translation: Intom li temmnu, (kunu afu li) dawk biss. li jxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla) huma mniggsa (minĂ„Â§abba t- twemmin fl-idoli u gĂ„Â§aliex jicĂ„Â§du lil-Alla), u gĂ„Â§alhekk ma gĂ„Â§andhomx joqorbu lejn il-Moskea mqaddsa wara din is- sena tagĂ„Â§hom. U jekk tibzgĂ„Â§u li tiftaqru (gĂ„Â§aziex il- pellegrini pagani ma. jigux (aktar f'Mekka), Alla jagĂ„Â§nikom mit-tjieba tiegĂ„Â§u, jekk irid. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq jaf kollox u GĂ„Â§aref

29.translation: Tqatlu kontra dawk minn fost Nies il-Ktieb (li jaĂ„Â§btu gĂ„Â§alikom), li la jemmnu f'Alla (kif suppost) u lanqas fl- AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum, li ma jipprojbixxux dak li Alla (fil-Ktieb tiegĂ„Â§u) u l-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u (fit-tradizzjoni profetika) gĂ„Â§amlu projbit, u li ma. jimxux fuq id-din tas-sewwa (li huwa l-Islam), sa ma jagĂ„Â§tu l-gizja minn. jeddhom, filwaqt li juru umilta. Ă„Â§

30.translation: Il-Lhud qalu li Esdra huwa bin Alla, '' u l-Insara qalu li l-Messija huwa bin Alla hekk qalu b'fommhom stess, bĂ„Â§alma kienu jgĂ„Â§idu dawk li m'emmnux qabel (jigifieri li langli huma l-ulied bniet ta' Alla). Narra Alla jitqatel kontrihoml Kemm tbiegĂ„Â§du mis-sewwal

31.translation: Huma (il-Lhud u l-Insara) gĂ„Â§amlu lill-qassisin u lill- irĂ„Â§ieb tagĂ„Â§hom sidien (tagĂ„Â§hom u qagĂ„Â§du gĂ„Â§alihom), minflok Alla, u (anki) lill-Messija bin Marija (l-insara gĂ„Â§amluh sidhom u tawh qima), meta huma ma kinux ordnati Ă„Â§lief li jqimu Alla WieĂ„Â§ed, li ma hemmx alla (ieĂ„Â§or) Ă„Â§liefu. SebĂ„Â§ lilu (u Ă„Â§alli jkun mgĂ„Â§olli u Ă„Â§ieles) minn dak (il-paganizmu) li jxierku (miegĂ„Â§u)l

32.translation: Huma (il-pagani, dawk li ma jemmnu f'xejn, u Nies il- Ktieb li ma jemmnux kif suppost) iridu jitfu d-Dawl ta' Alla. fli: huwa. l-Islam) b'fommhom (bil-Ă„Â§afna kwistjonijiet fiergĂ„Â§a li jaqilgĂ„Â§u), izda Alla ma jridx gĂ„Â§ajr li jgib il-milja tad-Dawl tiegĂ„Â§u, minkejja li dawk li ma jemmnux jistkerrhu (dan)

33.translation: Huwa li bagĂ„Â§at lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u (MuĂ„Â§ammad) bit- imexxija t-tajba u d-din tas-sewwa, biex joĂ„Â§orgu rebbieĂ„Â§ fuq kull din (ieĂ„Â§or), minkejja li (dan) jistkerrhu/h) dawk li xierku miegĂ„Â§u (allat oĂ„Â§ra)

34.translation: Intonili temmnu, (kunu afu li) Ă„Â§afna mill-qassisin (tal- Lhud) u l-irĂ„Â§ieb (ta' l-Insara) jieklu gid in-nies bil-qerq, u jzommu (lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or) mit-triq ta' Alla (li hija l- Islam). U dawk li jgeddsu d-deheb u l-fidda, u ma jonfquhomx gĂ„Â§al Alla, mela agĂ„Â§tihom il-bxara dwar kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

35.translation: Fil-Jum meta (it-tezor. tagĂ„Â§hom) jinĂ„Â§ema f'nar l-Infern u l-imĂ„Â§uĂ„Â§ tagĂ„Â§hom, gnubhom u daharhom jinkwew bih. (Jintqalilhom): ''Dan kien li geddistu gĂ„Â§alikom infuskom. Mela duqu dak li kontu tgeddsul

36.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-gĂ„Â§add tax-xhur, gĂ„Â§al Alla, huwa tnax-il xahar, fil-Ktieb ta' Alla, meta Ă„Â§alaq is-smewwiet u l-art, u erbgĂ„Â§a minnhom huma (x/ur) imqaddsa (gĂ„Â§aliex ma jistax iseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ glied fihom): Dan huwa d-din tas-sewwa. GĂ„Â§alhekk tonqsux lejkom infuskom fihom. Tqatlu kontra dawk kollha li jxierku, bĂ„Â§alma huma jitqatlu kontrikom ilkoll, u kunu afu li Alla ma' dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minnu

37.translation: Li tĂ„Â§alli (xahar imqaddes) gĂ„Â§al zmien ieĂ„Â§or (biex tibqa' gĂ„Â§addej bit-taqbid kontra l-gĂ„Â§edewwa tiegĂ„Â§ek). jitqies zjieda fic-caĂ„Â§da tat-twemmin, u b'dan (il-mod) dawk li ma jemmnux jintilfu. F'sena minnhom it-tibdil ta' xahar. qaddis iqisuh permess u f'sena oĂ„Â§ra jqisuh projbit, biex b'hekk jigu jaqblu fl-gĂ„Â§add (ra' xhur) li Alla qaddes, u jkunu qegĂ„Â§din jippermettu dak li Alla pprojbixxa. Il- Ă„Â§azen ta' gĂ„Â§emilhom izzejnilhom (u ntwerielhom sabiĂ„Â§). Alla ma jmexxix fit-triq it-tajba lil dawk li ma jemmnux

38.translation: Intom li temmnu, x'gĂ„Â§andkom 7 (GĂ„Â§aliex) meta jintqalilkom: 'OĂ„Â§orgu (tqabdu) gĂ„Â§al Alla' (bĂ„Â§alma ntqalilkom. f'Tabiik), intom tkunu tqal. (fit-twegiba tagĂ„Â§kom) u tingibdu lejn l-art 2 Jaqaw il-Ă„Â§ajja f'(din) id- dinja togĂ„Â§gobkom aktar mill-(Ă„Â§ajja) l-OĂ„Â§ra 7 Hija zgĂ„Â§ira t-tgawdija tal-Ă„Â§ajja f'(din) id-dinja (meta mqabbla ma' dik) fil-Ă„Â¦ajja l-OĂ„Â§ra

39.translation: Jekk. ma toĂ„Â§orgux. (titqabdu mal-Profeta, Alla) jikkastigakom b'kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§, jibdilkom ma' nies oĂ„Â§ra (li jkunu aktar lesti joqogĂ„Â§du gĂ„Â§ar-rieda tiegĂ„Â§u u tal-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u), u intom xejn ma (tistgĂ„Â§u) tagĂ„Â§mlulu Ă„Â§sara (minkejja li bqajtu lura u ma ridtux titqatlu). Ala huwa fuq kollox SetgĂ„Â§an (u ma jeĂ„Â§tiegx l-gĂ„Â§ajnuna tagĂ„Â§kom)

40.translation: Jekk ma tgĂ„Â§inuhx (/il MuĂ„Â§ammad, kunu afu li) Alla gĂ„Â§enu meta dawk (f'Mekka) li ma jemmnux. gegĂ„Â§luh joĂ„Â§rog (minn Mekka), (meta) miegĂ„Â§u (ma kellux gĂ„Â§ajr) bniedem ieĂ„Â§or (biss, (il 'Abif Bakr). U meta kienu fl-gĂ„Â§ar, huwa (MuĂ„Â§ammad) qal lil sieĂ„Â§bu: 'La titnikkitxi Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq magĂ„Â§naf' U Alla nizzel is-sliem tiegĂ„Â§u fuqu, u saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§u b'suldati (li kienu angli mis-sema) li intom ma rajtux, u nizzel 'l isfel (u kasbar) il-kelma ta' dawk li ma jemmnux. Il-Kelma ta' Alla (/i ma hemmx alla Ă„Â§lief Alla) hija l-ogĂ„Â§la, u Alla FelĂ„Â§an u GĂ„Â§aref

41.translation: OĂ„Â§orgu, Ă„Â§fief jew tqal (bl-armi tagĂ„Â§kom, zgĂ„Â§azagĂ„Â§ u xjuĂ„Â§, fuq saqajkom jew rekbin) u tqabdu b'gidkom u bikom infuskom gĂ„Â§al Alla. Dan ikun aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§alikom, jekk tassew tafu

42.translation: Likieku kien hemm xi qligĂ„Â§ ta' malajr, jew safar mhux fit-tul, (dawk ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) kienu jimxu warajk, izda t-triq kienet imbiegĂ„Â§da (wisq) gĂ„Â§alihom ( 4 fl-gĂ„Â§azz tagĂ„Â§hom baqgĂ„Â§u ma Ă„Â§argux). Izda huma gĂ„Â§ad jaĂ„Â§ilfu b'Alla (biex mingĂ„Â§alihom jiskuzaw irwieĂ„Â§hom, u jgĂ„Â§idu): SLi kieku stajna, konna noĂ„Â§orgu magĂ„Â§kom.' Huma qegĂ„Â§din jeqirdu lilhom infushom (b'dan il-kliem), u Alla jaf li huma giddibin

43.translation: Alla jaĂ„Â§firlek (MuĂ„Â§ammad)l GĂ„Â§aliex tajthom permess (meta gabu l-iskuzi tagĂ„Â§hom gĂ„Â§aliex baqgĂ„Â§u lura u ma Ă„Â§argux jitqabdu) qabel ma kont taf min (minnhom) qal is-sewwa, u taf (min minnhom kienu) il-giddibin

44.translation: Dawk li jemmnu f'Alla u fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum ma jitolbukx tiskuzahom biex ma joĂ„Â§orgux jitqabdu b'gidhom u bihom. infushom. Alla jaf sewwa b'dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minnu (u huma sĂ„Â§aĂ„Â§ fi twemminhom)

45.translation: Huma biss dawk li ma jemmnux f'Alla u fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum li jitolbuk tiskuzahom f(mit-taqbid). dawk li qlubhom jinsabu bejn Ă„Â§alltejn u b'hekk ma jafux fejn jagĂ„Â§tu rashom

46.translation: Likieku riedu joĂ„Â§orgu (jitqabdu), kienu jitĂ„Â§ejjew tajjeb gĂ„Â§alih fit-taqbid), izda Alla stkerrab li huma jitilqu (biex jitqabdu), zammhom lura, u ntqal(ilhom): ''OqogĂ„Â§du mal-qiegĂ„Â§da (man-nisa u mat-tfal, bla ma tagĂ„Â§mlu xejnji)

47.translation: Li kieku Ă„Â§argu magĂ„Â§kom, ma kinux izidukom Ă„Â§lief fit- tfixkil. Kienu jiggerrew fostkom, u jaraw kif joĂ„Â§olqu t- tixwix u l-firda (bejnietkom). Fostkom (kien ikun hemm) min jisma' minnhom. Alla jaf sewwa bil-Ă„Â§ziena (ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or)

48.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li huma (qabel it-tagbida ta' Tabiik kienu) diga xtaqu (jaqilgĂ„Â§u) it-tixwix u l-firda, u nassu kontrik, sa ma (imbagĂ„Â§ad) gie s-sewwa (u r-rebĂ„Â§a), u dehret ir- rieda ta' Alla, (minkejja li) huma stkerrhu (din il-Ă„Â§aga)

49.translation: (Fosthom hemm min jgĂ„Â§id//ek MuĂ„Â§ammad): Ă„Â¦allini (noqgĂ„Â§od lura u ma noĂ„Â§rogx nitqabad), u ta ggarrabnixt' Mela mhux (digg) waqgĂ„Â§u fit-tigribz TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l- Infern idur minn kull naĂ„Â§a madwar dawk li ma jemmnux (hekk li qatt ma jkunu jistgĂ„Â§u jaĂ„Â§arbu minnu)

50.translation: Jekk tmissek xi Ă„Â§aga tajba (bĂ„Â§al rebĂ„Â§ militari u l-priza li jgib miegĂ„Â§u, arahom) jitqarrsu, izda meta jmissek xi saram, (ismagĂ„Â§hom) jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Ă„Â¦sibnielu minn qabel (u gĂ„Â§aliex konna nafu li-se' nkunu telliefa, ma' ridniex nissugraw gĂ„Â§alxejn).' U jitilqu lil hemm ferĂ„Â§anin

51.translation: (GĂ„Â§idiilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Xejn ma jmissna gĂ„Â§ajr dak (il-gid jew id-deni) li kitbilna Alla. Huwa l-Mulej tagĂ„Â§na (li jĂ„Â§arisna). Ă„Â¦alli jĂ„Â§allu f'idejn Alla dawk li jemmnu

52.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom ukoll): 'X'tistennew li jigrilna, gĂ„Â§ajr li (ikollna) waĂ„Â§da minn (dawn) iz-zewg Ă„Â§wejjeg sbieĂ„Â§ (jew li mmutu bĂ„Â§ala martri gĂ„Â§al Alla, jew li niksbu r-rebĂ„Â§a fuq. l-aggressuri,) GĂ„Â§alikom, aĂ„Â§na nistennew li Alla jibagĂ„Â§tilkom kastig mingĂ„Â§andu, jew (li tinqarlu) b'idejna (stess). Mela oqogĂ„Â§du stennew (biex taraw x'se jigrilna). AĂ„Â§na tabilĂ„Â§aqq nistennew magĂ„Â§kom' (u naraw x'se jmisskom)U

53.translation: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad lil ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or): ''Sew jekk tagĂ„Â§tu minn qalbkom, u sew. (jekk tagĂ„Â§tu) gĂ„Â§aliex imgegĂ„Â§lin, ma jintlaqax mingĂ„Â§andkom. Intom tassew nies Ă„Â§ziena

54.translation: Xejn ma jzomm l-infiq (u l-gĂ„Â§oti tagĂ„Â§hom). milli jintlaqa' Ă„Â§lief minĂ„Â§abba li huma ma jemmnux f'Alla u fil-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, u ma jigux gĂ„Â§at-talb jekk mhux bl- gĂ„Â§azz (u bla Ă„Â§egga), u ma jonfqu (xejn gĂ„Â§all-karita) jekk mhux fuq qalbhom

55.translation: Arali majogĂ„Â§gbukx gidhom u (l-gĂ„Â§add ta') uliedhom. Alla jrid biss jikkastigahom bihom fil-Ă„Â§ajja (f'din) id- dinja, u li rwieĂ„Â§hom jinqerdu filwaqt li jkunu (gĂ„Â§adhom) ma jemmnux

56.translation: Huma jaĂ„Â§ilfu b'Alla li huma minnkom, izda (fil-fatt) ma humiex minnkom, izda huma nies li jibzgĂ„Â§u (juru dak li tassew huma, biex ma jitilfux il-privileggi tagĂ„Â§hom)

57.translation: Li kieku jistgĂ„Â§u jsibu xi Kenn, xi gĂ„Â§erien jew xi mkien fejn jitrekknu, (kont tarahom) jitilqu lejh mgĂ„Â§agglin (biex jaĂ„Â§arbu minnkom)

58.translation: Fosthom hemm min ilumek (MuĂ„Â§ammad) dwar. (it- tqassim). tal-karita: jekk jingĂ„Â§ataw. minnha, jithennew, izda jekk ma jingĂ„Â§atawx minnha, arahom jimtlew bl- gĂ„Â§adab

59.translation: (Kien ikun aĂ„Â§ijar gĂ„Â§alihom) li kieku thennew b'dak li tawhom Alla u l-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, u qalu: 'Alla huwa bizzejjed gĂ„Â§alinal Alla.se jagĂ„Â§tina it-tjieba tiegĂ„Â§u, u anki l-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u. AĂ„Â§na tassew lil Alla nfittxut

60.translation: Il-karitajiet huma biss gĂ„Â§all-foqra, gĂ„Â§all-imsejknin, gĂ„Â§al dawk imqabbdin biex jigbruhom, gĂ„Â§al dawk. li qlubhom ingibdu (jew qegĂ„Â§din jingibdu lejn l-Islam), gĂ„Â§al dawk fil-jasar (biex jinfdew), gĂ„Â§all-midjunin (biex iĂ„Â§allsu d-dejn li ddejnu) gĂ„Â§all-kawza ta' Alla (fis-servizz tar-religjon u tal-komunita), u gĂ„Â§al dak li jterraq. (Dan huwa) l-amar minn Alla. Alla jaf kollox u GĂ„Â§aref

61.translation: Fosthom (dawk ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) hemm min iwegga' lill-Profeta (MuĂ„Â§ammad bil-kliem u bl-gĂ„Â§emil). u jgĂ„Â§idu: Huwa widna (gĂ„Â§aliex jisma' u jemmen kolloxji' GĂ„Â§idilhom): 'Huwa jisma' dak kollu li hu tajjeb gĂ„Â§alikom, jemmen f'Alla, joqgĂ„Â§od fuq dawk li jemmnu (gĂ„Â§aliex jaf li huma gusti), u huwa Ă„Â§niena gĂ„Â§al dawk fostkom li jemmnu.'' Dawk li jwegggĂ„Â§u (u jzebilĂ„Â§u) lill- MibgĂ„Â§ut ta' Alla jkollhom kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

62.translation: Huma jaĂ„Â§ilfulkom b'Alla biex jogĂ„Â§gbukom, izda Alla flimkien mal-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u jistĂ„Â§oqq aktar li huma jogĂ„Â§gbuh. jekk tassew jemmnu

63.translation: Mela ma jafux li min jeĂ„Â§odha kontra Alla u l-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u hemm gĂ„Â§alih nar l-Infern, u fih jgĂ„Â§ammar gĂ„Â§al dejjem. Dan huwa gĂ„Â§ajb tassew kbir

64.translation: Ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or jibzgĂ„Â§u li titnizzel dwarhom xi sura li tgĂ„Â§arrafhom b'dak li hemm (tassew) fi qlubhom. GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'IddieĂ„Â§ku (bir-religjon ta' Alla kemm tridu, izda kunu afu li) Alla se joĂ„Â§rog (fil-beraĂ„Â§) dak li qegĂ„Â§din tibzgĂ„Â§u (/i jsir magĂ„Â§ruf dwarkom)

65.translation: Jekk tistaqsihom. (MuĂ„Â§ammad), jgĂ„Â§idulek: ''AĂ„Â§na konna biss inlabalbu (u ngĂ„Â§idu kliem fieragĂ„Â§, u ngĂ„Â§addu z-zmien) fil-logĂ„Â§ob'' GĂ„Â§id(ilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Jaqaw kontu qegĂ„Â§din tiddieĂ„Â§ku b'Alla, bir-Rivelazzjoni tiegĂ„Â§u u bil-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u

66.translation: Ma gĂ„Â§andkomx skuzal CĂ„Â§adtu t-twemmin wara li emmintu. Jekk naĂ„Â§fru lil-xi gemgĂ„Â§a minn fostkom (gĂ„Â§aliex nidmet), AĂ„Â§na (xorta waĂ„Â§da) nikkastigaw gemgĂ„Â§a (oĂ„Â§ra minnkom), gĂ„Â§aliex huma kienu Ă„Â§atjin ( 4 baqgĂ„Â§u juru wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or sa l-aĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar)

67.translation: Dawk l-irgiel u n-nisa li huma ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or huma (kollha) ta' qatgĂ„Â§a waĂ„Â§da: huma jamru (li jsir) il-Ă„Â§azin, ma jĂ„Â§allux it-tajjeb, u gĂ„Â§andhom idejhom magĂ„Â§luqin (bix-xeĂ„Â§Ă„Â§a u ma jagĂ„Â§tux karita). Huma nsew lil Alla, u gĂ„Â§alhekk (Hu) nesiehom. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or huma l-Ă„Â§ziena

68.translation: Alla wiegĂ„Â§ed in-nar ta' l-Infern lil ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or, irgiel u nisa, u lil dawk li ma jemmnux, u fih jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem. Huwa jkun bizzejjed gĂ„Â§alihom. Alla seĂ„Â§ithom, u gĂ„Â§alihom hemm kastig gĂ„Â§al dejjem

69.translation: BĂ„Â§al dawk ta' qabilkom; huma kienu eqqel minnkom fil-qawwa, u akbar fil-gid u fl-ulied. Huma thennew b'sehemhom, u. intom. thennejtu b'sehemkom; bĂ„Â§alma thennew b'sehemhom dawk ta' qabilkom. Intom (ukoll) tlabalbu fieragĂ„Â§, bĂ„Â§al dawk li labalbu. Dawk, l-gĂ„Â§emejjel tagĂ„Â§hom jisfaw fix-xejn f'(din) id-dinja u fl-OĂ„Â§ra, u dawk huma t-tellifin

70.translation: Jaqaw ma waslitilhomx l-aĂ„Â§bar (dwar kif inqerdu gĂ„Â§al kollox) dawk ta' qabilhom: nies Noc (u n-nies) ta' GĂ„Â§ad, ta' Tamid, nies Abraham, nies Madjan, u l-bliet (ra' Sodoma u Gomorra) li nqalbu ta' taĂ„Â§t fuq 2 Il-MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§hom gewhom bis-sinjali c-cari, u mhux Alla li naqas lejhom, izda. kienu. huma: li naqsu lejhom. infushom (gĂ„Â§aliex ma ridux jagĂ„Â§tu widen)

71.translation: Dawk li jemmnu, irgiel u nisa, jieĂ„Â§du Ă„Â§sieb (i/ jĂ„Â§arsu) lil xulxin. Huma jamru (li jsir). it-tajjeb, ma jĂ„Â§allux il- Ă„Â§azin, jagĂ„Â§mlu t-talb, jagĂ„Â§tu l-karita, u joqogĂ„Â§du gĂ„Â§al: J Alla u. gĂ„Â§all-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u. Dawk Alla se jĂ„Â§enn J gĂ„Â§alihom. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq FelĂ„Â§an u GĂ„Â§aref

72.translation: Alla wiegĂ„Â§ed lil-dawk li jemmnu, irgiel u nisa, Gonna bix-xmajjar jigru taĂ„Â§thom fihom jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem wdjar sbieĂ„Â§ fil-Gonna ta' l-GĂ„Â§eden. U gĂ„Â§axqa minn Alla (hija Ă„Â§las) akbar (minn dan kollu): Din hija l-akbar rebĂ„Â§a

73.translation: Ja Profeta, Ă„Â§abrek u tqabad kontra dawk li ma jemmnux u ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or, u kun qalil magĂ„Â§hom. Il-kenn tagĂ„Â§hom huwa l-Infern, u (dan ikun tassew) tmiem ta' gĂ„Â§ajb

74.translation: Huma jaĂ„Â§ilfu b'Alla li ma qalu xejn, izda (tabilĂ„Â§aqq) qalu kliem li jicĂ„Â§ad it-twemmin, u wara li kienu daĂ„Â§lu fl- Islam, (reggĂ„Â§u) m'emmnux. Huma fasslu xi Ă„Â§aga li ma seĂ„Â§Ă„Â§etilhomx, u ma vvendikawx irwieĂ„Â§hom jekk mhux gĂ„Â§aliex Alla kattar fuqhom it-tjieba (u l-barka) tiegĂ„Â§u, u l-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u (ukol/)l GĂ„Â§alhekk ikun aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§alihom jekk jindmu, izda jekk jagĂ„Â§tu daharhom (gĂ„Â§at-twemmin), Alla jikkastigahom b'kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§ f'(din) id-dinja u fl-OĂ„Â§ra. U fuq l-art ma jkollhom Ă„Â§add li jĂ„Â§arishom u jgĂ„Â§inhom

75.translation: Fosthom (dawk ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) hemm min daĂ„Â§al f'rabta ma' Alla (u qal): 'Jekk ( 4/la) jagĂ„Â§tina mit-tjieba tiegĂ„Â§u, aĂ„Â§na tassew nagĂ„Â§tu l-karita u nkunu mill-gusti

76.translation: Izda meta tahom mit-tjieba tiegĂ„Â§u, huma xxaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§u f'dak li ngĂ„Â§ataw, warrbu (ir-rabta tagĂ„Â§hom ma' Alla), u ma ridux joqogĂ„Â§du gĂ„Â§aliha

77.translation: GĂ„Â§alhekk ikkastigahom (u refagĂ„Â§lhom) il-wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or fi qlubhom sal-Jum li fih jiltaqgĂ„Â§u miegĂ„Â§u, gĂ„Â§aliex huma marru kontra dak li kienu wiegĂ„Â§du lil Alla, u gĂ„Â§aliex kienu jigdbu

78.translation: Mela ma jafux li Alla jaf bis-sigriet tagĂ„Â§hom, b'dak li jintqal (bil-moĂ„Â§bi). bejniethom, u li Alla jaf sew bil- mistur

79.translation: Dawk (in-nies il-Ă„Â§ziena) li jmaqdru lil min, fost dawk li jemmnu, jagĂ„Â§ti l-karita minn jeddu, (kif ukoll jixlu) lil dawk li ma jsibux x'jagĂ„Â§tu gĂ„Â§ajr il-Ă„Â§idma tagĂ„Â§hom (li/ min jeĂ„Â§tiegha), u jzebilĂ„Â§uhom, ikun Alla li jzeblaĂ„Â§hom, u gĂ„Â§alihom hemm kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

80.translation: Sew jekk titlob biex jiksbu l-maĂ„Â§fra, u sew jekk ma titlobx maĂ„Â§fra gĂ„Â§alihom, ( 4I 1a ma huwiex se jaĂ„Â§frilhom). U jekk titlob gĂ„Â§alihom sebgĂ„Â§in darba biex jiksbu l-maĂ„Â§fra, Alla ma huwiex se jaĂ„Â§frilhom. Dan gĂ„Â§aliex. huma m'emmnux f'Alla u fil-MibgĂ„Â§ut. tiegĂ„Â§u. Alla ma jmexxix fit-triq it-tajba lin-nies il-Ă„Â§ziena

81.translation: FerĂ„Â§u dawk (ra' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) li baqgĂ„Â§u wara l-MibgĂ„Â§ut (MuĂ„Â§ammad u ma Ă„Â§argux gĂ„Â§at-taqbida f'Tabiik) gĂ„Â§aliex baqgĂ„Â§u fejn kienu, u stkerrhu li jĂ„Â§abirku u jitqabdu b'gidhom u bihom infushom gĂ„Â§al Alla, u qalu (fil xulxin): ToĂ„Â§orgux. fis-sĂ„Â§anaf' GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Nar l- Infern jaĂ„Â§raq wisq aktarf' Li kieku kienu jifhmul

82.translation: Ă„Â¦alli jidĂ„Â§ku xi ftit (gĂ„Â§alissa), izda (imbagĂ„Â§ad) Ă„Â§alli jibku Ă„Â§afna, bi Ă„Â§las ta' dak (il-Ă„Â§azen) li kienu jiksbu (b'gĂ„Â§emilhom)

83.translation: GĂ„Â§alhekk jekk Alla (wara t-taqbid f'Tabiik) iregggĂ„Â§ek gĂ„Â§and gemgĂ„Â§a minnhom, u jitolbuk permess biex joĂ„Â§orgu (jitqabdu. miegĂ„Â§ek fi spedizzjoni oĂ„Â§ra), gĂ„Â§id(ilhom): ''Qatt m'intom Ă„Â§ergin miegĂ„Â§i, u m'intom se titqatlu miegĂ„Â§i kontra ebda gĂ„Â§adul L-ewwel darba (meta l-Misilmin l-oĂ„Â§ra kienu sejrin lejn Tabik) intom gĂ„Â§ogobkom tibqgĂ„Â§u qiegĂ„Â§da, Mela oqogĂ„Â§du ma' dawk li baqgĂ„Â§u lural

84.translation: Qatt (ma gĂ„Â§andek) titlob: (MuĂ„Â§ammad) gĂ„Â§al xi Ă„Â§add minnhom: (ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) li miet, u lanqas ma gĂ„Â§andek tieqaf fuq qabru. Huma caĂ„Â§du lil Alla u lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, u mietu fil-Ă„Â§azen tagĂ„Â§hom

85.translation: Lanqas (ma gĂ„Â§andhom) jogĂ„Â§gbuk gidhom u (l-gĂ„Â§add kbir) ta' wliedhom: Alla jrid biss jikkastigahom bihom fid-dinja, u'li rwieĂ„Â§hom jinqerdu filwaqt li (kunu gĂ„Â§adhom qegĂ„Â§din) jicĂ„Â§du (lif Alla u lill-Islam)

86.translation: U meta titnizzel sura li (tĂ„Â§eggighom u tgĂ„Â§idilhom): cEmmmu F'Alla, u Ă„Â§abirku u tqabdu mal-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u,' dawk fosthom li gĂ„Â§andhom Ă„Â§afna gid jitolbuk tiskuzahom u jgĂ„Â§idulek, MuĂ„Â§ammad, dawk ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or): 'Ă„Â¦allina nkunu mal-qiegĂ„Â§da (li jibqgĂ„Â§u lura u ma joĂ„Â§orgux jitqabdu)

87.translation: Huma jogĂ„Â§gobhom li jkunu ma' dawk (in-nisa, it-tfal, il-morda u oĂ„Â§rajn li ma gĂ„Â§andhomx is-saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§a u l-Ă„Â§ila jitqatlu) li baqgĂ„Â§u lura, u tqiegĂ„Â§ed sigill fuq qlubhom, hekk li ma jifhmux

88.translation: Izda l-MibgĂ„Â§ut u dawk li jemmnu miegĂ„Â§u, Ă„Â§abirku u tqabdu b'gidhom u bihom infushom. Ta' dawk huma l- Ă„Â§wejjeg tajba (kollha), u dawk huma r-rebbieĂ„Â§a

89.translation: Alla Ă„Â§ejjielhom Gonna bix-xmajjar jigru taĂ„Â§thom, u fihom jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem. Dik hija r-rebĂ„Â§a l-kbira

90.translation: Minn fost l-GĂ„Â§arab tad-dezert kien hemm dawk li gew b'xi skuza biex jingĂ„Â§ataw permess (biex ma joĂ„Â§orgux jitqabdu). Dawk li giddbu lil Alla u lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u qagĂ„Â§du lura (i ma Ă„Â§argux gĂ„Â§at-taqbid.) Lil dawk li ma jemmnux se jmiss kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§

91.translation: La d-dgĂ„Â§ajfin, la l-morda, u lanqas dawk li ma jsibux (gid) x'jonfqu, jekk huma sincieri ma' Alla u mal- MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u (u jagĂ„Â§mlu gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba), ma gĂ„Â§andhom ebda Ă„Â§tija. Ma hemm ebda triq (/i twassal gĂ„Â§all-kundanna) ta' dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb. Alla huwa Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

92.translation: Lanqas (ma gĂ„Â§andhom Ă„Â§tija) dawk li, meta gew gĂ„Â§andek jitolbuk biex trikkibhom (fuq zwiemel jew igmla, biex joĂ„Â§orgu jitqabdu miegĂ„Â§ek), u inti wegibthom: 'Ma nsibx fuq xiex inrikkibkom,' huma telqu mnikktin, bid-dmugĂ„Â§ igelgel minn gĂ„Â§ajnejhom, gĂ„Â§aliex ma kellhom xejn x'jonfqu (gĂ„Â§all-kawza ta' Alla)

93.translation: Il-Ă„Â§tija hija biss fuq dawk l-gĂ„Â§onja li' jitolbuk tiskuzahom (biex jibqgĂ„Â§u lura u ma joĂ„Â§orgux jitqatlu). Huma jogĂ„Â§gobhom li jkunu ma' dawk (in-nisa, it-tfal, il- morda u l-oĂ„Â§rajn) li baqgĂ„Â§u lura. Alla qiegĂ„Â§ed sigill fuq qlubhom, u gĂ„Â§alhekk ma jafux

94.translation: Huma jitolbikom tagĂ„Â§druhom meta terggĂ„Â§u lura gĂ„Â§andhom: GĂ„Â§id(ilhom. MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Iggibux skuzil M'aĂ„Â§niex se nemmnukomt Alla kien diga gĂ„Â§arrafna b'aĂ„Â§barkom (u bil-Ă„Â§azen u bil-wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or tagĂ„Â§kom). Alla se jara l-gĂ„Â§emil tagĂ„Â§kom, u ('iegĂ„Â§u) il-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, imbagĂ„Â§ad tintbagĂ„Â§tu lura lejn Dak li jaf il-mistur u'li jidher, u jgĂ„Â§arrafkom b'dak li kontu tagĂ„Â§mlu

95.translation: Meta tmorru lura gĂ„Â§andhom (wara t-taqbida f'Tabiik) se jaĂ„Â§ilfulkom b'Alla biex tĂ„Â§alluhom waĂ„Â§idhom. Mela Ă„Â§alluhom waĂ„Â§idhomi Huma tabilĂ„Â§aqq tingis, u l-kenn tagĂ„Â§hom huwa fl-Infern, bi Ă„Â§las ta' (il-Ă„Â§azen) li kienu jiksbu (b'gĂ„Â§emilhom)

96.translation: Huma se jaĂ„Â§ilfulkom biex tithennew bihom, izda jekk tithennew bihom (ikun kollu gĂ„Â§alxejn gĂ„Â§aliex) Alla ma jithenniex bin-nies il-Ă„Â§ziena

97.translation: L-GĂ„Â§arab tad-dezert huma l-aktar (nies) li ma jemmnux (minĂ„Â§abba l-qalb xierfa tagĂ„Â§hom, l-aktar) li juru wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or, u l-aktar li jixirqilhom li ma jkunu jafu (xejn) mid-digrieti li Alla nizzel lill-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u (MuĂ„Â§ammad). Alla jaf kollox u GĂ„Â§aref

98.translation: Fost l-GĂ„Â§arab tad-dezert hemm min iqis dak li jonfoq (gĂ„Â§al Alla) bĂ„Â§allikieku xi multa (u relf), u jistenna li jolqotkom l-gĂ„Â§aks u s-saram. Ă„Â¦alli jkun fuqhom is- saraml Alla jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

99.translation: Izda fost l-GĂ„Â§arab tad-dezert hemm min jemmen f'Alla u fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum, u jqis dak li jonfoq (gĂ„Â§al A/la) bĂ„Â§ala gĂ„Â§otjiet li jqarrbu/A) lejn Alla u lejn it-talb tal-MibgĂ„Â§ut (gĂ„Â§alih, biex jikseb il-maĂ„Â§fra). Dan tassew iqarribhoml l Alla se jdaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§alhom fil-Ă„Â§niena tiegĂ„Â§u. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq huwa Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

100.translation: Dawk (il-Misilmin) li kienu minn ta' l-ewwel (li taw widen gĂ„Â§as-sejĂ„Â§a ta' l-Islam) fost l-emigranti (minn Mekka il-Muhagirin) u dawk (minn nies Medina 'al- 'Ansar) li tawhom (kull) gĂ„Â§ajnuna, u dawk li mxew warajhom: fl-gĂ„Â§emejjel tajba, Alla jithenna bihom, u huma. jithennew bih. Huwa Ă„Â§ejjielhom: Gonna bix- xmajjar jigru taĂ„Â§thom, u fihom jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem. Dik hija l-akbar rebĂ„Â§a

101.translation: UĂ„Â§ud mill-GĂ„Â§arab tad-dezert ta' madwarkom juru wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or, u wĂ„Â§ud minn nies ta' Medina webbsu rashom fil- wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or. Inti ma tafhomx (bizzejjed, MuĂ„Â§ammad). izda. AĂ„Â§na. nafuhom. (fajjeb). Darbtejn se nikkastigawhom, imbagĂ„Â§ad jintbagĂ„Â§tu lura gĂ„Â§al kastig kbir

102.translation: OĂ„Â§rajn. gĂ„Â§arfu u stqarru dnubiethom: huma Ă„Â§alltu gĂ„Â§emil tajjeb ma' ieĂ„Â§or Ă„Â§azin. Alla gĂ„Â§andu mnejn idu lejhom. (bil-maĂ„Â§fra). .Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra 1 Ă„Â¦anin
