103.translation: Ă„Â¦u (MuĂ„Â§ammad) minn gidhom karita li biha int ssaffihom u tnaddafhom (minn dnubiethom), u itlot gĂ„Â§alihom (biex Alla jaĂ„Â§frilhom). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li. talbek iserraĂ„Â§hom. Alla jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

104.translation: Mela ma jafux li huwa Alla li jilqa' l-indiema mill qaddejja tiegĂ„Â§u, u jieĂ„Â§u l-karitajiet (li jagĂ„Â§mlu minr qalbhom), li Alla jdur Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra u Ă„Â¦anin

105.translation: gĂ„Â§idfi/homj: AgĂ„Â§mlu (li: tridu) Alla se jarz gĂ„Â§emilkom, u l-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u u dawk li jemmnu (s: jarawh ukoll), u se tintbagĂ„Â§tu lura lejn Dak li jaf il-mistu u. li jidher, u jgĂ„Â§arrafkom b'dak li kontu tagĂ„Â§mlu

106.translation: OĂ„Â§rajn jitĂ„Â§allew. jistennew l-amar ta' Alla: jeki jikkastigahomx jew inkella jdur lejhom bil-maĂ„Â§fra. All: jaf kollox u GĂ„Â§aref

107.translation: U (hemm ukoll) dawk (ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) li bnew (bini li kellhom il-wicc isejĂ„Â§ulu) moskea biex igibu Ă„Â§sara, caĂ„Â§da tat-twemmin u firda bejn dawk li jemmnu, u biex (dik il- moskea) tkun kenn gĂ„Â§al min, qabel, kien tqabad kontra Alla u l-MibgĂ„Â§ut tiegĂ„Â§u, U tabilĂ„Â§aqq se jaĂ„Â§ilfu (u jgĂ„Â§idu): ''AĂ„Â§na (meta bnejna din il-moskea) ridna biss it- tajjeb,' izda Alla jixhed li huma tassew giddibin

108.translation: Inti (MuĂ„Â§ammad, ara (i) ma tieqaf qatt (f'dik il-moskea biex titlob) fihal Moskea (bĂ„Â§al dik ta' QubagĂ„Â§) imsejsa, sa mill-ewwel jum, fuq il-qima (/ejn 4//a) tistĂ„Â§oqq aktar li tieqaf fiha (gĂ„Â§ar-ralb), Fiha hemm irgiel (gusti minn Medina) li jĂ„Â§obbu jissaffew (minn dnubiethom). Alla jĂ„Â§obb lill-imsoffijin

109.translation: Min hu l-aĂ„Â§jar; min sejjes. il-bini tiegĂ„Â§u fuq. (l- ubbidjenza u) il-biza' ta' Alla u l-gĂ„Â§axqa tiegĂ„Â§u, jew min sejjes il-bini tiegĂ„Â§u fuq xifer irdum li therra, hekk li jinzel bih f'nar l-Infern. Alla ma jmexxix fit-triq it-tajba lin-nies il-Ă„Â§ziena

110.translation: Il-bini tagĂ„Â§hom: li bnew ma jehda qatt. (iqanqal) id- dubju fi qlubhom ( 4 l-gĂ„Â§adab gĂ„Â§all-Misilmin), sa'ma (dawn) qlubhom. jitqattgĂ„Â§u bicciet. Alla jaf kollox u GĂ„Â§aref

111.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li mingĂ„Â§and dawk li jemmnu Alla xtara Ă„Â§ajjithom u gidhom, biex ikollhom il-Genna. Huma jitqatlu gĂ„Â§al-Alla: huma joqtlu u jinqatlu (din. hi) wegĂ„Â§da li (A/la huwa) marbut biha tabilĂ„Â§aqq fit-Tord, fl- Evangelju, u fil-Qoran. U min, aktar minn Alla, izomm il-wegĂ„Â§da tiegĂ„Â§u' Mela ifirĂ„Â§u bil-bejgĂ„Â§ li gĂ„Â§amiltul Dik hija r-rebĂ„Â§a l-kbira

112.translation: (GĂ„Â§ad jifirĂ„Â§u u jithennew) dawk li jduru nedmin (lejn Alla), li jqimu(h), li jfaĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ru(Ă„Â§), li jterrqu ma' l-art kollha (gĂ„Â§al Alla biex jiksbu aktar gĂ„Â§erf dwaru), li jmilu u li jinxteĂ„Â§tu fl-art (fit-talb), li jamru (li jsir) it-tajjeb, ma jĂ„Â§allux il-Ă„Â§azin, u li jzommu d-digrieti ta' Alla. AgĂ„Â§ti l- bxara lil-dawk li jemmnu (/i hemm il-Genna tistenniehom)

113.translation: Ma huwiex xieraq li l-Profeta u dawk li jemmnu jitolbu maĂ„Â§fra gĂ„Â§al dawk li jxierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla), anki jekk huma qraba, wara li raw bic-car li (dawn il-pagani) huma nies in-Nar iĂ„Â§eggeg

114.translation: U Abraham ma kienx jitlob maĂ„Â§fra gĂ„Â§al missieru (Azar) jekk mhux minĂ„Â§abba wegĂ„Â§da li kien (laĂ„Â§aq) wiegĂ„Â§du. U meta ra bic-car li hu (missieru) kien gĂ„Â§adu ta' Alla (u webbes rasu f'din. it-triq tat-telfien), hu (Abraham). inĂ„Â§all minn (kull rabta li kellu) miegĂ„Â§u. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Abraham kien qalbu tajba, u kollu Ă„Â§lewwa u sabar

115.translation: Alla ma jtellifx it-triq lil-xi nies wara li jkun mexxiehom (fiha), sa ma jurihom minn xiex gĂ„Â§andhom jibzgĂ„Â§u (u joqogĂ„Â§du lura, biex ma jidinbux). Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq jaf b'kollox

116.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li ta' Alla hija s-saltna tas-smewwiet u l-art. Huwa jagĂ„Â§ti l-Ă„Â§ajja u l-mewt. Ma gĂ„Â§andkomx, gĂ„Â§ajr lil Alla, min iĂ„Â§ariskom u jgĂ„Â§inkom

117.translation: Alla dar bil-maĂ„Â§fra lejn il-Profeta (minkejja li kien Ă„Â§alla lil ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or jibqgĂ„Â§u lura u ma joĂ„Â§orgux gĂ„Â§at-taqbid); lejn dawk (minn Mekka) li emigraw, u dawk (minn. Medina) li gĂ„Â§enu (lill-Misilmin), dawk li mxew warajh fis-siegĂ„Â§a iebsa (tat-taqbida f'Tabiek), wara li qlub uĂ„Â§ud minnhom kienu gĂ„Â§oddhom xaqilbu (lejn il- Ă„Â§azen), imbagĂ„Â§ad dar lejhom bil-maĂ„Â§fra. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Huwa Kollu Tjubija u Ă„Â¦anin magĂ„Â§hom

118.translation: (BĂ„Â§alma dar bil-maĂ„Â§fra) lejn it-tlieta li baqgĂ„Â§u lura (mit-taqbid u li Ă„Â§assuhom hekk Ă„Â§atja minĂ„Â§abba dan: li) saĂ„Â§ansitra. (dehrilhom) li. l-art kienet djieqet gĂ„Â§alihom, minkejja l-kobor tagĂ„Â§ha, bĂ„Â§alma Ă„Â§assu lilhom infushom maqbuda f'diqa, u fehmu li ma hemmx kenn minn Alla, jekk mhux (li jmorru) lejh. ImbagĂ„Â§ad dar lejhom bil- maĂ„Â§fra. biex (sergĂ„Â§u) jindmu. Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq idur Kollu MaĂ„Â§fra, il-Ă„Â¦anin

119.translation: Intom li temmnu, ibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla u kunu ma' dawk li jgĂ„Â§idu u jagĂ„Â§mlu s-sewwa

120.translation: Ma'kienx xieraq li nies Medina u l-GĂ„Â§arab tad-dezert ta' madwarhom izommu lura mill-MibgĂ„Â§ut ta' Alla (u ma joĂ„Â§orgux miegĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§at-taqbida ta' Tabilk), jew li jibzgĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§al Ă„Â§ajjithom minflok gĂ„Â§al tiegĂ„Â§u. Dan gĂ„Â§aliex ma jaqbadhomx gĂ„Â§atx, gĂ„Â§eja, jew guĂ„Â§ gĂ„Â§al Alla, ma jagĂ„Â§mlux pass li jqanqal l-gĂ„Â§adab ta' dawk li ma jemmnux, u lanqas jiksbu xi qligĂ„Â§ mill-gĂ„Â§adu, lima jjinkitbilhomx bĂ„Â§ala gĂ„Â§emil tajjeb. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla ma jtellifx il-Ă„Â§las ta' dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu t-tajjeb

121.translation: Lanqas ma jonfqu nefqa zgĂ„Â§ira jew kbira, jew jaqsmu xi wied (gĂ„Â§al Alla), li-ma jinkitbilhomx (fil-ktieb tagĂ„Â§hom), biex Alla jĂ„Â§allashom ta' l-aĂ„Â§jar (gĂ„Â§emejjel) li kienu gĂ„Â§amlu

122.translation: Dawk li jemmnu ma gĂ„Â§andhomx joĂ„Â§orgu Ikoll flimkien (gĂ„Â§at-taqbid). Xi tajta minn kull gemgĂ„Â§a gĂ„Â§andha tibqa' lura (u ma toĂ„Â§rogx titqabad), biex tagĂ„Â§tiha gĂ„Â§all-istudju tar-religjon u biex twissi lil niesha meta jerggĂ„Â§u lura Iejha (mit-taqbid), forsi jitĂ„Â§arsu (mid-deni)

123.translation: Intomli temmnu, tqatlu kontra dawk li ma jemmnux li jinsabu qribkom, u Ă„Â§alluhom isibu l-qilla fikom. U kunu afu li Alla ma' dawk li jibzgĂ„Â§u minnu

124.translation: Kull meta tinzel xi sura, hemm minnhom (ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) li jgĂ„Â§idu (bi tkasbir): 'Lil min minnkom (din is- sura) ziditu fit-twemmin) Izda lil-dawk li jemmnu (tassew) zidithom fit-twemmin, u huma ferĂ„Â§anin (b'dan, gĂ„Â§aliex kull vers fil-Qoran jagĂ„Â§mel minnhom. Misilmin tajbin)

125.translation: Izda dawk li fi qlubhom hemm marda (tac-caĂ„Â§da tat- twemmin u tal-wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or, is-sura li tinzel) tkompli zzidilhom it-tingis tagĂ„Â§hom (il-wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) b'faktar) tingis, u jmutu meta jkunu gĂ„Â§adhom ma jemmnux

126.translation: Mela (ta' wicc b'ieĂ„Â§or) ma jarawx li kull sena qegĂ„Â§din jiggarrbu darba jew darbtejn, imbagĂ„Â§ad la jindmu u lanqas jiftakru (fit-twissija ta' Alla)

127.translation: Kull darba li titnizzel sura, uĂ„Â§ud minnhom iĂ„Â§arsu lejn xulxin (u jgĂ„Â§idu): ''TgĂ„Â§id qiegĂ„Â§ed jarakom xi Ă„Â§add (mill- Misilminj 7' ImbagĂ„Â§ad jitilqu. Alla telaq qlubhom (gĂ„Â§a kollox) gĂ„Â§aliex huma nies li ma jifhmux

128.translation: GĂ„Â§adu kif giekom MibgĂ„Â§ut minnkom infuskom. Is- saram: tagĂ„Â§kom ikiddu, u moĂ„Â§Ă„Â§u fikom. Huwa kollu tjieba u Ă„Â§anin ma' dawk li jemmnu

129.translation: Izda jekk jagĂ„Â§tu daharhom. (u ma' jkunux iridu jisimgĂ„Â§u), gĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Alla huwa bizzejjed gĂ„Â§alija. Ma hemmx alla Ă„Â§liefu. F'idejh Ă„Â§allejt, u huwa Sid it-Tron il-kbir (tas-sebĂ„Â§ tiegĂ„Â§u)

1.translation: Alif. Lam. Ra'. Dawk huma l-versi tal-Ktieb l-GĂ„Â§aref

2.translation: Jaqaw huwa ta' l-gĂ„Â§ageb gĂ„Â§an-nies li nebbaĂ„Â§na lil ragel minn fosthom (li huwa MuĂ„Â§ammad, u gĂ„Â§ednielu): 'Wissi lin-nies (bin-Nar ta' dejjem), u-agĂ„Â§ti l-bxara lil dawk li emmnu, li huma jinsabu f'qagĂ„Â§da gĂ„Â§olja (minĂ„Â§abba s- sewwa ta' gĂ„Â§emilhom) quddiem Sidhom'' 7 Dawk li ma jemmnux qalu: ''Dan (MuĂ„Â§ammad) tassew saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar fid- dieheri

3.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidkom huwa Alla li Ă„Â§alaq is-smewwiet u l-art f'sitt ijiem, imbagĂ„Â§ad intasab fuq it-Tron, imexxi kollox. Ă„Â¦add ma jista' jidĂ„Â§ol gĂ„Â§al Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or (f'/un il- Qawmien) jekk mhux bir-rieda tiegĂ„Â§u. Dak huwa Alla Sidkom. Mela qimuh (u lilu biss)l Jaqaw ma tiftakrux (fit-twissija tiegĂ„Â§u)

4.translation: GĂ„Â§andu gĂ„Â§ad. terggĂ„Â§u lura Ikoll (fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum). Il- wegĂ„Â§da ta' Alla hija minnha (u Ă„Â§add u xejn ma jbiddilha). Huwa li beda l-Ă„Â§olqien, imbagĂ„Â§ad jerga' jibdieh (wara i jeqirdu) biex iĂ„Â§allas bil-Ă„Â§aqq lil dawk li emmnu u gĂ„Â§amlu s-sewwa. Izda dawk li ma jemmnux, gĂ„Â§andhom xarba misĂ„Â§un. jagĂ„Â§li u kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§, gĂ„Â§aliex caĂ„Â§du t-twemmin

5.translation: Huwa li (fil-Ă„Â§niena tiegĂ„Â§u) gĂ„Â§amel ix-xemx (kollha) dija u l-qamar (kollu) dawl, u fasslu f'taqsimiet u bi mkejjen (differenti minn fejn jitla' u jinzel), biex tkunu tafu l-gĂ„Â§add tas-snin u l-kalkolu (taz-zmien). Huwa ma Ă„Â§alaqx dak (kollu) jekk mhux bis-sewwa. Huwa jfisser bir-reqqa (dawn) is-sinjali tiegĂ„Â§u (fl-univers) lil nies li jafu (bil-Ă„Â§ila bla tarf ta' Alla)

6.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li fid-dĂ„Â§ul wara xulxin tal-lejl u tan-nhar, u f'dak li Alla Ă„Â§alaq fis-smewwiet u fl-art, hemm sinjali gĂ„Â§al nies li jibzgĂ„Â§u minnu (u mill-kastig tiegĂ„Â§u)

7.translation: Dawlkeli ma jittamawx fil-laqgĂ„Â§a magĂ„Â§na, li jithennew bil-Ă„Â§ajja fid-dinja u jserrhu rashom biha, u li ma jagĂ„Â§tux kas is-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na (li jidhru kullimkien)

8.translation: dawk, il-kenn tagĂ„Â§hom fin-Nar, minĂ„Â§abba (il-Ă„Â§azen) li ) kienu jiksbu

9.translation: (TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li jemmnu u jagĂ„Â§mlu l-gid, Sidhom: ) imexxihom minĂ„Â§abba twemminhom; taĂ„Â§thom jigru x- xmajjar fil-Gonna ta' l-hena

10.translation: Fiha (il-Genna, tkun din) is-sejĂ„Â§a tagĂ„Â§hom: ''SebĂ„Â§ lilek, 0 Allaf' U hemm it-tislima tagĂ„Â§hom tkun: ''Sliemt'' U l- aĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar tas-sejĂ„Â§a tagĂ„Â§hom: ikun: ''TifĂ„Â§ir lil Alla, Sid il- Ă„Â§olqieni

11.translation: Li kieku Alla kellu jgĂ„Â§aggel (u jikkastiga) lin-nies tad- deni (li jagĂ„Â§mlu), daqskemm huma jgĂ„Â§agglu fil-kisba tal- gid, kieku zmienhom ilu li ntemm. Izda AĂ„Â§na, lil dawk li ma jittamawx fil-laqgĂ„Â§a magĂ„Â§na (fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum, u jgiddbuha). inĂ„Â§alluhom, mitlufin: (u mogĂ„Â§mijin). fil-Ă„Â§tija tagĂ„Â§hom

12.translation: Meta l-Ă„Â§sara. tmiss. lill-bniedem, huwa: jsejĂ„Â§ilna, (mimdud) fuq genbu, jew bilqiegĂ„Â§da jew bilwieqfa, izda meta nneĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ulu (dik) il-Ă„Â§sara tiegĂ„Â§u, huwa jibqa' sejjer bĂ„Â§allikieku (gatt) ma sejĂ„Â§ilna meta messitu l-Ă„Â§sara. Hekk jizzejjen (u jidher sabiĂ„Â§) lill-Ă„Â§aljin dak (il-Ă„Â§azen) li kienu jagĂ„Â§mlu

13.translation: Qabilkom (ja pagani ta' Mekka) diga qridna aktar minn nisel meta gĂ„Â§amlu l-Ă„Â§azen: gewhom il-MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§hom bis-sinjali c-cari, izda huma ma kienu (gatt) se jemmnu. Hekk inĂ„Â§allsu lill-Ă„Â§atjin

14.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad warajhom gĂ„Â§amilniekom. werrieta fuq l-art, biex naraw x'se tagĂ„Â§mlu

15.translation: Meta l-versi cari tagĂ„Â§na jinqrawlhom, dawk li ma jittamawx. fil-laqgĂ„Â§a magĂ„Â§na (fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum) jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Gibfilna: MuĂ„Â§ammad) Qoran ieĂ„Â§or, jew (inkella) biddlut' GĂ„Â§idfilhom): 'Ma nistax inbiddlu minn rajja. Jiena ma nimxix gĂ„Â§ajr fuq dak li jitnebbaĂ„Â§ lili. Jekk ma nobdix lil Sidi, jiena tabilĂ„Â§aqq nibza' mill-kastig ta' Jum kbir (u tal-biza)

16.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Li kieku Alla ried, ma kontx naqrahulkom, u lanqas kien jgĂ„Â§arrafkom bih. Jiena bqajt fostkom gĂ„Â§omor (sĂ„Â§iĂ„Â§ erbgĂ„Â§in sena) qablu (qabel inzul il-Qoran). Mela ma tifhmux (li Ktieb bĂ„Â§al dan niezel mingĂ„Â§and Alla)

17.translation: Mela min huwa aktar Ă„Â§ati minn dak li jaqla' l-gideb dwar Alla (u jgĂ„Â§id li l-Qoran huwa xogĂ„Â§ol MuĂ„Â§ammad), u jgiddeb is-sinjali tiegĂ„Â§u TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-Ă„Â§atjin ma humiex se jirbĂ„Â§u

18.translation: Minflok lil Alla huma jqimu lil-dak li la jagĂ„Â§mlilhom deni u lanqas gid, u jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Dawk huma li jaqbzu gĂ„Â§alina ma' Allat'' GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): 'Jaqaw (mingĂ„Â§alikom li) qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§arrfu lil Alla b'dak li Huwa ma jafx fis- smewwiet u lanqas fl-artf' SebĂ„Â§ lilul Huwa wisq ogĂ„Â§la minn dak li (il-pagani) ixierku miegĂ„Â§u

19.translation: Il-bnedmin (minn zmien Adam sa Noe) ma kinux Ă„Â§lief gens wieĂ„Â§ed (ilkoll Misilmin), izda (aktar tard) ma qablux bejniethom ( 4 bdier tingĂ„Â§ata qima lill-idoli). Li kieku mhux gĂ„Â§al Kelma li laĂ„Â§qet (ingĂ„Â§atar) minn Sidek (li jagĂ„Â§ti l-Ă„Â§las mistĂ„Â§oqq lil kulĂ„Â§add fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum), kieku kien diga sar Ă„Â§aqq minnhom (fid-dinja) fuq dak li ma qablux dwaru

20.translation: Huma jgĂ„Â§idu (fuq MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''GĂ„Â§aliex ma tnizzilx fuqu xi sinjal minn Sidu (bĂ„Â§alma kienu tnizzlu fuq il- MibgĂ„Â§utin ta' qablu) 1' GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): 'Il-mistur huwa ta' Alla biss Mela stennew (u taraw x'se jigri); jiena nistenna magĂ„Â§komf

21.translation: Meta ndewqu lin-nies Ă„Â§niena (mingĂ„Â§andna), wara li tkun messithom il-Ă„Â§sara, malajr inassu kontra s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na. GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): 'Alla eĂ„Â§fef fit-tnassis.' TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-MibgĂ„Â§utin tagĂ„Â§na (l-angli) qegĂ„Â§din jiktbu dak li tnassu (u gĂ„Â§ad ifakkruhulkom)

22.translation: Huwa li jgĂ„Â§addikom minn fuq l-art u l-baĂ„Â§ar, hekk li meta tkunu fl-imriekeb, u jigru bihom b'riĂ„Â§ tajjeb, u jifirĂ„Â§u bih, (dlonk) jigihom riĂ„Â§ qawwi, u jigihom il-mewg minn kullimkien, u jaĂ„Â§sbu li se jinqerdu. Huma jsejĂ„Â§u lil Alla u jduru lejh bi twemmin safi, (tr jgĂ„Â§idu hekk): 'Jekk teĂ„Â§lisna minn dan, inkunu tassew minn dawk li jizzu Ă„Â§ajri

23.translation: Izda meta jeĂ„Â§lishom, arahom jagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§azen fuq l-art, mingĂ„Â§ajr Ă„Â§aqq. Ja nies, il-Ă„Â§azen tagĂ„Â§kom ma huwiex gĂ„Â§ajr kontra tagĂ„Â§kom infuskom; (huwa) it-tgawdija tal- Ă„Â§ajja (f'din) id-dinja. ImbagĂ„Â§ad lejna terggĂ„Â§u lura, u ngĂ„Â§arrfukom b'dak li kontu tagĂ„Â§mlu

24.translation: Il-Ă„Â§ajja (f'din) id-dinja tixbah lil ilma li nnizzlu mis- sema: il-Ă„Â§xejjex ta' l-art jitĂ„Â§alltu miegĂ„Â§u dak li n-nies u l-bhejjem: jieklu u meta l-art tkun fil-gmiel (kollu) tagĂ„Â§ha u tizzejjen (bil-frott bnin), u niesha jaĂ„Â§sbu li huma jistgĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§aliha (u jafu bizzejjed kif jiksbu l-ikel minnha); l-amar tagĂ„Â§na jigiha billejl, jew binhar, u naĂ„Â§sduha (hekk li ma jibqa' xejn minnha), bĂ„Â§allikieku ma Ă„Â§addritx fil- jum ta' qabel. Hekk infissru bir-reqqa s-sinjali lil nies li jixtarru (is-siwi tagĂ„Â§hom)

25.translation: Izda Alla jsejjaĂ„Â§ gĂ„Â§al Dar is-Sliem (fil-Genna), u lil min irid imexxi fit-triq id-dritta (Zi hija l-Islam)

26.translation: GĂ„Â§al dawk li (bit-twemmin tajjeb tagĂ„Â§hom) jagĂ„Â§mlu t- tajjeb hemm l-aĂ„Â§jar (Ă„Â§las fil-Genna), u aktart La swied u lanqas tkasbir ma jiksu l-ucuĂ„Â§ tagĂ„Â§hom: Dawk huma nies il-Genna, u fiha jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem

27.translation: Dawk li kisbu (gĂ„Â§alihom infushom) gĂ„Â§emejjel Ă„Â§ziena, (Ă„Â§alli jkunu jafu li) il-Ă„Â§las ta' gĂ„Â§emil Ă„Â§azin ikun (b'gĂ„Â§emil) bĂ„Â§alu, u t-tkasbir jgĂ„Â§attihom. Ma gĂ„Â§andhomx min iĂ„Â§arishom minn Alla, u l-ucuĂ„Â§ tagĂ„Â§hom ikunu bĂ„Â§allikieku miksija b'bicciet mudlama. tal-lejl. Dawk huma nies in-Nar, u fih jgĂ„Â§ammru gĂ„Â§al dejjem

28.translation: Fil-Jum meta nigbruhom ilkoll, u ngĂ„Â§idu lil-dawk li xierku (allat oĂ„Â§ra magĂ„Â§na): ''Zommu postkom, intom u sĂ„Â§abkom (li xeriktu ma' Allaj', imbagĂ„Â§ad. (lill-Ă„Â§ziena) nifirduhom: (mit-tajbin) u sĂ„Â§abhom. (l-idoli) jgĂ„Â§idu: Intom mhux lilna kontu tqimu

29.translation: Alla huwa bizzejjed bĂ„Â§ala xhud bejnna u bejnkom, AĂ„Â§na ma konniex nafu bil-qima tagĂ„Â§kom (gĂ„Â§aliex aĂ„Â§na, ta' idoli bla ruĂ„Â§ li aĂ„Â§na, la stajna naraw, la nisimgĂ„Â§u, u lanqas nifhmu)

30.translation: Hemmhekk kull ruĂ„Â§ iggarrab dak (it-tajjeb u l-Ă„Â§azin) li gĂ„Â§amlet qabel. U (kulĂ„Â§add) jintbagĂ„Â§at lura lejn Alla, il- Mulej tagĂ„Â§hom: tabilĂ„Â§aqg, u jĂ„Â§allihom dak. (il-gideb kollu) li kienu jaqilgĂ„Â§u (meta qalu li l-idoli gĂ„Â§ad jaqbzu gĂ„Â§alihom)

31.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Min jagĂ„Â§tikom l-gĂ„Â§ajxien tagĂ„Â§kom mis-sema u mill-art 7 Ta' min huma s-smigĂ„Â§ u l- Ă„Â§ars (fil-bnedmin kollha) Min joĂ„Â§rog il-Ă„Â§aj mill-mejjet, u joĂ„Â§rog il-mejjet mill-Ă„Â§ajz' Min imexxi kollox. (fil- Ă„Â§olqien) 7' ImbagĂ„Â§ad jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Allaf' GĂ„Â§id(ilhom): 'Mela kif ma tibzgĂ„Â§ux minnu (u mill-kastig tiegĂ„Â§u, u tibqgĂ„Â§u tqimu l-allat)

32.translation: Dak huwa Alla, Sidkom tabilĂ„Â§aqq' U x'hemm, wara s- sewwa, gĂ„Â§ajr it-telfien U kif ma tagĂ„Â§tux kas (u ma tqimux lil Alla WieĂ„Â§ed)

33.translation: Hekk isseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ Kelmet Sidek kontra dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu l- Ă„Â§azen. gĂ„Â§aliex huma ma jemmnux

34.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom): ''Jaqaw hemm fost sĂ„Â§abkom (l-allat u l-idoli li 1qimu) min (gĂ„Â§andu l-Ă„Â§ila) jibda l-Ă„Â§olqien, imbagĂ„Â§ad jerga' jibdieh (wara li jegirdu)a'' GĂ„Â§id: 'Huwa Alla li jibda l-Ă„Â§olqien, imbagĂ„Â§ad jerga' jibdieh (wara li jegirdujl Mela kif tinqalbu (fi Ă„Â§siebkom u tagĂ„Â§mlu kollox ta' taĂ„Â§t fuq, meta tafu dan kollu)

35.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom ukoll): 'Jaqaw hemm fost sĂ„Â§abkom (l-allat iu l- idoli li' tqimu) min. (gĂ„Â§andu l-Ă„Â§ila) imexxi lejn is-sewwa 7' GĂ„Â§id: 'Huwa Alla li jmexxi lejn is-sewwa. Mela min jistĂ„Â§oqq l-aktar li wieĂ„Â§ed jimxi warajh: Min imexxi lejn is-sewwa (Alla), jew min (bĂ„Â§al xi alla falz jew xi idolu) ma jmexxix (gĂ„Â§aliex ma jistax, u ma gĂ„Â§andux triq oĂ„Â§ra) Ă„Â§lief li huwa (stess) ikun immexxi 2 Mela x'gĂ„Â§andkom (tgĂ„Â§idu dwar dan), u kif taqtgĂ„Â§uha (dwar din li tqisu lil-Alla l-Imbierek daqs l-allat Jolozji)

36.translation: Izda l-kotra tagĂ„Â§hom ma jimxux gĂ„Â§ajr fuq stĂ„Â§ajjil (fi l-idoli huma tassew allat). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-istĂ„Â§ajjil ma jiswa xejn gĂ„Â§as- sewwa. Alla tassew jaf b'kulma jagĂ„Â§mlu

37.translation: Dan il-Qoran ma seta' jsir minn Ă„Â§add gĂ„Â§ajr minn Alla, izda huwa jseddaq dak li gie qablu (fiz-Tora u fl-Evangelju), u huwa tifsir bir-reqqa tal-Ktieb (li jinsab gĂ„Â§and Alla). Ma hemm ebda dubju fih ( 4: huwa Rivelazzjoni) minn Sid il-Ă„Â§olqien

38.translation: Jew jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Huwa (MuĂ„Â§ammad) li qalgĂ„Â§u minn zniedu' 7 GĂ„Â§idfilhom): ''Gibu sura bĂ„Â§alu u sejĂ„Â§u, minflok lil Alla, lil-min. tistgĂ„Â§u (u araw issibux fil-Ă„Â§olqien kollu min gĂ„Â§andu l-Ă„Â§ila jgib sura bĂ„Â§alu), jekk qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu s-sewwa

39.translation: Izda huma giddbu dak li ma jafux sewwa, u li t-tifsira (u t- twissija) tiegĂ„Â§u gĂ„Â§adha ma githomx. Hekk ukoll dawk ta' qabilhom giddbu (is-sewwa), izda ara (MuĂ„Â§ammad) kif kien tmiem il-Ă„Â§ziena

40.translation: Hemm minnhom li jemmen fih (il-Qoran), u minnhom li ma jemminx fih. Sidek jaf l-aktar b'dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§sara

41.translation: Jekk igiddbuk, gĂ„Â§id(i/hom): ''Jiena gĂ„Â§andi xogĂ„Â§li (u l-Ă„Â§las tiegĂ„Â§u), u intom gĂ„Â§andkom xogĂ„Â§olkom (u l-Ă„Â§las tiegĂ„Â§u); intom Ă„Â§ielsa minn dak li nagĂ„Â§mel, u jiena Ă„Â§ieles minn dak li tagĂ„Â§mluf

42.translation: Fosthom hemm dawk li jisimgĂ„Â§uk (ragra l-Qoran, mingĂ„Â§ajr ma jifhmu). Mela inti (MuĂ„Â§ammad, tista') issemma' lit-torox, anki jekk ma jistgĂ„Â§ux jifhmu

43.translation: U fosthom hemm min iĂ„Â§ares lejk (u jsib fik is-sinjali li juru li inti. tassew. Profeta, izda xorta jwebbes: rasu). Izda. inti (MuĂ„Â§ammad, tista ') tmexxi lill-gĂ„Â§omja, anki jekk ma jistgĂ„Â§ux. jaraw

44.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla ma jonqos f'xejn lejn in-nies, izda huma n- nies li jonqsu lejhom infushom

45.translation: Fil-Jum li jigborhom. (lill-pagani, biex jagĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq minnhom, ikunu qishom) ma damux Ă„Â§lief siegĂ„Â§a mill-jum, u jagĂ„Â§rfu lil xulxin (u jinkixef dak kollu li bih kienu jonqsu lejn xulxin). Tellifin huma dawk li giddbu l-laqgĂ„Â§a ma' Alla (fl- AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum); u ma kinux fit-triq it-tajba

46.translation: Sew jekk nuruk (MuĂ„Â§ammad, f'Ă„Â§ajtek) xi ftit minn dak (il- kastig) li nwegĂ„Â§duhom, u sew jekk (nilĂ„Â§qu) neĂ„Â§dulek Ă„Â§ajtek (biex tingabar magĂ„Â§na, kun af li llum jew gĂ„Â§ada), lejna gĂ„Â§ad jerggĂ„Â§u lura. ImbagĂ„Â§ad Alla jkun xhud ta' dak li jagĂ„Â§mlu

47.translation: Lil kull gens (intbagĂ„Â§ar) MibgĂ„Â§ut, u meta (dan) il-MibgĂ„Â§ut tagĂ„Â§hom jigi (quddiemhom fl-AĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar Jum), isir Ă„Â§aqq minnhom kif jixraq, u ma jmorrux minn taĂ„Â§t

48.translation: (Dawklli ma jemmnux, bi tkasbir) jgĂ„Â§idu: 'Din il-wegĂ„Â§da (dwar il-kastig tal-Ă„Â§ziena) meta (se sseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§), jekk qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu s-sewwal

49.translation: (GĂ„Â§iddilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Jiena ma nistax ingib Ă„Â§sara jew gid gĂ„Â§alija nnifsi, gĂ„Â§ajr dak li jrid Allat Kull gens gĂ„Â§andu zmien (li jafu Alla biss, meta jinqered u jieĂ„Â§u l-kastig). Meta jasal zmienhom, la jkunu jistgĂ„Â§u jtawlufh) b'siegĂ„Â§a, u lanqas inaqqsufh

50.translation: GĂ„Â§id: 'X'taĂ„Â§sbu: jekk il-kastig tiegĂ„Â§u jigikom billejl jew binhar, liema (bicca) minnu (ikunu jixtiequ) jgĂ„Â§agglu l-Ă„Â§atjin

51.translation: Jaqaw (se tibqgĂ„Â§u taĂ„Â§lu z-zmien u) imbagĂ„Â§ad meta jseĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ (dan kollu), se temmnu fih (il-kastigj 7 Jaqaw issa (tridu demmnu), meta (qabel, biex mingĂ„Â§alikom twaqqgĂ„Â§u dawn il- Ă„Â§wejjeg gĂ„Â§ac-cajf) kontu qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§aggluh fil-kastig tagĂ„Â§kom)i

52.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad jingĂ„Â§ad lil dawk li gĂ„Â§amlu l-Ă„Â§azen: ''Duqu l-kastig ta' dejjeml Jaqaw mhux ta' dak (il-Ă„Â§azen) biss li kontu tiksbu qegĂ„Â§din titĂ„Â§allsu

53.translation: Huma jistaqsuk (MuĂ„Â§ammad) biex isiru jafu: ''Jaqaw dan huwa tabilĂ„Â§aqq (l qiegĂ„Â§ed tgĂ„Â§idilna dwar. il-kastig))' GĂ„Â§idfilhom): 'Mela, fuq Sidi, dan huwa s-sewwa, u m'intomx ge taĂ„Â§arbu (il-kastig ta' Allaji)

54.translation: Li kieku kull ruĂ„Â§ midinba jkollha kulma jinsab fuq l- art, kienet (tipprova) tinfeda bih. U meta (il-midinbin) jaraw il-kastig, huma juru l-indiema, izda jsir Ă„Â§aqq minnhom kif jixraq. Huma ma jmorrux minn taĂ„Â§t fu kulĂ„Â§add jieĂ„Â§u li Ă„Â§aqqu

55.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq li ta' Alla kulma jinsab fis-smewwiet u fl-art. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-wegĂ„Â§da ta' Alla (dwar Jum il-Qawmien) bija minnha, izda Ă„Â§afna minnhom ma jafux

56.translation: Huwa jagĂ„Â§ti l-Ă„Â§ajja u jagĂ„Â§ti l-mewt, u lejh titregggĂ„Â§u lura

57.translation: Ja nies, gietkom twissija (il-Qoran) minn. Sidkom, fejqan gĂ„Â§al(l-mard) li hemm fil-qlub, u tmexxija tajba u. Ă„Â§niena (minn Alla) gĂ„Â§al dawk li jemmnu

58.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Bit-tjieba ta' Alla (il-Qoran) u bil-Ă„Â§niena tiegĂ„Â§u. (l-Islam), b'dak gĂ„Â§andhom jifirĂ„Â§u; huwa aĂ„Â§jar minn dak (il-gid kollu) li jigmgĂ„Â§u

59.translation: GĂ„Â§id: X'taĂ„Â§sbu (ja pagani) dwar dak li Alla nizzlilkom bĂ„Â§ala gĂ„Â§ajxien (gĂ„Â§alikom), li intom (gbadtu) u. gĂ„Â§amiltu minnu dak li ma jiswiex, u dak li jiswa/' GĂ„Â§idfilhom): ''Jaqaw Alla takom permess (tagĂ„Â§mlu dan), jew qegĂ„Â§din taqilgĂ„Â§u l-gideb dwar Alla

60.translation: U x'jaĂ„Â§sbu dawk li jaqilgĂ„Â§u l-gideb dwar Alla (li se jigri minnhom) Ă‚ÂŁ Jum il-Qawmien 7 Alla tabilĂ„Â§aqq Kollu Tjieba man-nies, izda Ă„Â§afna minnhom ma jizzux Ă„Â§ajr

61.translation: Inti (MuĂ„Â§ammad) ma tagĂ„Â§mel ebda xogĂ„Â§ol, u lanqas taqra xejn mill-Qoran, u (intom il-bnedmin) ma tagĂ„Â§mlu ebda Ă„Â§idma (fajba jew Ă„Â§azina) jekk AĂ„Â§na ma nkunux xhieda tagĂ„Â§kom meta tkunu mĂ„Â§abbtin b'dan (kollu). Lil Sidek ma jaĂ„Â§rablux. it-toqol ta' atomu, fuq l-art u fis- sema, ui lanqas ma hemm izgĂ„Â§ar minnu, u lanqas akbar, li ma huwiex fi ktieb mill-aktar car

62.translation: Aral Il-Ă„Â§bieb ta' Alla ma hemm ebda biza' fuqhom (dakinhar ta' Jum il-Ă„Â¦aqq), u lanqas jitnikktu

63.translation: Huma dawk li jemmnu u jibzgĂ„Â§u minn Alla

64.translation: TagĂ„Â§hom hija l-bxara t-tajba fil-Ă„Â§ajja (f'din) id-dinja u fl-OĂ„Â§ra. Ma hemm ebda tibdil fil-Kelmiet ta' Alla, Dik hija r-rebĂ„Â§a l-kbira

65.translation: TĂ„Â§allix kliemhom (MuĂ„Â§ammad, u l-gideb tagĂ„Â§hom dwar Alla u dwarek) inikktek. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-qawwa kollha hija ta' Alla. Huwa li jisma' kollox u jaf kollox

66.translation: TabilĂ„Â§aqq ta' Alla huwa kulma jinsab fis-smewwiet u fl-artl Dawk li jsejĂ„Â§u (allat oĂ„Â§ra) minflok lil Alla ma humiex qegĂ„Â§din jimxu Wara sĂ„Â§ab (/i huma tassew imseĂ„Â§bin ma' Alla). Huma ma humiex qegĂ„Â§din jimxu gĂ„Â§ajr wara l-istĂ„Â§ajjil, u ma humiex Ă„Â§lief jigdbu

67.translation: Huwa li gĂ„Â§amlilkom il-lejl biex tistrieĂ„Â§u fih, u l-jum imdawwal (biex taraw fih u tagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§idma tagĂ„Â§kom). F'dan tabilĂ„Â§aqq hemm sinjali gĂ„Â§al nies li jisimgĂ„Â§u

68.translation: Huma jgĂ„Â§idu: ''Alla gĂ„Â§andu iben.' SebĂ„Â§ lilul Huwa l- GĂ„Â§ani (u ma gĂ„Â§andu bzonn lil Ă„Â§add). TiegĂ„Â§u kulma jinsab fis-smewwiet u fl-art. Ma gĂ„Â§andkom ebda prova ta' dan (il-kliem). Jaqaw qegĂ„Â§din tgĂ„Â§idu dwar Alla dak li ma tafux

69.translation: (GĂ„Â§idfilhom MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''TabilĂ„Â§aqq li dawk li jaqilgĂ„Â§u l-gideb dwar Alla ma humiex se jirbĂ„Â§ul

70.translation: (Ftit) tgawdija fid-dinja, imbagĂ„Â§ad lejna jerggĂ„Â§u lura (biex jagĂ„Â§tu kont ta' Ă„Â§ajjithom). ImbagĂ„Â§ad indewquhom il-kastig il-qalil talli ma kinux jemmnu

71.translation: Ă„Â¦abbrilhom (MuĂ„Â§ammad, lil niesek f'Mekka) il-grajja ta' Noc, meta qal lil niesu: 'Ja niesi, jekk il-waqfa tiegĂ„Â§i (fostkom), u t-tifkira (u t-twissija) tiegĂ„Â§i (lilkom) dwat is- sinjali ta' Alla qegĂ„Â§din issibuhom tqal, mela (kunu afi) li jiena nĂ„Â§alli f'idejn Alla. Mela araw ma' sĂ„Â§abkom (l-allat foloz) x'se tagĂ„Â§mlu (bija)l U (araw) li din il-bicca tagĂ„Â§kom. ma. tkunx mistura. ImbagĂ„Â§ad agĂ„Â§mlu Ă„Â§aqq minni, u ddewmunix

72.translation: Izda jekk tagĂ„Â§tu daharkom (u ma tridux tisimgĂ„Â§u l- messagg tiegĂ„Â§i, kumu afu) li jiena ma tlabtkom ebda Ă„Â§las. Ă„Â¦lasi mingĂ„Â§and Alla biss, u jiena ngĂ„Â§atajt l-amar li nkun fost il-Misilmin li jintelqu F'Alla

73.translation: Huma giddbuh, izda AĂ„Â§na Ă„Â§lisna lilu u lil ta' miegĂ„Â§u (u daĂ„Â§Ă„Â§alniehom) fl-arka, u gĂ„Â§amilniehom werrieta (fiuq l- art), u gĂ„Â§erriqna lil dawk li giddbu s-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na. Ara kif kien tmiem l-imwissijin

74.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad warajh bgĂ„Â§atna MibgĂ„Â§utin (oĂ„Â§ra) gĂ„Â§and nieshom, u gewhom bis-sinjali c-cari, izda m'emmnux f'dak (it-twemmin. safi) li qabel kienu caĂ„Â§du. Hekk inqiegĂ„Â§du sigill fuq qlub dawk li jiksru l-ligi

75.translation: ImbagĂ„Â§ad warajhom bgĂ„Â§atna lil Mosc u lil Aron gĂ„Â§and il-FargĂ„Â§un u l-kbarat tiegĂ„Â§u bis-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na, izda (il- FargĂ„Â§un u l-kbarat tiegĂ„Â§u) tkabbru (u ma ridux jemmnu), u kienu nies mill-agĂ„Â§ar

76.translation: Meta giehom is-sewwa mingĂ„Â§andna, huma qalu: ''Dan tabilĂ„Â§aqq huwa seĂ„Â§er fid-dieheri

77.translation: Mosc qal: 'Qed tgĂ„Â§idu (hekk) dwar is-sewwa meta giekom (tabilĂ„Â§aqq) 7 Dan seĂ„Â§er) Is-sĂ„Â§aĂ„Â§ar ma jirbĂ„Â§uxi

78.translation: Qalu: ''Jaqaw gejtna biex iddawwarna minn dak (it- twemmin) li sibna lil missirijietna fih, u tagĂ„Â§kom it-tnejn (tiegĂ„Â§ek u ta' Ă„Â§uk Aron) ikun il-kobor fl-art 7 AĂ„Â§na ma nemmnukomx f

79.translation: U qal il-FargĂ„Â§un: ''Gibuli kull saĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ar jilĂ„Â§aqlu

80.translation: U meta gew is-sĂ„Â§aĂ„Â§ar, Mosc qalilhom: ''IxĂ„Â§tu (fl-art) dak li gĂ„Â§andkom tixĂ„Â§tu (Ă„Â§bula u bsaten) f

81.translation: U meta xeĂ„Â§tu(hom), Mosc qal: 'Dak li gibtu huwa seĂ„Â§er, u Alla tassew igibu fix-xejn, gĂ„Â§aliex tabilĂ„Â§aqq li Alla ma jgibx 'il quddiem l-gĂ„Â§emil ta' dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu l- Ă„Â§sara

82.translation: U Alla jseddaq is-sewwa bi Kliemu (u bis-sinjali c-cari tiegĂ„Â§u), minkejja li l-Ă„Â§atjin jobogĂ„Â§du (dan)

83.translation: GĂ„Â§alhekk m'emmnux f'Mosc, gĂ„Â§ajr gemgĂ„Â§a minn niesti, gĂ„Â§alkemm imbezzgĂ„Â§a mill-FargĂ„Â§un u l-kbarat tiegĂ„Â§u, li ma (jiurx) igarrabhom. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li l-FargĂ„Â§un kien imkabbar u tirann fuq l-art, u tabilĂ„Â§aqq kien wieĂ„Â§ed minn dawk mogĂ„Â§tijin gĂ„Â§all-Ă„Â§azen. I

84.translation: U Mosc qal: 'Ja niesi, jekk temmnu f'Alla, mela Ă„Â§allu f'idejh, jekk intom (tassew) Misilmin

85.translation: U qalu: S'AĂ„Â§na Ă„Â§allejna f'idejn Alla, Sidna, la tagĂ„Â§milx minna tigrib gĂ„Â§an-nies il-Ă„Â§ziena

86.translation: eĂ„Â§lisna, bil-Ă„Â§niena tiegĂ„Â§ek, min-nies li ma jemmnux

87.translation: SAgĂ„Â§mlu gĂ„Â§al nieskom djar (ra' talb u qima) fl-Egittu, (u minĂ„Â§abba. l-biza' tagĂ„Â§kom mill-FargĂ„Â§un) agĂ„Â§mlu minn djarkom imkejjen ta' qima, u agĂ„Â§mlu t-talb. AgĂ„Â§ti l-bxara t-tajba lil-dawk li jemmnu

88.translation: U Mosc qal: ''Sidna, Inti tajt lill-FargĂ„Â§un u lill-kbarat tiegĂ„Â§u z-zina u l-gid. fil-Ă„Â§ajja (f'din) id-dinja. Sidna, (huma uzawhom) biex (jitilfu triqtek) u jtellfu triqtek lil Ă„Â§addieĂ„Â§or Sidna, Ă„Â§assar il-gid tagĂ„Â§hom u webbes qlubhom, hekk li ma jemmnux sa ma jaraw il-kastig ta' wgigĂ„Â§ (u mbagĂ„Â§ad ikun tard wisq)

89.translation: Alla qal: 'iIt-talba tagĂ„Â§kom. it-tnejn (Mosc u 4ron) intlaqgĂ„Â§et. Mela ibqgĂ„Â§u mexjin. fit-triq it-tajba, u la timxux fit-triq ta' dawk li ma jafuxi

90.translation: AĂ„Â§na gĂ„Â§addejna lil Ulied Israel mill-baĂ„Â§ar, u l-FargĂ„Â§un u l-qawwiet tiegĂ„Â§u marru gĂ„Â§al warajhom b'ingustizzja u b'aggressjoni, hekk li meta laĂ„Â§qitu l-gĂ„Â§arqa, (il-FargĂ„Â§un) qal: 'Jiena nemmen. li ma hemmx alla Ă„Â§lief Dak li emmnu fih Ulied Israel, u jiena mill-Misilmin

91.translation: (ImbagĂ„Â§ad intqal lilu): ''Issa (qiegĂ„Â§ed temmenl Insejt li) qabel m'obdejtx (lil Alla) u kont minn dawk li jagĂ„Â§mlu l-Ă„Â§sara

92.translation: Illum neĂ„Â§ilsuk (mill-baĂ„Â§ar) b'gismek (biss, bla ruĂ„Â§), biex tkun sinjal gĂ„Â§al min jigi warajk. TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Ă„Â§afna nies ma jagĂ„Â§tux kas tas-sinjali tagĂ„Â§na

93.translation: AĂ„Â§na tajna lil Ulied Israel imkien mill-isbaĂ„Â§ biex jgĂ„Â§ammru fih, u tajniehom l-aĂ„Â§jar gĂ„Â§ajxien. Kien biss wara li giehom l-gĂ„Â§arfien (li huwa t-Tora) li huma ma qablux bejniethom (dwar. ir-religjon). TabilĂ„Â§aqq li Sidek jagĂ„Â§mel Ă„Â§aqq minnhom f'Jum il-Qawmien minĂ„Â§abba dak li ma'kinux jaqblu fuqu

94.translation: Jekk tinsab (MuĂ„Â§ammad) bejn Ă„Â§alltejn dwar dak li nizzilnielek, mela staqsi lil dawk (il-Lhud u l-Insara) li kienu jaqraw il-Ktieb qablek. TabilĂ„Â§aqq giek is-sewwa minn Sidek, u gĂ„Â§alhekk tkunx minn ta' bejn Ă„Â§alltejn

98.translation: Kif ma kienx hemm belt (mill-ibliet li qridna) li emmnet, hekk li twemminha kien ikunilha ta' siwi, Ă„Â§lief (il-belt ta') nies Gona. Meta (dawn) emmnu, neĂ„Â§Ă„Â§ejna minn fuqhom il-kastig ta' gĂ„Â§ajb fil-Ă„Â§ajja (ta' din) id- dinja, u Ă„Â§allejniehom igawdu gĂ„Â§al xi zmien

104.translation: GĂ„Â§id (MuĂ„Â§ammad): ''Ja nies, jekk intom bejn Ă„Â§alltejn dwar id-din tiegĂ„Â§i, (kunu afu li) jiena ma nqimx dawk (l- allat) li tqimu intom minflok lil Alla, izda nqim lil Alla li jtemmilkom Ă„Â§ajjitkom, Jiena ngĂ„Â§atajt l-amar li nkun minn dawk li jemmnu

105.translation: (Alla qalli:) 'Dawwar wiccek lejn il-fidi safja, u ara li ma tkunx minn dawk li jxierku (a/lar oĂ„Â§ra ma' Alla)
